answer: उक्साउने कार्यको सम्भावित परिणाम हो, र उक्साउने प्रभावमा, वा सहयोगको साथ वा उक्साहट गठन गर्ने षड्यन्त्रको पछ्याउँदै गरेको भएमा उक्साउने व्यक्तिलाई फरक-फरक कार्यको लागि उत्तरदायी मानिन्छ। त्यस्ता अवस्थाहरूमा, उत्प्रेरक उही तरिकामा र उही हदसम्म उत्तरदायी हुन्छ जस्तो कि उसले प्रत्यक्ष रूपमा सहयोग गरेको थियो।
question_en: What are the conditions under which an abettor is held liable when a different act is committed than the one abetted?
answer_en: The abettor is held liable for the different act done if it was a probable consequence of the abetment, and was committed under the influence of the instigation, or with the aid or in pursuance of the conspiracy which constituted the abetment. In such cases, the abettor is liable in the same manner and to the same extent as if he had directly abetted it.

question: यदि A ले बच्चालाई Z को खानामा विष हाल्न उक्साउँछ, तर बच्चाले गल्तीले Y को खानामा विष हाल्यो भने के हुन्छ?
answer: यदि बच्चाले A को उक्साहटको प्रभावमा काम गरिरहेको थियो, र गरिएको कार्य परिस्थितिमा उक्साउने सम्भावित परिणाम हो भने, A कार्यको लागि उत्तरदायी छ।
question_en: What happens if A instigates a child to poison Z's food, but the child mistakenly poisons Y's food instead?
answer_en: If the child was acting under the influence of A's instigation, and the act done was under the circumstances a probable consequence of the abetment, A is liable for the act.

question: उक्साउने 'A' को प्रभावमा कुनै बच्चाले गल्तीले Z को खानाको सट्टा Y को खानामा विष दिएमा, गरेको कार्यलाई उक्साउने सम्भावित परिणाम हो भने जिम्मेवार को हुन्छ?
answer: A कार्यको लागि उत्तरदायी छ।
question_en: Who is liable if a child, under the influence of an instigator 'A', mistakenly poisons Y's food instead of Z's food, given that the act done was a probable consequence of the abetment?
answer_en: A is liable for the act.

question: यदि उनीहरूले बच्चालाई कसैको खानामा विष हाल्न उक्साएमा को जिम्मेवार हुन्छ?
answer: बच्चालाई उक्साउने व्यक्ति उही तरिका र उही हदसम्म उत्तरदायी हुन्छ जस्तो कि उसले प्रत्यक्ष रूपमा खानामा विष हालेको थियो।
question_en: Who is liable if they instigate a child to poison someone's food?
answer_en: The person who instigated the child is liable in the same manner and to the same extent as if they had directly put the poison into the food.

question: बालबालिकालाई कसैको खानामा विष हाल्न उक्साएमा कसलाई र कुन हदसम्म जिम्मेवार मानिन्छ ?
answer: बच्चालाई उक्साउने व्यक्ति उही तरिका र उही हदसम्म उत्तरदायी हुन्छ जस्तो कि उसले प्रत्यक्ष रूपमा खानामा विष हालेको थियो।
question_en: Who is considered responsible when a child is instigated to poison someone's food and to what extent?
answer_en: The person who instigated the child is liable in the same manner and to the same extent as if they had directly put the poison into the food.

question: B लाई Z को घर जलाउन र B लाई एकैसाथ सम्पत्तिको चोरी गर्न उक्साएमा के A चोरी गर्नको लागि दोषी छ?
answer: अहँ, चोरीलाई उक्साएकोमा A दोषी छैन; चोरी एक अलग कार्य थियो, र जलेको सम्भावित परिणाम होइन।
question_en: Is A guilty of abetting the theft if they instigated B to burn Z’s house and B simultaneously committed theft of property?
answer_en: No, A is not guilty of abetting the theft; the theft was a distinct act, and not a probable consequence of the burning.

question: यदि A ले B लाई Z को घर जलाउन उक्साए र B ले एकै साथ चोरी गरे भने, के A ले चोरीलाई उत्प्रेरित गरेकोमा दोषी ठहरिनेछ किनभने चोरी एक अलग कार्य थियो र जलेको सम्भावित परिणाम होइन?
answer: अहँ, चोरीलाई प्रोत्साहन गरेकोमा A दोषी छैन।
question_en: If A instigated B to burn Z's house and B simultaneously committed theft, would A be guilty of abetting the theft given the theft was a distinct act and not a probable consequence of the burning?
answer_en: No, A is not guilty of abetting the theft.

question: यदि A ले B र C लाई डकैतीको उद्देश्यले घरमा घुसाउन उक्साउँछ र उनीहरूले हत्या गर्छन् भने, के A हत्याको लागि जिम्मेवार हुन्छ?
answer: A हत्याको लागि उत्तरदायी छ यदि यो उक्साउने सम्भावित परिणाम हो।
question_en: If A instigates B and C to break into a house for the purpose of robbery and they end up committing murder, is A liable for the murder?
answer_en: A is liable for the murder if it was the probable consequence of the abetment.

question: ख र गलाई लुटपाटको उद्देश्यले घरमा घुसाउन उक्साए र हत्या गरियो भने कुन अवस्थामा A हत्याको लागि जिम्मेवार हुनेछ?
answer: A हत्याको लागि उत्तरदायी छ यदि यो उक्साउने सम्भावित परिणाम हो।
question_en: Under what circumstances would A be liable for the murder if they instigated B and C to break into a house for the purpose of robbery and a murder was committed?
answer_en: A is liable for the murder if it was the probable consequence of the abetment.

question: जब एक दुरुपयोगकर्ताले कार्यलाई उत्प्रेरित गरेको र कार्यको लागि संचयी सजायको लागि उत्तरदायी हुन्छ?
answer: यदि अन्तिम अघिल्लो दफा अन्तर्गत दुव्र्यवहार गर्ने कार्यको लागि उत्तरदायी छ भने दुरुत्साहन गरिएको कार्यको अतिरिक्त गरिएको छ र एक फरक अपराध हो भने, दुरुपयोगकर्ता प्रत्येक अपराधको लागि सजायको लागि जिम्मेवार हुनेछ।
question_en: When is an abettor liable to cumulative punishment for the act abetted and the act done?
answer_en: If the act for which the abettor is liable under the last preceding section is committed in addition to the act abetted and constitutes a distinct offence, the abettor is liable to punishment for each of the offences.

question: प्रत्येक अपराधको लागि कस्ता परिस्थितिहरूमा उब्जनीकर्ता सजायको लागि जिम्मेवार छ?
answer: एक दुव्र्यवहारकर्तालाई उत्प्रेरित कार्यको लागि सञ्चित सजायको लागि उत्तरदायी छ र यदि अन्तिम अघिल्लो खण्ड अन्तर्गत उभयाउने कार्यको लागि उत्तरदायी छ भने उब्जाएको कार्यको अतिरिक्त गरिएको छ र गरिएको कार्यलाई उत्प्रेरित गरिएको छ र फरक अपराध हो।
question_en: Under what circumstances is an abettor liable to punishment for each of the offences?
answer_en: An abettor is liable to cumulative punishment for the act abetted and the act done if the act for which the abettor is liable under the last preceding section is committed in addition to the act abetted and constitutes a distinct offence.

question: यदि B ले A द्वारा उक्साएको संकटको प्रतिरोध गर्दछ र स्वेच्छिक रूपमा संकट कार्यान्वयन गर्ने अधिकारीलाई गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ भने को उत्तरदायी हुन्छ?
answer: B संकटको प्रतिरोध गर्ने अपराध र स्वेच्छाले गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउने अपराधको लागि उत्तरदायी छ। यदि A लाई थाहा थियो कि B लाई संकटको प्रतिरोध गर्दा गम्भीर चोट लाग्ने सम्भावना छ भने, A प्रत्येक अपराधको लागि सजायको लागि उत्तरदायी हुनेछ।
question_en: Who is liable if B resists a distress instigated by A and voluntarily causes grievous hurt to the officer executing the distress?
answer_en: B is liable for both the offence of resisting the distress, and the offence of voluntarily causing grievous hurt. If A knew that B was likely to cause grievous hurt in resisting the distress, A will also be liable to punishment for each of the offences.

question: A द्वारा उत्प्रेरित संकटको प्रतिरोध गर्दा B ले स्वेच्छाले अधिकारीलाई चोट पुर्याएमा, र A लाई B ले हानि पुऱ्याउने सम्भावना छ भन्ने थाहा हुँदा कष्टको प्रतिरोध गर्ने र गम्भीर हानि पुर्‍याउने अपराधको लागि कसलाई जिम्मेवार ठहराइनेछ?
answer: B संकटको प्रतिरोध गर्ने र गम्भीर हानि निम्त्याउने दुवै अपराधहरूको लागि उत्तरदायी छ। थप रूपमा, A ले यी प्रत्येक अपराधको लागि सजायको लागि पनि उत्तरदायी हुनेछ यदि उसलाई B ले हानि पुऱ्याउन सक्ने सम्भावना रहेको थाहा थियो।
question_en: Who will be held responsible for the offence of resisting distress and causing grievous harm when B voluntarily hurts an officer while resisting a distress instigated by A, and when A knows that B is likely to cause harm?
answer_en: B is liable for both the offences of resisting the distress and causing grievous harm. Additionally, A will also be liable to punishment for each of these offences if he knew that B was likely to cause harm.

question: एबेटरले अभिप्रेरित गरेको भन्दा फरक कार्यको कारणले गर्दा हुने प्रभावको लागि बेटरको दायित्व के हो?
answer: जब कुनै कार्यलाई कुनै विशेष प्रभाव पार्ने अभिप्रायले दुव्र्यवहार गर्ने पक्षबाट उत्प्रेरित गरिएको हुन्छ, र कुनै कार्य जसको लागि दुव्र्यवहारको नतिजामा उत्पीडक उत्तरदायी हुन्छ, त्यसले दुव्र्यवहारकर्ताले अभिप्रेत गरेको भन्दा फरक प्रभाव निम्त्याउँछ, उत्पीडकले गरेको प्रभावको लागि उत्तरदायी हुन्छ।
question_en: What is the liability of an abettor for an effect caused by the act abetted different from that intended by the abettor?
answer_en: When an act is abetted with the intention on the part of the abettor of causing a particular effect, and an act for which the abettor is liable in consequence of the abetment, causes a different effect from that intended by the abettor, the abettor is liable for the effect caused.

question: जब एबेटरले अभिप्रेरित गरेको भन्दा फरक प्रभाव निम्त्याउँछ भने एक abettor को दायित्व के हो?
answer: जब कुनै कार्यलाई कुनै विशेष प्रभाव पार्ने अभिप्रायले दुव्र्यवहार गर्ने पक्षबाट उत्प्रेरित गरिएको हुन्छ, र कुनै कार्य जसको लागि दुव्र्यवहारको नतिजामा उत्पीडक उत्तरदायी हुन्छ, त्यसले दुव्र्यवहारकर्ताले अभिप्रेत गरेको भन्दा फरक प्रभाव निम्त्याउँछ, उत्पीडकले गरेको प्रभावको लागि उत्तरदायी हुन्छ।
question_en: What is the liability of an abettor when the act abetted causes a different effect than what was intended by the abettor?
answer_en: When an act is abetted with the intention on the part of the abettor of causing a particular effect, and an act for which the abettor is liable in consequence of the abetment, causes a different effect from that intended by the abettor, the abettor is liable for the effect caused.

question: यदि A ले B लाई Z लाई हानि पुर्‍याउन उक्साउँछ, जसले Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ भने कसलाई जिम्मेवार मानिन्छ?
answer: A उत्तरदायी मानिन्छ यदि उसलाई थाहा थियो कि पीडादायी चोटले मृत्यु हुन सक्छ।
question_en: Who is considered liable if A instigates B to cause harm to Z, which results in Z's death?
answer_en: A is considered liable if he knew that the grievous hurt abetted was likely to cause death.

question: कसलाई जिम्मेवार मानिन्छ यदि उनीहरूलाई थाहा छ कि उनीहरूले गरेको पीडादायी चोटले मृत्युको कारण हुन सक्छ?
answer: A लाई उत्तरदायी मानिन्छ यदि उसले B लाई Z लाई हानि पुर्‍याउन उक्साउँछ, जसले Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ।
question_en: Who is considered liable if they know that the grievous hurt they abetted was likely to cause death?
answer_en: A is considered liable if he instigates B to cause harm to Z, which results in Z's death.

question: जबरजस्ती अपराध भएको बेलामा दुव्र्यवहार गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उत्प्रेरकले त्यस्तो कार्य वा अपराध गरेको मानिन्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for an abettor present when an offence is committed?
answer_en: The abettor is deemed to have committed such act or offence.

question: घटनास्थलमा उपस्थित हुँदा कसले कार्य वा अपराध गरेको मानिन्छ?
answer: उत्प्रेरकले त्यस्तो कार्य वा अपराध गरेको मानिन्छ।
question_en: Who is deemed to have committed an act or offence when they are present at the scene?
answer_en: The abettor is deemed to have committed such act or offence.

question: कसुरमा दुव्र्यवहार गरेमा मृत्युदण्ड वा कसुर नगरे आजीवन कारावासको सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: दुव्र्यवहार गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for abetting an offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life if the offence is not committed?
answer_en: The abettor shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कसैलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन काराबासको सजाय हुने कसूरमा संलग्न व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद र सम्भावित थप सजाय कति हुन्छ, यदि अपराध नगरेको खण्डमा?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि सात वर्षसम्म छ, र उनीहरूलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and potential additional punishment for someone who abets an offence punishable with death or life imprisonment, if the offence is not committed?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is up to seven years, and they may also be liable to a fine.

question: दुव्र्यवहारको कारणले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई हानि पुर्‍याउने कुनै कार्य जसको लागि दुव्र्यवहारकर्ता जिम्मेवार छ भने उक्साउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई चौध वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for an abettor if any act for which the abettor is liable in consequence of the abetment causes harm to any person?
answer_en: The abettor shall be liable to imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to fourteen years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: यदि दुरुत्साहनले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई हानि पुर्‍याउँछ भने, उक्साउने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद र थप दायित्व कति हुन्छ?
answer: दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई चौध वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and additional liability for an abettor if the abetment causes harm to any person?
answer_en: The abettor shall be liable to imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to fourteen years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: A ले B लाई Z हत्या गर्न उक्साए तर अपराध नगरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: A लाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनसक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for A if he instigates B to murder Z but the offence is not committed?
answer_en: A is liable to imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years and also to a fine.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिलाई हत्या गर्न उक्साउने तर अपराध कार्यान्वयन नगर्नेलाई अधिकतम सजाय र थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ ?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवानाको अतिरिक्त सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence and additional penalty for someone who instigates another person to commit murder, but the crime is not executed?
answer_en: The maximum sentence is imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and an additional penalty of a fine.

question: A को दुव्र्यवहारबाट Z लाई कुनै चोट पुगेमा A ले कस्तो सजाय भोग्न सक्छ?
answer: A चौध वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्नेछ।
question_en: If any hurt is done to Z due to A's abetment, what punishment can A face?
answer_en: A will be liable to imprisonment for a term which may extend to fourteen years.

question: Z लाई हानि पुर्‍याएको अभियोगमा दोषी पाइएमा A को अधिकतम कैद अवधि कति हुन्छ?
answer: A लाई चौध वर्ष सम्म कैद हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum duration of imprisonment A could face if he is found guilty of abetting harm to Z?
answer_en: A could face imprisonment that may extend to fourteen years.

question: दशभन्दा बढी सदस्य भएको गुटलाई अर्को गुटमाथि आक्रमण गर्न उक्साउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for instigating a sect consisting of more than ten members to attack another sect?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: दस जनाभन्दा बढी सदस्य भएको गुटलाई अर्को गुटमाथि आक्रमण गर्न उक्साएमा त्यसको सम्भावित परिणाम के हुन्छ ?
answer: सम्भावित नतिजा तीन वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।

answer_en: The potential consequence can be imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय हुने अपराध गर्नको लागि डिजाइन लुकाउनुको परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: यदि कसुर गरेमा व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुन सक्छ। कसुर नगरे तीन वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुनसक्छ । दुबै अवस्थामा, व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the consequence of concealing design to commit offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life?
answer_en: If the offence is committed, the person can be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years. If the offence is not committed, punishment can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years. In either case, the person can also be liable to fine.

question: मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावास सजाय हुने कसुर गर्ने योजना लुकाउने व्यक्तिलाई कसुर गरेको वा नगरेको खण्डमा अधिकतम कैद कति हुन्छ ?
answer: कसुर गरेमा अधिकतम सात वर्षसम्म कैद हुने व्यवस्था छ । कसुर नगरेमा अधिकतम तीन वर्षसम्म कैद हुने व्यवस्था छ । दुबै अवस्थामा, व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term for a person who conceals a design to commit an offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life, if the offence is committed or not?
answer_en: If the offence is committed, the maximum term of imprisonment is up to seven years. If the offence is not committed, the maximum term of imprisonment is up to three years. In both cases, the person can also be liable to a fine.

question: निजामति कर्मचारीले रोक्नु आफ्नो कर्तव्य भएको अपराध गर्ने योजना लुकाएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?

question: कसुर गर्ने ढाँचा लुकाउने निजामती कर्मचारीलाई हुने सजायको बारेमा पाठमा के जानकारी दिइएको छ ?

answer_en: The specific punishment is not provided in the given text.

question: यदि कसैले उनीहरूलाई बहकाउन र अपराध गर्न सजिलो बनाउनको लागि मजिस्ट्रेटलाई डकैतीको बारेमा झूटो जानकारी दियो भने के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि विवरणको अवधिको लागि सात वर्षसम्मको कैद वा कसूर नगरेमा तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि, कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद गर्न अनुमति दिने कानून बमोजिम दण्डनीय छ; र दुबै अवस्थामा जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What happens if someone falsely informs the Magistrate about a dacoity in order to mislead them and facilitate the commission of the offence?
answer_en: The person is punishable under the law which allows for imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or if the offence is not committed, with imprisonment of either description, for a term which may extend to three years; and in either case shall also be liable to fine.

question: कसैलाई बहकाउन र अपराध गर्न सहज बनाउनको लागि मजिस्ट्रेटलाई डकैतीको बारेमा झूटो जानकारी दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि विवरणको अवधिको लागि सात वर्षसम्मको कैद वा कसूर नगरेमा तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि, कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद गर्न अनुमति दिने कानून बमोजिम दण्डनीय छ; र दुबै अवस्थामा जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who falsely informs the Magistrate about a dacoity in order to mislead them and facilitate the commission of the offence?
answer_en: The person is punishable under the law which allows for imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or if the offence is not committed, with imprisonment of either description, for a term which may extend to three years; and in either case shall also be liable to fine.

question: 'कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद' को अर्थ के हो?
answer: प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा 'कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद' शब्द स्पष्ट रूपमा परिभाषित गरिएको छैन। यद्यपि, कानूनी सर्तहरूमा, यसले सामान्यतया कुनै पनि प्रकार वा प्रकारको हुन सक्ने कारावासलाई बुझाउँछ।
question_en: What does 'imprisonment of either description' mean?
answer_en: The term 'imprisonment of either description' is not explicitly defined in the provided text. However, in legal terms, it generally refers to imprisonment that may be of any type or kind.

question: कानुनी शब्द 'कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद' लाई सामान्यतया के बुझिन्छ?
answer: यसले सामान्यतया कारावासलाई बुझाउँछ जुन कुनै पनि प्रकार वा प्रकारको हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What does the legal term 'imprisonment of either description' generally refer to?
answer_en: It generally refers to imprisonment that may be of any type or kind.

question: यदि कुनै सरकारी कर्मचारीले अपराध गर्न सहज बनायो भने त्यसको परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई त्यस्तो कसुरको लागि दिइएको कुनै विवरणको कैद वा त्यस्तो कसुरको लागि तोकिएबमोजिमको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ।
question_en: What are the consequences if a public servant facilitates the commission of an offence?
answer_en: The public servant may be punished with imprisonment of any description provided for the offence, for a term which may extend to one-half of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for that offence, or with both.

question: अपराध गर्न सहजीकरण गर्ने निजामती कर्मचारीलाई के हुनसक्छ सजाय ?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई त्यस्तो कसुरको लागि दिइएको कुनै विवरणको कैद वा त्यस्तो कसुरको लागि तोकिएबमोजिमको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ।
question_en: What is the possible punishment for a public servant who facilitates the commission of an offence?
answer_en: The public servant may be punished with imprisonment of any description provided for the offence, for a term which may extend to one-half of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for that offence, or with both.

question: यदि कसुरमा मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय हुन्छ भने परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: संलग्न पक्षलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What are the consequences if the offence is punishable with death or imprisonment for life?
answer_en: The party involved may receive imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years.

question: मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावास सजाय हुने अपराधमा संलग्न पक्षलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: संलग्न पक्षलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What might happen to the party involved in an offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life?
answer_en: The party involved may receive imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years.

question: अपराध नगरे परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: संलग्न पक्षलाई त्यस्तो कैदको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको एक चौथाइ भागसम्म विस्तार गर्न सक्ने अवधिको लागि कसूरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको कुनै विवरणको कैद वा कसुरको लागि तोकिएको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What are the consequences if the offence is not committed?
answer_en: The party involved may be punished with imprisonment of any description provided for the offence for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of such imprisonment or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both.

question: अपराध नगरेमा संलग्न पक्षलाई के सजाय हुन सक्छ ?
answer: संलग्न पक्षलाई त्यस्तो कैदको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको एक चौथाइ भागसम्म विस्तार गर्न सक्ने अवधिको लागि कसूरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको कुनै विवरणको कैद वा कसुरको लागि तोकिएको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What could be the punishment for the party involved if an offence is not committed?
answer_en: The party involved may be punished with imprisonment of any description provided for the offence for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of such imprisonment or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both.

question: प्रदान गरिएको दृष्टान्त अनुसार गैरकानूनी बहिष्कार के मानिन्छ?
answer: प्रहरी अधिकृतले आफ्नो ज्ञानमा आउन सक्ने लुटपाट गर्ने सबै डिजाइनको जानकारी दिन कानूनी रूपमा बाध्य भएको र कसैले लुटपाट गर्ने योजना बनाएको थाहा पाएर सो अपराध गर्न सहज हुने नियतले त्यस्तो सूचना दिन नछोड्ने ।
question_en: What is considered an illegal omission according to the illustration provided?
answer_en: An officer of police, being legally bound to give information of all designs to commit robbery which may come to his knowledge, and knowing that someone designs to commit robbery, omits to give such information, with intent to facilitate the commission of that offence.

question: नियोजित डकैतीहरूको बारेमा जानकारी दिन को कानूनी रूपमा बाध्य छ र तिनीहरूको तर्फबाट अवैध बहिष्कारलाई के मानिनेछ?
answer: प्रहरी अधिकारीले आफ्नो ज्ञानमा आउन सक्ने लुटपाट गर्ने सबै डिजाइनको जानकारी दिनु कानुनी रूपमा बाध्य हुन्छ। यदि उनीहरूलाई कसैले डकैती गर्ने योजना बनाएको थाहा थियो र जानाजानी यो जानकारी दिएन भने, त्यो अपराधको कमीशनलाई सहजीकरण गर्ने उद्देश्यले अवैध बहिष्कार हुनेछ।
question_en: Who is legally bound to give information about planned robberies and what would be considered an illegal omission on their part?
answer_en: An officer of police is legally bound to give information of all designs to commit robbery which may come to his knowledge. An illegal omission would be if they knew someone planned to commit a robbery and intentionally didn't give this information, with the intent to facilitate the commission of that offence.

question: कैद सजाय हुने अपराध गर्ने योजना लुकाउने कार्यहरू के हुन्?
answer: स्वैच्छिक रूपमा लुकाउने, कुनै कार्य वा गैरकानूनी छाड्ने, त्यस्तो अपराध गर्नको लागि डिजाइनको अस्तित्व, वा त्यस्तो डिजाइनको सम्बन्धमा व्यक्तिलाई गलत हो भनी थाहा भएको कुनै प्रतिनिधित्व गर्ने जस्ता कार्यहरू।
question_en: What actions constitute concealing a design to commit an offence punishable with imprisonment?
answer_en: Actions such as voluntarily concealing, by any act or illegal omission, the existence of a design to commit such offence, or making any representation which the individual knows to be false respecting such design.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा लुकाउनु, कुनै कार्य वा गैरकानूनी छुट, अपराध गर्न डिजाइनको अस्तित्व, वा त्यस्तो डिजाइनको बारेमा कुनै झूटा प्रतिनिधित्व गर्नुको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यी कार्यहरूले कारावासको सजाय योग्य अपराध गर्ने डिजाइन लुकाउने गठन गर्दछ।
question_en: What does voluntarily concealing, by any act or illegal omission, the existence of a design to commit an offence, or making any false representation about such design, imply?
answer_en: These actions constitute concealing a design to commit an offence punishable with imprisonment.

question: आपराधिक षड्यन्त्र को परिभाषा के हो?
answer: एक आपराधिक षड्यन्त्र हो जब दुई वा बढी व्यक्तिहरू गर्न सहमत हुन्छन्, वा गराउँदछ, या त अवैध कार्य वा गैरकानूनी माध्यमबाट गैरकानूनी कार्य। यो सम्झौतालाई आपराधिक षड्यन्त्र मानिन्छ जब सम्म सम्झौता बाहेक केहि कार्यहरु एक वा एक भन्दा बढी पक्षहरु द्वारा यस सम्झौता को पछ्याउन को लागी गरिन्छ। गैरकानूनी कार्य त्यस्तो सम्झौताको अन्तिम वस्तु हो वा त्यो वस्तुको लागि मात्र आकस्मिक हो भन्ने कुरा अत्यावश्यक छ।
question_en: What is the definition of a criminal conspiracy?
answer_en: A criminal conspiracy is when two or more persons agree to do, or cause to be done, either an illegal act or an act which is not illegal by illegal means. This agreement is considered a criminal conspiracy as long as some act besides the agreement is done by one or more parties to such agreement in pursuance thereof. It is immaterial whether the illegal act is the ultimate object of such agreement, or is merely incidental to that object.

question: एक आपराधिक षड्यन्त्र को रूप मा एक कार्य को परिभाषित गर्दछ?
answer: दुई वा दुईभन्दा बढी व्यक्तिहरू गैरकानूनी काम वा गैरकानूनी माध्यमबाट गैरकानूनी कार्य गर्न सहमत भएमा वा गराउने कार्यलाई आपराधिक षड्यन्त्रको रूपमा परिभाषित गर्न सकिन्छ। सम्झौताको अतिरिक्त, कम्तिमा एक पक्षले सम्झौताको पछ्याउन केही कार्य गर्नुपर्दछ। गैरकानूनी कार्य त्यस्तो सम्झौताको अन्तिम वस्तु हो वा त्यो वस्तुको लागि मात्र आकस्मिक हो भन्ने कुराले फरक पार्दैन।
question_en: What defines an act as a criminal conspiracy?
answer_en: An act can be defined as a criminal conspiracy if two or more persons agree to do, or cause to be done, either an illegal act or an act which is not illegal by illegal means. In addition to the agreement, at least one of the parties must perform some act in pursuance of the agreement. It doesn't matter whether the illegal act is the ultimate object of such agreement, or is merely incidental to that object.

question: आपराधिक षड्यन्त्रमा संलग्न व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा दुई वर्ष वा सोभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुने अपराधको सजाय के हो?
answer: यस्तो षड्यन्त्रको सजायको लागि यस संहितामा कुनै स्पष्ट व्यवस्था नभएको खण्डमा उनीहरूले त्यस्तो अपराध गरे सरह सजाय हुन्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a party to a criminal conspiracy to commit an offence punishable with death or rigorous imprisonment for a term of two years or upwards?
answer_en: The punishment is the same as if they had abetted such offence, where no express provision is made in this Code for the punishment of such a conspiracy.

question: विशेष गरी यस्तो षड्यन्त्रको सजायको लागि संहितामा स्पष्ट व्यवस्था नभएको अवस्थामा मृत्युदण्ड वा दुई वर्ष वा सोभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुने कसूर गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: यस्तो अपराध गर्ने आपराधिक षड्यन्त्र गर्ने पक्षलाई सजाय समान छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person who has abetted an offence punishable with death or rigorous imprisonment for a term of two years or upwards, especially when there is no express provision in the Code for the punishment of such a conspiracy?
answer_en: The punishment is the same as for a party to a criminal conspiracy to commit such an offence.

question: आपराधिक षड्यन्त्र गर्ने पक्षलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा दुई वर्ष वा सोभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुने अपराध गर्ने फौजदारी षड्यन्त्र बाहेक के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उनीहरुलाई छ महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a party to a criminal conspiracy other than a criminal conspiracy to commit an offence punishable by death or rigorous imprisonment for a term of two years or upwards?
answer_en: They shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term not exceeding six months, or with fine or with both.

question: आपराधिक षड्यन्त्रमा संलग्न व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा दुई वर्ष वा सोभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुने अपराधमा संलग्न नहुने पक्षलाई अधिकतम कति सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उनीहरुलाई छ महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence for a party to a criminal conspiracy, not involving an offence punishable by death or rigorous imprisonment for a term of two years or upwards?
answer_en: They shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term not exceeding six months, or with fine or with both.

question: कसुर गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय भनेको अपराधको लागि प्रदान गरिएको विवरणको कैद हो, जुन अवधिको लागि यस्तो कैदको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको एक चौथाइसम्म हुन सक्छ, वा अपराधको लागि तोकिएको जरिवाना वा दुवै।
question_en: What is the punishment if the offence is committed?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of the description provided for the offence, for a term which may extend to one-fourth of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both.

question: 'कसुरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको विवरणको कैद, त्यस्तो कैदको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको एक चौथाइसम्म हुन सक्ने अवधिको लागि, वा कसुरमा तोकिएको जरिवाना वा दुवैसँग' भन्ने शब्दले के बुझाउँछ?
answer: यसले अपराध गरेमा सजायलाई जनाउँछ।
question_en: What does the term 'imprisonment of the description provided for the offence, for a term which may extend to one-fourth of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both' refer to?
answer_en: It refers to the punishment if the offence is committed.

question: अपराध नगरे सजाय के हुन्छ ?
answer: यस्तो सजायको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको एक-आठ सम्म कैद वा कसुरमा तोकिएको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if the offence is not committed?
answer_en: The punishment is up to one-eight of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both.

question: लामो समयसम्मको कैदको आठ भागसम्म वा कसुरमा तोकिएबमोजिमको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने गरी नगरेको कसूरलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: कसुर नगरेको खण्डमा यस्तो सजायको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको आठ भागसम्म कैद वा सजाय तोकिएको जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for an offence not committed that involves up to one-eight of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both?
answer_en: The punishment if the offence is not committed is up to one-eight of the longest term of such imprisonment, or with such fine as is provided for the offence, or with both.

question: भारत सरकार विरुद्ध युद्ध गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय मृत्युदण्ड, वा आजीवन कारावास हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for waging war against the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment is death, or imprisonment for life, and the individual shall also be liable to fine.

question: भारत सरकार विरुद्ध युद्ध गर्ने व्यक्तिको नतिजा के हुन्छ?
answer: नतिजा मृत्यु, वा आजीवन कारावास हो, र व्यक्ति पनि जरिवानाको लागि उत्तरदायी हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the consequence for an individual who wages war against the Government of India?
answer_en: The consequence is death, or imprisonment for life, and the individual shall also be liable to fine.

question: भारत सरकार विरुद्ध विद्रोहमा सामेल भएमा 'क' ले के अपराध गरेको छ?
answer: A ले सम्बन्धित खण्डमा परिभाषित अपराध गरेको छ जुन भारत सरकार विरुद्ध युद्ध छेड्ने वा प्रयास गर्नेसँग सम्बन्धित छ।
question_en: What crime has 'A' committed if they join an insurrection against the Government of India?
answer_en: A has committed the offence defined in the respective section which pertains to waging or attempting to wage war against the Government of India.

question: भारत सरकार विरुद्ध युद्ध छेड्ने वा प्रयास गर्ने सम्बन्धमा सम्बन्धित खण्डमा परिभाषित अपराध के हो?
answer: भारत सरकार विरुद्ध विद्रोहमा सामेल भएमा 'क' ले गरेको अपराध हो।
question_en: What is the offence defined in the respective section which pertains to waging or attempting to wage war against the Government of India?
answer_en: It is the crime that 'A' has committed if they join an insurrection against the Government of India.

question: दफा १२१ बमोजिम दण्डनीय अपराध गर्ने षड्यन्त्र गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास, वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो जुन दस वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for conspiring to commit offences punishable by section 121?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description which may extend to ten years, and the individual shall also be liable to fine.

question: आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको कैद र जरिवाना लागु हुने गरी सजायको सजाय के हुन्छ?
answer: यो सजाय धारा १२१ द्वारा दण्डनीय अपराधहरू गर्ने षड्यन्त्रमा लागू हुन्छ।
question_en: What does the punishment of imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description which may extend to ten years, and a fine apply to?
answer_en: This punishment applies to conspiring to commit offences punishable by section 121.

question: षड्यन्त्र रच्नका लागि कुनै कार्य वा गैरकानुनी भुल्नु आवश्यक छ?
answer: होइन, त्यसको पालनामा कुनै कार्य वा गैरकानूनी छुट हुनु आवश्यक छैन।
question_en: Is it necessary for any act or illegal omission to take place to constitute a conspiracy?
answer_en: No, it is not necessary that any act or illegal omission shall take place in pursuance thereof.

question: के यो आवश्यक छ कि कुनै कार्य वा गैरकानूनी बहिष्कार एक षड्यन्त्र गठन गर्न को लागी पछ्याउँदैछ?
answer: होइन, यो आवश्यक छैन।
question_en: Is it necessary that any act or illegal omission shall take place in pursuance thereof to constitute a conspiracy?
answer_en: No, it is not necessary.

question: भारत सरकार विरुद्ध युद्ध गर्ने मनसायले मानिस, हतियार वा गोलाबारुद जम्मा गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: पाठमा यस कार्यको लागि सजायको विशेष उल्लेख गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for collecting men, arms or ammunition with the intention of waging war against the Government of India?
answer_en: The text does not specifically mention the punishment for this action.

question: के पाठमा विशेष गरी भारत सरकार विरुद्ध युद्ध गर्ने मनसायले मानिस, हतियार वा गोलाबारुद जम्मा गर्ने सजायको उल्लेख छ?
answer: होइन, पाठले यस कार्यको लागि सजायको विशेष उल्लेख गर्दैन।
question_en: Does the text specifically mention the punishment for collecting men, arms or ammunition with the intention of waging war against the Government of India?
answer_en: No, the text does not specifically mention the punishment for this action.

question: युद्ध लड्न डिजाइन सहज बनाउन नियतले लुकाउने सजाय के हो?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for concealing with intent to facilitate design to wage war?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: युद्ध लड्न डिजाइनलाई सहज बनाउने उद्देश्यले लुकाएर दोषी पाइएका व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम सजाय र सम्भावित जरिवाना के हो?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय एक अवधिको लागि कैद हो जुन दस वर्षसम्म पुग्न सक्छ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence and potential fine for a person who has been found guilty of concealing with intent to facilitate design to wage war?
answer_en: The maximum sentence is imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and the person is also liable to a fine.

question: कुनै कानुनी शक्तिको प्रयोग गर्न बाध्य पार्ने वा रोक्ने नियतले राष्ट्रपति, गभर्नर इत्यादिलाई आक्रमण गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि विवरणको अवधिको लागि कैद हो जुन सात वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for assaulting President, Governor, etc., with intent to compel or restrain the exercise of any lawful power?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and also liable to fine.

question: कुनै पनि कानुनी शक्तिको प्रयोगलाई बाध्य पार्ने वा रोक्ने उद्देश्यले राष्ट्रपति, राज्यपाल, इत्यादिलाई आक्रमण गर्ने व्यक्तिको लागि अधिकतम जेल सजाय र सम्भावित अतिरिक्त दायित्व के हो?
answer: अधिकतम जेल अवधि सात वर्ष हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum prison term and potential additional liability for someone who assaults a President, Governor, etc., with the intent to compel or restrain the exercise of any lawful power?
answer_en: The maximum prison term is seven years, and the person could also be liable to a fine.

question: धारा 124A अन्तर्गत राजद्रोह के समावेश छ?
answer: देशद्रोह भन्नाले जो कोही पनि शब्दहरूद्वारा, या त बोल्ने वा लेखिएको, वा संकेतहरूद्वारा, वा दृश्यात्मक प्रतिनिधित्वद्वारा, वा अन्यथा, घृणा वा अवहेलना ल्याउने वा ल्याउने प्रयास गर्ने वा उत्तेजित गर्ने वा उत्तेजित गर्ने प्रयास गर्ने भनेर परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What does Sedition, under section 124A, entail?
answer_en: Sedition is defined as whoever by words, either spoken or written, or by signs, or by visible representation, or otherwise, brings or attempts to bring into hatred or contempt, or excites or attempts to excite.

question: धारा 124A अनुसार कुन कार्यहरूलाई राजद्रोहको रूपमा वर्गीकृत गर्न सकिन्छ?
answer: शब्दहरू प्रयोग गर्ने, बोल्ने वा लिखित, चिन्हहरू, वा दृश्यात्मक प्रतिनिधित्व, वा अन्यथा, घृणा वा अवहेलना ल्याउने वा ल्याउने प्रयास गर्ने, उत्तेजित गर्ने वा उत्तेजित गर्ने प्रयास जस्ता कार्यहरूलाई देशद्रोहको रूपमा वर्गीकृत गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What actions can be classified as sedition according to section 124A?
answer_en: Actions such as using words, either spoken or written, or signs, or visible representation, or otherwise, that bring or attempt to bring into hatred or contempt, or excite or attempt to excite can be classified as sedition.

question: दिइएको स्पष्टीकरण अनुसार 'असन्तुष्टि' अभिव्यक्तिले के समावेश गर्दछ?
answer: 'असन्तुष्टि' अभिव्यक्तिले अवफादारी र शत्रुताका सबै भावनाहरू समावेश गर्दछ।
question_en: What does the expression 'disaffection' include as per the explanation given?
answer_en: The expression 'disaffection' includes disloyalty and all feelings of enmity.

question: 'असन्तुष्टि' अभिव्यक्तिले कस्ता भावनाहरू समावेश गर्दछ?
answer: 'असन्तुष्टि' अभिव्यक्तिले अवफादारी र शत्रुताका सबै भावनाहरू समावेश गर्दछ।
question_en: What feelings does the expression 'disaffection' include?
answer_en: The expression 'disaffection' includes disloyalty and all feelings of enmity.

question: भारतमा कानूनद्वारा स्थापित सरकारप्रति असन्तुष्टिको सजाय के हो?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास हो, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा तीन वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा जरिवाना।
question_en: What is the punishment for disaffection towards the Government established by law in India?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life, to which fine may be added, or with imprisonment which may extend to three years, to which fine may be added, or with fine.

question: भारतमा कानूनद्वारा स्थापित सरकारप्रति असन्तुष्टिको अपराधमा सम्भावित जरिवाना सहितको अधिकतम सजाय के हो?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय आजीवन कारावास हो, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा तीन वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा जरिवाना।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence, including potential fines, that can be given for crimes of disaffection towards the Government established by law in India?
answer_en: The maximum sentence is imprisonment for life, to which fine may be added, or imprisonment which may extend to three years, to which fine may be added, or with fine.

question: कानुनी माध्यमबाट आफ्नो परिवर्तन प्राप्त गर्ने उद्देश्यले सरकारका कदमहरूप्रति असन्तुष्टि व्यक्त गर्ने टिप्पणीहरू यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध हो?
answer: होइन, घृणा, अवहेलना वा असन्तुष्टिलाई उत्तेजित वा उत्तेजित गर्ने प्रयास नगरी कानुनी माध्यमबाट आफ्नो परिवर्तन प्राप्त गर्ने उद्देश्यले सरकारका कदमहरूप्रति असन्तुष्टि व्यक्त गर्ने टिप्पणीहरू यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध मान्दैनन्।
question_en: Do comments expressing disapprobation of the measures of the Government with a view to obtain their alteration by lawful means constitute an offence under this section?
answer_en: No, comments expressing disapprobation of the measures of the Government with a view to obtain their alteration by lawful means, without exciting or attempting to excite hatred, contempt or disaffection, do not constitute an offence under this section.

question: घृणा, अवहेलना, वा असन्तुष्टि नउठाउने गरी कानुनी रूपमा परिवर्तन गर्ने उद्देश्यले सरकारी उपायहरूको अस्वीकृति व्यक्त गर्ने टिप्पणीहरू यस खण्ड अन्तर्गत अपराध हो?
answer: होइन, तिनीहरूले यस खण्ड अन्तर्गत अपराध गठन गर्दैनन्।
question_en: Do comments that express disapproval of government measures, with the intent to lawfully alter them without inciting hatred, contempt, or disaffection, constitute an offense under this section?
answer_en: No, they do not constitute an offense under this section.

question: भारत सरकारसँग गठबन्धनमा कुनै पनि एसियाली शक्तिसँग युद्ध गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास हो, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा जरिवानाको साथ।
question_en: What is the punishment for waging war against any Asiatic Power in alliance with the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life, to which fine may be added, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, to which fine may be added, or with fine.

question: आजीवन कारावास, सम्भावित थप जरिवाना, वा सम्भावित थप जरिवाना सहित सात वर्षसम्म कैद, वा भारत सरकारसँग गठबन्धनमा एसियाटिक पावर विरुद्ध युद्ध गर्ने सन्दर्भमा जरिवाना समावेश गर्ने दण्ड के हो?
answer: भारत सरकारसँग गठबन्धनमा कुनै पनि एसियाटिक शक्ति विरुद्ध युद्ध गर्ने सजाय आजीवन कारावास हो, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि विवरणको कैद, जसमा जरिवाना थप गर्न सकिन्छ, वा जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the penalty that includes imprisonment for life, a potential added fine, or imprisonment up to seven years with a potential added fine, or a fine in the context of waging war against an Asiatic Power in alliance with the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment for waging war against any Asiatic Power in alliance with the Government of India is imprisonment for life, to which fine may be added, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, to which fine may be added, or with fine.

question: के सरकारको प्रशासनिक वा अन्य कार्यप्रति असन्तुष्टि व्यक्त गर्ने टिप्पणी यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध हो?
answer: होइन, घृणा, अवहेलना वा असन्तुष्टि उत्तेजित गर्ने वा उत्तेजित गर्ने प्रयास नगरी सरकारको प्रशासनिक वा अन्य कार्यप्रति असन्तुष्टि व्यक्त गर्ने टिप्पणीहरू यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध मान्दैन।
question_en: Do comments expressing disapprobation of the administrative or other action of the Government constitute an offence under this section?
answer_en: No, comments expressing disapprobation of the administrative or other action of the Government without exciting or attempting to excite hatred, contempt or disaffection, do not constitute an offence under this section.

question: घृणा, घृणा वा असन्तुष्टिलाई उत्तेजित वा उत्तेजित गर्ने प्रयास नगरी सरकारको प्रशासनिक वा अन्य कार्यप्रति असन्तुष्टि व्यक्त गर्नु यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध मानिन्छ?
answer: होइन, यो खण्ड अन्तर्गत अपराध मानिने छैन।
question_en: Is it considered an offence under this section to express disapprobation of the administrative or other action of the Government without exciting or attempting to excite hatred, contempt or disaffection?
answer_en: No, it is not considered an offence under this section.

question: भारत सरकारसँग गठबन्धन वा शान्तिमा रहेको कुनै पनि शक्तिको भूमिमा अवमूल्यन गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र त्यस्तो ह्रास गर्न प्रयोग गरिएको वा प्रयोग गर्न खोजिएको कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति जफत र जरिवाना गर्न पनि योग्य हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for anyone who commits depredation on the territories of any Power in alliance or at peace with the Government of India?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine and to forfeiture of any property used or intended to be used in committing such depredation, or acquired by such depredation.

question: भारत सरकारसँग गठबन्धन वा शान्तिमा रहेको शक्तिको क्षेत्रमा अवमूल्यन गर्ने व्यक्तिको नतिजा के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र त्यस्तो ह्रास गर्न प्रयोग गरिएको वा प्रयोग गर्न खोजिएको कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति जफत र जरिवाना गर्न पनि योग्य हुनेछ।
question_en: What are the consequences for a person who commits depredation on territories of a Power in alliance or at peace with the Government of India?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine and to forfeiture of any property used or intended to be used in committing such depredation, or acquired by such depredation.

question: दफा 125 र 126 मा उल्लिखित कुनै कसुरमा लिइएको थाहा पाएर कुनै सम्पत्ति प्राप्त गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र यसरी प्राप्त भएको सम्पत्ति जफत र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for anyone who receives any property knowing it to have been taken in the commission of any of the offences mentioned in sections 125 and 126?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine and to forfeiture of the property so received.

question: दफा १२५ र १२६ अन्तर्गत अपराध गर्दा लिइएको सम्पत्ति जानीजानी प्राप्त गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र यसरी प्राप्त भएको सम्पत्ति जफत र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person who knowingly receives property that was taken during the commission of crimes under sections 125 and 126?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine and to forfeiture of the property so received.

question: राज्य कैदी वा युद्धबन्दीलाई स्वेच्छाले भाग्न दिने सरकारी कर्मचारीले गरेको अपराध के हो?
answer: सार्वजनिक सेवकले स्वेच्छाले राज्य वा युद्ध कैदीलाई भाग्न दिने अपराध गरेको छ।
question_en: What is the offense committed by a public servant who voluntarily allows a State prisoner or prisoner of war to escape?
answer_en: The public servant has committed the offense of voluntarily allowing a prisoner of state or war to escape.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकले स्वेच्छाले राज्य वा युद्ध कैदीलाई भाग्न अनुमति दिंदा गरेको अपराधलाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: राज्य कैदी वा युद्ध कैदीलाई भाग्न स्वेच्छाले अनुमति दिने अपराध भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is the term for the offense committed when a public servant voluntarily allows a prisoner of state or war to escape?
answer_en: The offense is called voluntarily allowing a State prisoner or prisoner of war to escape.

question: राज्यका कैदी वा युद्धबन्दीलाई लापरवाहीपूर्वक भाग्न दिने निजामती कर्मचारीलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: निजामति कर्मचारीलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a public servant who negligently allows a state prisoner or prisoner of war to escape?
answer_en: The public servant shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: राज्यका कैदी वा युद्धबन्दीलाई लापरवाहीपूर्वक भाग्न दिने सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई के शब्द र अतिरिक्त दायित्व हो?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the term and additional liability for a public servant who negligently allows a state prisoner or prisoner of war to escape?
answer_en: The public servant may be imprisoned for up to three years and is also liable to fine.

question: कुनै राज्य कैदी वा युद्धबन्दीलाई कानुनी हिरासतबाट भाग्न सहयोग गर्ने वा सहयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for aiding or assisting any state prisoner or prisoner of war in escaping from lawful custody?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कानुनी हिरासतबाट भाग्न राज्य कैदी वा युद्ध कैदीलाई सहायता वा सहयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिको लागि सम्भावित परिणामहरू के हुन्?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What are the potential consequences for someone who aids or assists a state prisoner or prisoner of war in escaping from lawful custody?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: विद्रोहमा उक्साउने वा सैनिक, नाविक वा वायुयानलाई आफ्नो कर्तव्यबाट बहकाउने प्रयास गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for abetting mutiny or attempting to seduce a soldier, sailor or airman from his duty?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: विद्रोह गराउने वा सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुयानलाई आफ्नो कर्तव्यबाट बहकाउने प्रयास गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई कानुनबमोजिम के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for a person who abets mutiny or tries to seduce a soldier, sailor or airman from his duty, according to the law?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: राज्य कैदी वा युद्ध कैदीको लागि कानुनी हिरासतबाट भाग्नुलाई के मानिन्छ?
answer: एक राज्य कैदी वा युद्ध कैदी, जसलाई भारतको निश्चित सीमा भित्र आफ्नो प्यारोलमा फरार हुन अनुमति दिइएको छ, यदि उसले फरार रहन अनुमति दिएको सीमा भन्दा बाहिर जान्छ भने कानुनी हिरासतबाट भाग्ने भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is considered an escape from lawful custody for a state prisoner or prisoner of war?
answer_en: A State prisoner or prisoner of war, who is permitted to be at large on his parole within certain limits in India, is said to escape from lawful custody if he goes beyond the limits within which he is allowed to be at large.

question: भारतमा, कहिले राज्य कैदी वा प्यारोलमा युद्ध कैदी कानुनी हिरासतबाट भागेको भनिन्छ?
answer: एक राज्य कैदी वा युद्ध कैदी, जसलाई भारतको निश्चित सीमा भित्र आफ्नो प्यारोलमा फरार हुन अनुमति दिइएको छ, यदि उसले फरार रहन अनुमति दिएको सीमा भन्दा बाहिर जान्छ भने कानुनी हिरासतबाट भाग्ने भनिन्छ।
question_en: In India, when is a state prisoner or prisoner of war on parole said to have escaped from lawful custody?
answer_en: A State prisoner or prisoner of war, who is permitted to be at large on his parole within certain limits in India, is said to escape from lawful custody if he goes beyond the limits within which he is allowed to be at large.

question: भारत सरकारको सेना, नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा अफिसर, सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाले विद्रोह गर्न सहयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सो दुव्र्यवहारको फलस्वरूप विद्रोह भएमा उक्त व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद सजाय र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for whoever abets the committing of mutiny by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman, in the Army, Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: If mutiny be committed in consequence of that abetment, the person will be punished with death or with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: यदि कुनै व्यक्ति भारत सरकारको सेना, नौसेना वा वायु सेनामा विद्रोहलाई उक्साउने दोषी पाइन्छ र उनीहरूको उक्साहटको परिणामस्वरूप विद्रोह गरिएको छ भने यसको परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the consequence if a person is found guilty of abetting mutiny in the Army, Navy or Air Force of the Government of India and mutiny is committed as a result of their abetment?
answer_en: The person will be punished with death or with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: भारत सरकारको सेना, नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा अफिसर, सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाले आक्रमण गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ, आफ्नो कार्यालयको कार्यान्वयनमा रहेको कुनै उच्च अधिकारीलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for whoever abets an assault by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman, in the Army, Navy or Air Force of the Government of India, on any superior officer being in the execution of his office?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: भारत सरकारको सेना, नौसेना वा वायुसेनाका अधिकारी, सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाले आफ्नो कार्यालयको कार्य सम्पादनको क्रममा उच्च अधिकारीमाथि आक्रमण गर्न सहयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद र थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि तीन वर्ष हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and additional penalties for someone who aids an assault by an officer, soldier, sailor, or airman, in the Army, Navy, or Air Force of the Government of India, on a superior officer during the execution of his office?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is three years, and the person may also be liable to a fine.

question: व्यक्तिहरू कुन कार्यहरूको अधीनमा छन्?
answer: व्यक्तिहरू सेना अधिनियम, सेना अधिनियम, 1950 (1950 को 46), नौसेना अनुशासन अधिनियम, भारतीय नौसेना (अनुशासन) अधिनियम, 1934 (34 को 1934), वायु सेना अधिनियम वा वायु सेना अधिनियम, 1950 (1950 को 45) को अधीनमा छन्।
question_en: Which acts are persons subject to?
answer_en: Persons are subject to the Army Act, the Army Act, 1950 (46 of 1950), the Naval Discipline Act, the Indian Navy (Discipline) Act,1934 (34 of 1934), the Air Force Act or the Air Force Act, 1950 (45 of 1950).

question: आर्मी एक्ट, आर्मी एक्ट, १९५० (१९५० को ४६), नौसेना अनुशासन ऐन, भारतीय नौसेना (अनुशासन) ऐन, १९३४ (३४ को १९३४), वायुसेना ऐन र वायुसेना ऐन, १९५० (१९५० को ४५) के हुन्?
answer: यी व्यक्तिहरू अधीनमा रहेका कार्यहरू हुन्।
question_en: What are the Army Act, the Army Act, 1950 (46 of 1950), the Naval Discipline Act, the Indian Navy (Discipline) Act,1934 (34 of 1934), the Air Force Act and the Air Force Act, 1950 (45 of 1950)?
answer_en: These are the acts that persons are subject to.

question: 'अधिकारी', 'सिपाही', 'नाविक' र 'एयरम्यान' शब्दहरू के द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरियो?
answer: अफिसर, सिपाही, नाविक र वायुयान शब्दहरू 1927 को ऐन 10, 1870 को ऐन 27, र 1934 को ऐन 35 सहित विभिन्न ऐन र संशोधनहरूद्वारा प्रतिस्थापित भएको देखिन्छ।
question_en: What were the words 'officer', 'soldier', 'sailor' and 'airman' substituted by?
answer_en: The words officer, soldier, sailor and airman appear to have been substituted by various Acts and Amendments, including Act 10 of 1927, Act 27 of 1870, and Act 35 of 1934.

question: 'अधिकारी', 'सिपाही', 'नाविक' र 'एयरम्यान' शब्दहरू कुन ऐन र संशोधनहरूद्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरियो?
answer: अफिसर, सिपाही, नाविक र वायुयान शब्दहरू 1927 को ऐन 10, 1870 को ऐन 27, र 1934 को ऐन 35 द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित भएको देखिन्छ।
question_en: Which Acts and Amendments were the words 'officer', 'soldier', 'sailor' and 'airman' substituted by?
answer_en: The words officer, soldier, sailor and airman appear to have been substituted by Act 10 of 1927, Act 27 of 1870, and Act 35 of 1934.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा उच्च अधिकारीलाई आक्रमण गर्दा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायु सेनामा उच्च अधिकारीलाई आक्रमण गर्ने सजाय सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कैद र जरिवाना हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for assaulting a superior officer in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment for assaulting a superior officer in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and a fine.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा उच्च अधिकारीलाई आक्रमण गरेमा कैदको अधिकतम अवधि र थप जरिवाना कति छ?
answer: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा उच्च अधिकारीलाई आक्रमण गरेमा अधिकतम लम्बाइ सात वर्ष कैद र थप जरिवाना छ।
question_en: What is the maximum length of imprisonment and the additional penalty for assaulting a superior officer in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The maximum length of imprisonment for assaulting a superior officer in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India is seven years, and the additional penalty is a fine.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाको परित्यागको लागि के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाको परित्याग गर्न उक्साउने सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for abetting the desertion of a soldier, sailor or airman in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment for abetting the desertion of a soldier, sailor or airman in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा सिपाही, नाविक, वा वायुसेनाको परित्याग गरेको अभियोगमा दोषी ठहरिएमा कैदको अधिकतम अवधि, र सम्भावित अतिरिक्त दण्डहरू के हो?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि दुई वर्ष हो र दोषीलाई जरिवाना वा कैद र जरिवाना दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment, and possible additional penalties, for someone convicted of abetting the desertion of a soldier, sailor, or airman in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is two years, and the convict may also be subject to a fine or both imprisonment and fine.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनाबाट मरुभूमिमा बस्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनाबाट एक मरुभूमिलाई शरण दिने सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि वा जरिवाना वा दुवैको सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for harbouring a deserter from the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment for harbouring a deserter from the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine or with both.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनाबाट डेजर्टरलाई शरण दिएकोमा दोषी पाइएमा अधिकतम सजाय र सम्भावित जरिवाना के हो?
answer: यस अपराधमा दोषी पाइने व्यक्तिको लागि अधिकतम सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र उनीहरूलाई जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence and possible fine for someone who is found guilty of harbouring a deserter from the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The maximum sentence for someone found guilty of this crime is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, and they may also be subjected to a fine.

question: मरुभूमिलाई आश्रय दिने नियमको अपवाद के हो?
answer: मरुभूमिलाई आश्रय दिने नियमको अपवाद भनेको पत्नीले आफ्नो पतिलाई बन्दरगाह दिएको बेला हो।
question_en: What is the exception to the rule about harbouring a deserter?
answer_en: The exception to the rule about harbouring a deserter is when the harbour is given by a wife to her husband.

question: नियम तोडे बिना मरुभूमिलाई कसले बन्दरगाह दिन सक्छ?
answer: एउटी पत्नीले नियम तोडे बिना आफ्नो पतिलाई बन्दरगाह दिन सक्छ।
question_en: Who can give harbour to a deserter without breaking the rule?
answer_en: A wife can give harbour to her husband without breaking the rule.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनाबाट अनजानमा एक मरुभूमिलाई बन्दरगाह गर्ने व्यापारी जहाजको मालिक वा व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनाबाट अनजानमा एकजना मरुभूमिलाई बन्दरगाह गर्ने व्यापारी जहाजको मालिक वा व्यक्तिलाई त्यस्तो लुकाउने कुरा थाहा भएमा तर आफ्नो कर्तव्यको बेवास्ता वा जहाजमा अनुशासनको अभावको कारणले पाँच सय रुपैयाँभन्दा बढी जरिवाना हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for a master or person in charge of a merchant vessel who unknowingly harbors a deserter from the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The master or person in charge of a merchant vessel who unknowingly harbors a deserter from the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India is liable to a penalty not exceeding five hundred rupees, if he might have known of such concealment but for some neglect of his duty or some want of discipline on board of the vessel.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनाबाट अनजानमा एक जना मरुभूमिलाई आश्रय दिएमा पाँच सय रुपैयाँभन्दा बढीको जरिवाना को लागी जिम्मेवार छ?
answer: यदि कुनै व्यापारी जहाजको मालिक वा व्यक्तिले यस्तो लुकाउने कुरा थाहा पाएको हुन सक्छ तर आफ्नो कर्तव्यको बेवास्ता गरेको वा जहाजको बोर्डमा अनुशासनको चाहनाको लागि यो दण्डको लागि उत्तरदायी छ।
question_en: Who is liable to a penalty not exceeding five hundred rupees for unknowingly harboring a deserter from the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The master or person in charge of a merchant vessel is liable to this penalty if he might have known of such concealment but for some neglect of his duty or some want of discipline on board of the vessel.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाले अवज्ञाको कार्यलाई उक्साएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा सजाय निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for abetting an act of insubordination by a soldier, sailor or airman in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India?
answer_en: The punishment is not specified in the provided text.

question: भारत सरकारको नौसेना वा वायुसेनामा सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनाले अवज्ञाकारी कार्यलाई उक्साउने दण्ड प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छ?
answer: होइन, दिइएको पाठमा सजाय तोकिएको छैन।
question_en: Is the punishment for abetting an act of insubordination by a soldier, sailor or airman in the Navy or Air Force of the Government of India specified in the provided text?
answer_en: No, the punishment is not specified in the provided text.

question: भारत सरकारको सैन्य, नौसेना वा हवाई सेवामा नभएको व्यक्तिले आफू त्यस्तो सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुयान हो भनी विश्वास गर्न सकोस् भनी सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुयानले प्रयोग गरेको कुनै लुगा वा टोकन जस्तो लुगा लगाएको वा बोकेकोलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय तीन महिनासम्मको अवधिको लागि वर्णनको कैद हो, वा एक अनिर्दिष्ट रकमसम्म पुग्न सक्ने जरिवाना हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone not in the Military, Naval or Air service of the Government of India, who wears any garb or carries any token resembling any garb or token used by a soldier, sailor or airman with the intention that it may be believed that he is such a soldier, sailor or airman?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to an unspecified amount.

question: भारतमा कपटपूर्ण नियतले सिपाही, नाविक वा हवाईजहाजको पहिरन जस्तो देखिने टोकन लगाउने वा बोक्ने नागरिकलाई कैद वा जरिवानाको अवधि कति हुन्छ?
answer: तीन महिनासम्म कैद वा तोकिएको रकमसम्मको जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the duration of imprisonment or the extent of fine for a civilian who wears or carries any token resembling a soldier, sailor or airman's garb with deceitful intentions in India?
answer_en: The imprisonment can extend up to three months, or a fine which may extend to an unspecified amount.

question: भारतीय समुद्री सेवामा पूर्वगामी खण्डहरूको आवेदनलाई के भयो?
answer: यसलाई संशोधन अधिनियम, 1934 द्वारा खारेज गरिएको थियो।
question_en: What happened to the application of foregoing sections to the Indian Marine Service?
answer_en: It was repealed by the Amending Act, 1934.

question: कुन ऐनले भारतीय समुद्री सेवामा पूर्वगामी खण्डहरूको आवेदन खारेज गर्‍यो?
answer: संशोधन अधिनियम, १९३४।
question_en: Which act repealed the application of foregoing sections to the Indian Marine Service?
answer_en: The Amending Act, 1934.

question: यस अध्यायमा परिभाषित कुनै पनि अपराधको लागि यस संहिता संहिता अन्तर्गत कसलाई सजाय दिइँदैन?
answer: सेना ऐन, आर्मी ऐन, १९५०, नौसेना अनुशासन ऐन, भारतीय नौसेना (अनुशासन) ऐन, १९३४, वायुसेना ऐन वा वायुसेना ऐन, १९५० को अधीनमा रहेका कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई यस अध्यायमा परिभाषित कुनै पनि अपराधको लागि यो संहिता संहिता अन्तर्गत सजाय दिइने छैन।
question_en: Who is not subject to punishment under this Code Code for any of the offences defined in this Chapter?
answer_en: No person subject to the Army Act, the Army Act, 1950, the Naval Discipline Act, the Indian Navy (Discipline) Act, 1934, the Air Force Act or the Air Force Act, 1950, is subject to punishment under this Code Code for any of the offences defined in this Chapter.

question: सेना ऐन, आर्मी ऐन, १९५०, नौसेना अनुशासन ऐन, भारतीय नौसेना (अनुशासन) ऐन, १९३४, वायुसेना ऐन वा वायुसेना ऐन, १९५० को अधीनमा रहेका व्यक्तिहरू यस अध्यायमा परिभाषित कुनै पनि अपराधका लागि यस संहिता संहिता अन्तर्गत सजायको अधीनमा छन्?
answer: छैन
question_en: Are persons subject to the Army Act, the Army Act, 1950, the Naval Discipline Act, the Indian Navy (Discipline) Act, 1934, the Air Force Act or the Air Force Act, 1950, subject to punishment under this Code Code for any of the offences defined in this Chapter?
answer_en: No

question: 'गैरकानूनी सभा' ​​भनेर के भनिन्छ?
answer: पाँच वा सोभन्दा बढी व्यक्तिको भेलालाई ‘गैरकानूनी भेला’ भनिन्छ यदि त्यस्तो सभा गठन गर्ने व्यक्तिको साझा उद्देश्य आपराधिक बलद्वारा अतिक्रमण गर्ने, कुनै कानूनको कार्यान्वयनको प्रतिरोध गर्ने, कुनै कुकर्म वा आपराधिक अतिक्रमण गर्ने, आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गरी कुनै सम्पत्ति कब्जा वा कब्जा गर्ने वा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई कानुनी रूपमा वा गर्न नपर्ने काम गर्न बाध्य पार्ने हो। गर्नु
question_en: What is designated as an 'unlawful assembly'?
answer_en: An assembly of five or more persons is designated an 'unlawful assembly' if the common object of the persons composing that assembly is to overawe by criminal force, resist the execution of any law, commit any mischief or criminal trespass, take or obtain possession of any property by means of criminal force, or compel any person to do what he is not legally bound to do, or to omit to do what he is legally entitled to do.

question: 'गैरकानूनी सभा' ​​बनाउने व्यक्तिहरूको साझा उद्देश्य के हो?
answer: ‘गैरकानूनी भेला’ गर्ने व्यक्तिको साझा उद्देश्य भनेको आपराधिक बलद्वारा अतित हुनु, कुनै कानूनको कार्यान्वयनको प्रतिरोध गर्नु, कुनै कुकर्म वा आपराधिक अतिक्रमण गर्नु, आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गरी कुनै सम्पत्ति कब्जा वा कब्जा गर्नु वा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई आफूले कानुनी रूपमा बाध्य नभएको काम गर्न बाध्य पार्नु वा आफूले कानुनी रूपमा गर्न नपर्ने काम नगर्न बाध्य पार्नु हो।
question_en: What is the common object of persons composing an 'unlawful assembly'?
answer_en: The common object of the persons composing an 'unlawful assembly' is to overawe by criminal force, resist the execution of any law, commit any mischief or criminal trespass, take or obtain possession of any property by means of criminal force, or compel any person to do what he is not legally bound to do, or to omit to do what he is legally entitled to do.

question: जम्मा भइसकेपछि सभा गैरकानुनी भयो भने के हुन्छ?
answer: भेला हुँदा गैरकानूनी नभएको सभा पछि गैरकानूनी सभा बन्न सक्छ।
question_en: What happens if an assembly becomes unlawful after it has assembled?
answer_en: An assembly which was not unlawful when it assembled, may subsequently become an unlawful assembly.

question: भेला हुँदा गैरकानूनी नभएको सभालाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: भेला भइसकेपछि सभा गैरकानूनी सभा बन्न सक्छ।
question_en: What may happen to an assembly that was not unlawful when it assembled?
answer_en: An assembly may subsequently become an unlawful assembly after it has assembled.

question: गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य कसलाई मानिन्छ?
answer: कुनै पनि सभालाई गैरकानूनी सभा बनाउने तथ्यहरू थाहा पाएर जानाजानी सभामा सामेल हुने वा त्यसमा निरन्तरता दिने व्यक्तिलाई गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य भनिन्छ।
question_en: Who is considered a member of an unlawful assembly?
answer_en: Whoever, being aware of facts which render any assembly an unlawful assembly, intentionally joins that assembly, or continues in it, is said to be a member of an unlawful assembly.

question: कुन कार्य वा ज्ञानले व्यक्तिलाई गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य बनाउँछ?
answer: कुनै पनि सभालाई गैरकानूनी सभा बनाउने तथ्यहरू थाहा पाएर, जानाजानी सभामा सामेल भएमा वा त्यसमा निरन्तरता दिईरहँदा कुनै व्यक्ति गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य मानिन्छ।
question_en: What actions or knowledge would make a person a member of an unlawful assembly?
answer_en: A person is considered a member of an unlawful assembly if they, being aware of facts which render any assembly an unlawful assembly, intentionally join that assembly, or continue in it.

question: गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य भए के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य हुने व्यक्तिलाई छ महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for being a member of an unlawful assembly?
answer_en: Whoever is a member of an unlawful assembly, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य भएको व्यक्तिलाई कैद वा सजायको अधिकतम अवधि कति हुन्छ?
answer: गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य भएको व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम छ महिनासम्म कैद र जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment or penalty for someone who is a member of an unlawful assembly?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment for someone who is a member of an unlawful assembly may extend to six months, and they may also be fined, or both.

question: घातक हतियार लिएर गैरकानूनी सभामा सहभागी भएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कुनै पनि घातक हतियार लिएर वा कसूरको हतियारको रूपमा प्रयोग गरी मृत्यु हुन सक्ने कुनै पनि कुराले गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य भए निजलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if a person joins an unlawful assembly armed with a deadly weapon?
answer_en: Whoever, being armed with any deadly weapon, or with anything which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death, is a member of an unlawful assembly, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: घातक हतियार वा मृत्यु निम्त्याउन सक्ने कुनै पनि कुरा लिएर गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्य भएको व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for a person who is a member of an unlawful assembly while armed with a deadly weapon or anything likely to cause death?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: 1887 को अधिनियम 14 द्वारा लागू गरिएको छ। ७९?
answer: यस ऐनको विवरण पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।

answer_en: The details of this act are not provided in the text.

answer: होइन, यस ऐनको विवरण पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।

answer_en: No, the details of this act are not provided in the text.

question: 1927 को ऐन 10 द्वारा के प्रतिस्थापन गरिएको थियो, s। 2 र पहिलो Sch.?
answer: यो "रानी को सेना को नौसेना को लागि युद्ध को कुनै लेख, वा यस्तो सेना वा नौसेना को कुनै भाग को लागी" को लागी प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो।

answer_en: It was substituted for “any Articles of War for the Army of Navy of the Queen, or for any part of such Army or Navy”.

question: "रानीको नौसेनाको सेना, वा त्यस्तो सेना वा नौसेनाको कुनै भागको लागि युद्धको कुनै लेख" को लागि के प्रतिस्थापित गरियो?
answer: यो 1927 को अधिनियम 10 द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। 2 र पहिलो Sch।
question_en: What was substituted for “any Articles of War for the Army of Navy of the Queen, or for any part of such Army or Navy”?
answer_en: It was substituted by Act 10 of 1927, s. 2 and the First Sch.

question: 1951 को अधिनियम 3 द्वारा के प्रतिस्थापन गरिएको थियो, s। ३ र Sch.?
answer: यसलाई "भारतीय सेना अधिनियम, 1911" र "भारतीय वायु सेना अधिनियम, 1932" को लागि प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो।
question_en: What substitution was made by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Sch.?
answer_en: It was substituted for “the Indian Army Act, 1911” and “the Indian Air Force Act, 1932”.

question: कुन कार्यहरू 1951 को अधिनियम 3 द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। ३ र Sch.?
answer: "भारतीय सेना अधिनियम, 1911" र "भारतीय वायु सेना अधिनियम, 1932" प्रतिस्थापित गरियो।

answer_en: “The Indian Army Act, 1911” and “the Indian Air Force Act, 1932” were substituted.

question: 1934 को अधिनियम 35 द्वारा सम्मिलित गरिएको थियो, s। २ र Sch.?

answer: यस ऐनको विवरण पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।

answer_en: The words “or that Act as modified by” were omitted.

question: नौसेना ऐन, 1957 (1957 को 62) को सन्दर्भमा पाठमा के विवरणहरू छुटेका छन्?
answer: नौसेना ऐन, 1957 (1957 को 62) को विशेष पक्ष वा अंश हामीले अब उल्लेख गर्नुपर्छ पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।

answer_en: The specific aspect or part of the Navy Act, 1957 (62 of 1957) we should now refer to is not provided in the text.

answer: यो "वा वायु सेना अधिनियम" को लागि प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो।

answer_en: It was Act 14 of 1932, s. 130 and Sch.

question: 1927 को ऐन 10 द्वारा के प्रतिस्थापन गरिएको थियो, s। 2 र पहिलो Sch.?

answer: 1927 को अधिनियम 10, एस। 2 र पहिलो Sch। प्रतिस्थापन गरे

answer_en: Act 10 of 1927, s. 2 and the First Sch. made the substitution

question: एस द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित के थियो। 2 र पहिलो Sch., ibid.,?
answer: यो "वा नौसेना" को लागि प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो।

question: के अनुसार "वा नौसेना" प्रतिस्थापित गरियो। 2 र पहिलो Sch., ibid.,?
answer: यसलाई एस द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। 2 र पहिलो Sch।, ibid।,।
question_en: What was “or Naval” replaced with according to s. 2 and the First Sch., ibid.,?
answer_en: It was substituted by s. 2 and the First Sch., ibid.,.

question: A.O. 1950 द्वारा के प्रतिस्थापन गरिएको थियो?
answer: यसलाई "रानी" र "केन्द्रीय वा कुनै प्रान्तीय सरकार वा व्यवस्थापिका" को लागि प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो।
question_en: What substitution was made by the A. O. 1950?
answer_en: It was substituted for “Queen” and “the Central or any Provincial Government or Legislature”.

question: A. O. 1950 द्वारा "रानी" र "केन्द्रीय वा कुनै प्रान्तीय सरकार वा व्यवस्थापिका" को लागि के प्रतिस्थापित गरियो?

question_en: What was substituted for “Queen” and “the Central or any Provincial Government or Legislature” by A. O. 1950?
answer_en: It was the A. O. 1950 substitution

question: तितरबितर गर्न आदेश भएको थाहा पाएर गैरकानूनी सभामा सम्मिलित हुनु वा जारी राख्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद, वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for joining or continuing in an unlawful assembly, knowing it has been commanded to disperse?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extent to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: तितरबितर गर्न आदेश दिएपछि पनि गैरकानूनी भेलामा जारी राख्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवैको अधिकतम अवधि के हो?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि दुई वर्षसम्म, वा त्यहाँ जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment, fine, or both for someone who continues in an unlawful assembly even after it has been commanded to disperse?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is up to two years, or there may be a fine, or both.

question: दंगाको परिभाषा के हो?
answer: दंगा भन्नाले गैरकानूनी सभा वा त्यसको कुनै सदस्यले त्यस्तो सभाको साझा वस्तुको अभियोगमा बल वा हिंसाको प्रयोग गर्दा दंगा भनी परिभाषित गरिन्छ।
question_en: What is the definition of rioting?
answer_en: Rioting is defined as whenever force or violence is used by an unlawful assembly, or by any member thereof, in prosecution of the common object of such assembly.

question: बल प्रयोग वा हिंसा प्रयोग गरी गैरकानूनी सभाको साझा वस्तु के हो?
answer: बल प्रयोग वा हिंसा प्रयोग गरी गैरकानूनी भेलाको साझा वस्तुलाई दंगा भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is the common object of an unlawful assembly using force or violence referred to as?
answer_en: The common object of an unlawful assembly using force or violence is referred to as rioting.

question: दंगा गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: दंगा गर्ने सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for rioting?
answer_en: The punishment for rioting is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: दंगामा दोषी ठहरिएका व्यक्तिलाई कैदको अधिकतम अवधि र सम्भावित थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: दंगा गरेको अभियोगमा कसैलाई कैदको अधिकतम अवधि दुई वर्ष छ, र थप जरिवानामा जरिवाना वा कैद र जरिवाना दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and the potential additional penalties for someone convicted of rioting?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment for someone convicted of rioting is two years, and the additional penalties may include a fine or both imprisonment and a fine.

question: घातक हतियार लिएर दंगा गर्नेलाई के सजाय ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि वर्णन गरिएको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for rioting, being armed with a deadly weapon?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: घातक हतियार लिएर दंगा गरेमा जरिवाना सहितको अधिकतम सजाय कति हुन्छ ?
answer: घातक हतियार लिएर दंगा गरेकोमा अधिकतम तीन वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence, including fines, one might receive for rioting while armed with a deadly weapon?
answer_en: The maximum sentence one might receive for rioting while armed with a deadly weapon is imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with a fine, or both.

question: गैरकानूनी सभाको सदस्यले सो सभाको साझा वस्तुको अभियोगमा अपराध गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सो अपराध गर्दाको समयमा सोही सभाको सदस्य हुने प्रत्येक व्यक्ति सो अपराधको दोषी हुन्छ ।
question_en: What is the penalty for a member of an unlawful assembly who commits an offence in prosecution of the common object of that assembly?
answer_en: Every person who, at the time of the committing of that offence, is a member of the same assembly, is guilty of that offence.

question: गैरकानूनी सभाको साझा वस्तुको अभियोगमा भएको अपराधको दोषी को हो?
answer: सो अपराध गर्दाको समयमा सोही सभाको सदस्य हुने प्रत्येक व्यक्ति सो अपराधको दोषी हुन्छ ।
question_en: Who is guilty of an offence committed in prosecution of the common object of an unlawful assembly?
answer_en: Every person who, at the time of the committing of that offence, is a member of the same assembly, is guilty of that offence.
