answer: सरकारी कर्मचारीलाई कानुनी अधिकारको दुरुपयोग गर्ने नियतले गलत सूचना दिनेलाई ६ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for giving false information to a public servant with the intention of causing them to misuse their lawful power?
answer_en: The punishment for giving false information to a public servant with the intention of causing them to misuse their lawful power is imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or a fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or both.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याउने नियतले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई गलत जानकारी दिने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: एउटा उदाहरण हो जब A ले मजिस्ट्रेटलाई सूचित गर्दछ कि Z, एक प्रहरी-अधिकारी, त्यस्ता मजिस्ट्रेटको मातहतमा, कर्तव्यको बेवास्ता वा दुर्व्यवहारको लागि दोषी भएको छ, त्यस्ता जानकारी गलत हो भनेर थाहा छ, र यो जानकारीले मजिस्ट्रेटले Z लाई बर्खास्त गर्ने सम्भावना छ भन्ने थाहा छ। A यस खण्डमा परिभाषित अपराध गरेको छ।
question_en: What is an example of providing false information to a public servant with intent to cause injury to another person?
answer_en: An example is when A informs a Magistrate that Z, a police-officer, subordinate to such Magistrate, has been guilty of neglect of duty or misconduct, knowing such information to be false, and knowing it to be likely that the information will cause the Magistrate to dismiss Z. A has committed the offence defined in this section.

question: Z को कर्तव्यको उपेक्षा वा दुराचारको बारेमा मजिस्ट्रेटलाई झूटो जानकारी दिएर A ले के अपराध गरेको छ, यो गलत जानकारीले Z को बर्खास्त गर्न सक्छ भन्ने ज्ञानको साथमा?
answer: A ले अर्को व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याउने नियतले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई गलत सूचना दिने कसुर गरेको छ।
question_en: What offence has A committed by falsely informing a Magistrate about Z's neglect of duty or misconduct, with the knowledge that this false information could likely lead to Z's dismissal?
answer_en: A has committed the offence of providing false information to a public servant with intent to cause injury to another person.

question: सूचना झूटो भएको थाहा पाएर कुनै व्यक्तिले गैरकानूनी गतिविधिको बारेमा सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई झूटो जानकारी दिंदा के अपराध हुन्छ?
answer: यस परिदृश्यमा गरिएको अपराधले रिस उठाउने वा खोजी गर्न उक्साउने उद्देश्यले सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई गलत जानकारी प्रदान गर्नु हो।
question_en: What offence is committed when a person falsely informs a public servant about illegal activities, knowing the information to be false?
answer_en: The offence committed in this scenario is providing false information to a public servant with the intention of causing annoyance or instigating a search.

question: कसैले रिस उठाउने वा खोजी भड्काउने नियतले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई गलत सूचना दिएमा के अपराध हुन्छ ?
answer: सूचना झूटो भएको थाहा पाएर कुनै व्यक्तिले गैरकानूनी गतिविधिको बारेमा सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई झुटो जानकारी दिंदा रिस उठाउने वा खोजी गर्न उक्साउने नियतले निजामति कर्मचारीलाई झुटो सूचना दिने अपराध गर्छन्।
question_en: What crime is committed when someone provides false information to a public servant with the intention of causing annoyance or instigating a search?
answer_en: When a person falsely informs a public servant about illegal activities, knowing the information to be false, they commit the offense of providing false information to a public servant with the intention of causing annoyance or instigating a search.

question: सरकारी कर्मचारीको कानुनी अख्तियारले कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति हडप्न विरोध गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for offering resistance to the taking of any property by the lawful authority of a public servant?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or a fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or both.

question: सरकारी कर्मचारीको कानुनी अख्तियारले कुनै सम्पत्ति हडप्न विरोध गरेमा के सजाय हुन सक्छ ?
answer: सजायमा ६ महिनासम्म कैद, एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ ।
question_en: What can the punishment extend to if one offers resistance to the taking of any property by the lawful authority of a public servant?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to imprisonment for a term of up to six months, a fine of up to one thousand rupees, or both.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकको कानुनी अख्तियारले बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरेको कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति बिक्रीमा कसैले जानाजानी अवरोध गरेमा के अपराध हुन्छ?
answer: यस परिदृश्यमा गरिएको कसुर भनेको सार्वजनिक सेवकको अख्तियारबाट बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरिएको सम्पत्ति बिक्रीमा अवरोध गर्नु हो।
question_en: What offence is committed when someone intentionally obstructs any sale of property offered for sale by the lawful authority of a public servant?
answer_en: The offence committed in this scenario is obstructing sale of property offered for sale by authority of public servant.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीको अख्तियारले बिक्री गर्न प्रस्ताव गरेको सम्पत्ति बिक्रीमा कुनै व्यक्तिले बाधा पु¥याएमा के भनिन्छ ?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीको अख्तियारले बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरेको सम्पत्ति बिक्रीमा अवरोध गर्नु कसुरलाई कसुर भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is the offense called when a person obstructs the sale of property offered for sale by the authority of a public servant?
answer_en: The offence is called obstructing sale of property offered for sale by authority of public servant.

question: सरकारी कर्मचारीको कानुनी अख्तियारले बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरेको सम्पत्ति बिक्रीमा बाधा पुर्‍याएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: एक महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for obstructing a sale of property offered for sale by the lawful authority of a public servant?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month, or a fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or both.

question: कानुनबमोजिम सरकारी कर्मचारीले बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरेको सम्पत्ति बिक्रीमा बाधा पुर्‍याएमा के सजाय हुन सक्छ ?
answer: एक महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ ।
question_en: What can the punishment be for obstructing a sale of property offered for sale by a lawful public servant?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month, or a fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or both.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकले राखेको सम्पत्ति खरिद गर्न कानुनी रूपमा असक्षम व्यक्तिको तर्फबाट कसैले सम्पत्ति खरिद गर्दा वा बोलपत्र गर्दा के अपराध हुन्छ?
answer: यस परिदृश्यमा गरिएको अपराध भनेको सार्वजनिक सेवकको अख्तियारद्वारा बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरिएको सम्पत्तिको अवैध खरिद वा बोलपत्र हो।
question_en: What offence is committed when someone purchases or bids for property on behalf of a person who is legally incapable of purchasing that property at a sale held by a public servant?
answer_en: The offence committed in this scenario is illegal purchase or bid for property offered for sale by authority of public servant.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकको अख्तियारबाट बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरिएको सम्पत्तिको अवैध खरिद वा बोलपत्र कस्तो अवस्थामा कसुर हुन्छ?
answer: सार्वजनिक सेवकले राखेको बिक्रीमा त्यो सम्पत्ति खरिद गर्न कानुनी रूपमा असक्षम व्यक्तिको तर्फबाट कसैले सम्पत्ति खरिद गर्दा वा बोलपत्र गर्दा यो अपराध गरिन्छ।
question_en: In what scenario is the offence of illegal purchase or bid for property offered for sale by authority of public servant committed?
answer_en: This offence is committed when someone purchases or bids for property on behalf of a person who is legally incapable of purchasing that property at a sale held by a public servant.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई सार्वजनिक काममा बाधा पुर्‍याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: तीन महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for obstructing a public servant in the discharge of his public functions?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई सार्वजनिक काममा बाधा पुर्‍याउने सजायमा के समावेश छ ?
answer: यसमा तीन महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन्छ।
question_en: What does the punishment for obstructing a public servant in the discharge of his public functions include?
answer_en: It includes imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.

question: कानून बमोजिम सहयोग गर्न बाध्य हुँदा सरकारी कर्मचारीलाई सहयोग नगर्ने सजाय के हो ?
answer: एक महिनासम्म कैद वा दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने सजाय हो ।
question_en: What is the penalty for omitting to assist a public servant when bound by law to give assistance?
answer_en: The penalty is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month, or with fine which may extend to two hundred rupees, or with both.

question: कानून बमोजिम सरकारी कर्मचारीलाई सहयोग नगर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजायमा एक महिनासम्म कैद वा दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for failing to assist a public servant when required by law?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month, or with fine which may extend to two hundred rupees, or with both.

question: न्यायिक अदालतले कानुनी रूपमा जारी गरेको कुनै प्रक्रिया कार्यान्वयन गर्न, वा अपराध हुनबाट रोक्न, दंगा वा झगडालाई दबाउन, वा अपराधको अभियोगमा वा दोषी व्यक्तिलाई पक्राउ गर्न वा कानुनी हिरासतबाट भागेको प्रयोजनका लागि त्यस्तो सहायता मागिएको हो भने के हुन्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What if such assistance is demanded for the purposes of executing any process lawfully issued by a Court of Justice, or of preventing the commission of an offence, or suppressing a riot, or affray, or of apprehending a person charged with or guilty of an offence, or of having escaped from lawful custody?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.

question: न्यायलयले जारी गरेको कुनै प्रकृया कार्यान्वयन गर्न, कसुर रोक्न, दंगा वा झडप दमन गर्न वा कसुरमा अभियोग लागेका वा दोषी वा कानुनी हिरासतबाट भागेको व्यक्तिलाई पक्राउ गर्न सहयोग माग्ने सजाय के हो ?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for demanding assistance for executing any process issued by a Court of Justice, preventing an offence, suppressing a riot or affray, or apprehending a person charged with or guilty of an offence or that has escaped from lawful custody?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकले विधिवत रूपमा जारी गरेको आदेशको अवज्ञा गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: दण्डको विवरण पाठमा पूर्ण रूपमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for disobedience to order duly promulgated by a public servant?
answer_en: The details of the punishment are not fully provided in the text.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीले जारी गरेको आदेशको अवज्ञा गरेमा सजाय हुने सम्बन्धमा पाठमा के जानकारी दिइएको छ ?
answer: दण्डको विवरण पाठमा पूर्ण रूपमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What information is provided in the text regarding the punishment for disobedience to an order duly promulgated by a public servant?
answer_en: The details of the punishment are not fully provided in the text.

question: कानुनी रूपमा कार्यरत कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई अवरोध, रिस वा चोट पुर्‍याएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: एक महिनासम्म कैद वा दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय
question_en: What is the punishment for causing obstruction, annoyance or injury to any persons lawfully employed?
answer_en: Simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month or with fine which may extend to two hundred rupees, or with both

question: एक महिनासम्मको कैद वा दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजायको परिणाम के हुन्छ ?
answer: यो कानुनी रूपमा कार्यरत कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई अवरोध, रिस उठाउने वा चोट पुर्‍याउने सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the consequence of simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month or with a fine which may extend to two hundred rupees, or both?
answer_en: It is the punishment for causing obstruction, annoyance or injury to any persons lawfully employed.

question: यस्तो अवज्ञाले मानव जीवन, स्वास्थ्य वा सुरक्षामा खतरा पैदा गर्छ वा गराउने वा दंगा वा झडप निम्त्याउँछ वा गराउने प्रवृति भएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय
question_en: What is the punishment if such disobedience causes or tends to cause danger to human life, health or safety, or causes or tends to cause a riot or affray?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both

question: मानव जीवन, स्वास्थ्य वा सुरक्षामा खतरा पैदा गर्ने वा गराउने वा दंगा वा द्वन्द्व निम्त्याउने वा गराउने कार्यलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय
question_en: What is the penalty for an act that causes or tends to cause danger to human life, health or safety, or causes or tends to cause a riot or affray?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both

question: के यो आवश्यक छ कि अपराधीले हानि उत्पन्न गर्ने मनसाय राख्नुपर्छ, वा उसको अनाज्ञाकारितालाई हानि ल्याउने सम्भावनाको रूपमा विचार गर्नुपर्छ?
answer: होइन, यो पर्याप्त छ कि उसलाई उसले अवज्ञा गरेको आदेशको बारेमा थाहा छ, र उसको अवज्ञाले हानि उत्पन्न गर्दछ, वा उत्पादन गर्ने सम्भावना छ।
question_en: Is it necessary that the offender should intend to produce harm, or contemplate his disobedience as likely to produce harm?
answer_en: No, it is sufficient that he knows of the order which he disobeys, and that his disobedience produces, or is likely to produce, harm.

question: के अपराधीलाई उसले अनाज्ञाकारी भएको आदेश र उसको अनाज्ञाकारिताले सम्भावित रूपमा हानि पुऱ्याउन सक्छ भनेर थाहा पाउनु पर्याप्त छ?
answer: हो, यो पर्याप्त छ कि उसलाई उसले अवज्ञा गरेको आदेशको बारेमा थाहा छ, र उसको अनाज्ञाकारिताले हानि उत्पन्न गर्दछ, वा उत्पादन गर्ने सम्भावना छ।
question_en: Is it enough for the offender to know of the order he disobeys and that his disobedience could potentially cause harm?
answer_en: Yes, it is sufficient that he knows of the order which he disobeys, and that his disobedience produces, or is likely to produce, harm.

question: धारा 189 के संग सम्बन्धित छ?
answer: यसले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई चोट पुर्याउने धम्कीसँग सम्बन्धित छ र सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What does section 189 deal with?
answer_en: It deals with the threat of injury to public servant and the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुन दफाले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई चोट पुर्याउने धम्कीसँग सम्बन्धित छ र दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजायको सजाय छ?
answer: धारा १८९ ले यससँग सम्बन्धित छ।
question_en: Which section deals with the threat of injury to a public servant and has a punishment of imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both?
answer_en: Section 189 deals with this.

question: धारा १९० ले केसँग सम्बन्धित छ?
answer: यसले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई सुरक्षाको लागि निवेदन दिनबाट टाढा रहन व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याउने धम्कीसँग सम्बन्धित छ।
question_en: What does section 190 deal with?
answer_en: It deals with the threat of injury to induce person to refrain from applying for protection to public servant.

question: कुन दफाले निजामती कर्मचारीलाई सुरक्षाको लागि निवेदन दिन नदिन प्रेरित गर्न चोटपटक लाग्ने धम्कीसँग सम्बन्धित छ?
answer: धारा १९० ले यससँग सम्बन्धित छ।
question_en: Which section deals with the threat of injury to induce person to refrain from applying for protection to public servant?
answer_en: Section 190 deals with it.

question: कानुनी निर्देशन नमान्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कानुनी निर्देशन नमान्ने सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for not obeying a legal direction?
answer_en: The punishment for not obeying a legal direction can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: कानुनी निर्देशन पालना नगरेको कारण जेलमा पर्दा के हुन सक्छ?
answer: यदि तपाईंले कानुनी निर्देशन पालना गर्नुभएन भने, तपाईंलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, वा तपाईंलाई जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What can happen if you are imprisoned for not obeying a legal direction?
answer_en: If you do not obey a legal direction, you can be imprisoned for a term which may extend to one year, or you may be fined, or both.

question: अध्याय XI अनुसार झूटा प्रमाण दिने परिभाषा के हो?
answer: झूटो प्रमाण दिनु भनेको कुनै पनि कथन जुन झूटो हो, र वक्तालाई या त झूटो हो वा विश्वास नगर्ने कुनै पनि भनाइलाई परिभाषित गरिएको छ, कानुनी रूपमा शपथ वा कानूनको स्पष्ट प्रावधानद्वारा सत्य बताउन वा कुनै विषयमा घोषणा गर्न कानूनद्वारा बाध्य भएको अवस्थामा।
question_en: What is the definition of giving false evidence according to chapter XI?
answer_en: Giving false evidence is defined as making any statement which is false, and which the speaker either knows or believes to be false or does not believe to be true, while being legally bound by an oath or by an express provision of law to state the truth, or being bound by law to make a declaration upon any subject.

question: यदि कसैले कथन गरेको छ भने उसलाई थाहा छ वा झुटो हो, वा सत्य हो भनेर विश्वास गर्दैन, र तिनीहरू कानुनी रूपमा शपथ वा कानूनको स्पष्ट प्रावधानद्वारा सत्य बताउन बाध्य छन्, वा कुनै विषयमा घोषणा गर्न कानूनद्वारा बाध्य छन् भने यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यसलाई अध्याय XI अनुसार झूटा प्रमाण दिने भनेर परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What does it mean if someone makes a statement they either know or believe to be false, or do not believe to be true, and they are legally bound by an oath or by an express provision of law to state the truth, or are bound by law to make a declaration upon any subject?
answer_en: This is defined as giving false evidence according to chapter XI.

question: व्याख्या १ अनुसार कथनको अर्थ के हो?
answer: स्पष्टीकरण १ अनुसार, कथन यस खण्डको अर्थ भित्र छ, चाहे यो मौखिक वा अन्यथा बनाइएको हो।
question_en: What is the meaning of a statement according to Explanation 1?
answer_en: According to Explanation 1, a statement is within the meaning of this section, whether it is made verbally or otherwise.

question: स्पष्टीकरण १ अनुसार यस खण्डको अर्थमा कथनलाई कुन रूपमा बनाउन सकिन्छ?
answer: व्याख्या 1 अनुसार यस खण्डको अर्थ भित्र हुन मौखिक वा अन्यथा बयान गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: According to Explanation 1, in what form can a statement be made to be within the meaning of this section?
answer_en: A statement can be made verbally or otherwise to be within the meaning of this section according to Explanation 1.

question: स्पष्टीकरण २ ले झूटा प्रमाण दिने सम्बन्धमा व्यक्तिको विश्वासको बारेमा के भन्छ?
answer: स्पष्टीकरण २ ले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई आफूले विश्वास नगरेको कुरामा विश्वास गरेको र आफूलाई थाहा नभएको कुरा थाहा छ भनी झुटा प्रमाण दिएकोमा दोषी ठहर हुन सक्ने उल्लेख छ।
question_en: What does Explanation 2 say about a person's belief in relation to giving false evidence?
answer_en: Explanation 2 states that a person may be guilty of giving false evidence by stating that he believes a thing which he does not believe, as well as by stating that he knows a thing which he does not know.

question: व्याख्या २ बमोजिम झूटा प्रमाण दिने व्यक्तिलाई केले दोषी बनाउन सक्छ?
answer: आफूले विश्वास नगरेको कुरामा विश्वास गर्छु भनी झुटा प्रमाण दिनुको साथै आफूलाई थाहा नभएको कुरा थाहा छ भनी कुनै व्यक्तिलाई दोषी ठहराउन सकिन्छ।
question_en: What can make a person guilty of giving false evidence according to Explanation 2?
answer_en: A person may be guilty of giving false evidence by stating that he believes a thing which he does not believe, as well as by stating that he knows a thing which he does not know.

question: दृष्टान्त (क) मा झूटा प्रमाण दिने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: दृष्टान्त (a) मा, A ले झूटो प्रमाण दिन्छ जब उसले झुटो प्रमाण दिन्छ जब उसले झूटो कसम खान्छ कि उसले Z ले B को दावीको न्याय स्वीकार गरेको सुनेको छ, B को Z विरुद्ध एक हजार रुपैयाँको न्यायपूर्ण दावीको समर्थनमा।
question_en: What is the example of giving false evidence in Illustration (a)?
answer_en: In Illustration (a), A gives false evidence when he falsely swears on a trial that he heard Z admit the justice of B's claim, in support of a just claim which B has against Z for one thousand rupees.

question: दृष्टान्त (क) मा झूटा प्रमाण कसले दियो र यो झूटा प्रमाण के समावेश थियो?
answer: A ले इलस्ट्रेसन (a) मा झूटो प्रमाण दियो, झुटो कसम खाई एक मुद्दामा कि उसले Z ले B को दावीको न्याय स्वीकार गरेको सुनेको छ, B को Z विरुद्ध एक हजार रुपैयाँको न्यायिक दावीको समर्थनमा।
question_en: Who gave false evidence in Illustration (a) and what did this false evidence entail?
answer_en: A gave false evidence in Illustration (a), falsely swearing on a trial that he heard Z admit the justice of B's claim, in support of a just claim which B has against Z for one thousand rupees.

question: दृष्टान्त (ख) मा झूटा प्रमाण दिने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: दृष्टान्त (b) मा, A ले झूटो प्रमाण दिन्छ जब उसले कुनै निश्चित हस्ताक्षर Z को हस्तलेखन हो भनेर विश्वास गर्छ भने, जब उसले त्यसलाई विश्वास गर्दैन, सत्य बताउनको लागि शपथद्वारा बाँधिएको थियो।
question_en: What is the example of giving false evidence in Illustration (b)?
answer_en: In Illustration (b), A gives false evidence when he states that he believes a certain signature to be the handwriting of Z, when he does not believe it to be so, being bound by an oath to state the truth.

question: A ले दृष्टान्तमा के झूटो प्रमाण दिन्छ (b) सत्य बताउन शपथ लिएर बाध्य हुँदा?
answer: A ले बताउँछ कि उसले निश्चित हस्ताक्षर Z को हस्तलेखन हो भन्ने विश्वास गर्छ, जब उसले यसलाई विश्वास गर्दैन।
question_en: What false evidence does A give in Illustration (b) when bound by an oath to state the truth?
answer_en: A states that he believes a certain signature to be the handwriting of Z, when he does not believe it to be so.

question: दृष्टान्त (c) मा झूटा प्रमाण नदिने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: दृष्टान्त (c) मा, हस्ताक्षर Z को हस्तलेखन नहुन सक्छ, A ले गलत प्रमाण दिएको छैन किनकि A को कथन केवल उसको विश्वासको रूपमा हो, र उसको विश्वासको रूपमा सत्य हो।
question_en: What is the example of not giving false evidence in Illustration (c)?
answer_en: In Illustration (c), although the signature may not be the handwriting of Z, A has not given false evidence as A's statement is merely as to his belief, and is true as to his belief.

question: दृष्टान्त (c) मा भएको राज्यले उसले झूटो प्रमाण दिइरहेको छैन भनेर सुनिश्चित गर्ने के भन्छ?
answer: दृष्टान्त (c) मा, A ले हस्ताक्षर Z को हस्तलेखन नहुन सक्छ, जुन उसको विश्वास मात्र हो, र उसको विश्वासमा सत्य हो भनी बताउँछ। यसले सुनिश्चित गर्दछ कि उसले गलत प्रमाण दिइरहेको छैन।
question_en: What does A state in Illustration (c) that ensures he is not giving false evidence?
answer_en: In Illustration (c), A states that the signature may not be the handwriting of Z, which is merely his belief, and is true as to his belief. This ensures that he is not giving false evidence.

question: दृष्टान्त (d) मा झूटा प्रमाण दिने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: दृष्टान्त (d) मा, A ले झूटो प्रमाण दिन्छ जब उसले बताउँछ कि उसलाई थाहा छ कि Z कुनै विशेष दिनमा एक विशेष स्थानमा थियो, विषयमा केहि पनि थाहा छैन, सत्य बताउन शपथद्वारा बाध्य भएको थियो।
question_en: What is the example of giving false evidence in Illustration (d)?
answer_en: In Illustration (d), A gives false evidence when he states that he knows that Z was at a particular place on a particular day, not knowing anything upon the subject, being bound by an oath to state the truth.

question: कसले दृष्टान्त (d) मा झूटो प्रमाण दिन्छ कि उसलाई थाहा छ कि Z एक निश्चित दिनमा एक विशेष स्थानमा थियो, विषयको बारेमा केहि थाहा नभएको र सत्य बताउन को लागी कसम द्वारा बाध्य छ?
answer: A दृष्टान्त (d) मा गलत प्रमाण दिन्छ।
question_en: Who gives false evidence in Illustration (d) by stating he knows that Z was at a particular place on a specific day, despite not knowing anything about the subject and being bound by an oath to state the truth?
answer_en: A gives false evidence in Illustration (d).

question: गलत व्याख्या वा अनुवादलाई सत्य भनेर प्रमाणित गर्ने दोभाषे वा अनुवादकको कार्य के हो?
answer: झुटो प्रमाण दिदै
question_en: What is the action of an interpreter or translator certifying a false interpretation or translation as true referred to as?
answer_en: Giving false evidence

question: विशेष गरी व्याख्या वा अनुवादको सन्दर्भमा गलत वा भ्रामक जानकारी प्रदान गर्ने कार्यलाई वर्णन गर्न कुन शब्द प्रयोग गरिन्छ?
answer: झुटो प्रमाण दिदै
question_en: What term is used to describe the act of providing incorrect or misleading information, especially in the context of interpretation or translation?
answer_en: Giving false evidence

question: झूटो परिस्थिति उत्पन्न गराउने वा न्यायिक कारबाहीमा हाजिर हुने नियतले झूटो प्रविष्टि गर्नुलाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: झुटा प्रमाण बनाउँदै
question_en: What is the term for causing a false circumstance to exist or making a false entry with the intention for it to appear in a judicial proceeding?
answer_en: Fabricating false evidence

question: 'झूटा प्रमाण निर्माण गर्ने' शब्दको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यो एक गलत परिस्थिति को कारण को लागी वा एक न्यायिक कार्यवाही मा उपस्थित को लागी नियत संग गलत प्रविष्टि को लागी शब्द हो।
question_en: What does the term 'Fabricating false evidence' mean?
answer_en: It is the term for causing a false circumstance to exist or making a false entry with the intention for it to appear in a judicial proceeding.

question: न्यायिक कारबाहीमा जानाजानी झुटा प्रमाण दिनु वा झूटा प्रमाण बनाएको परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: कैद सहितको सजाय
question_en: What is the consequence of intentionally giving false evidence or fabricating false evidence in a judicial proceeding?
answer_en: Punishment with imprisonment

question: न्यायिक कारबाहीमा जानाजानी झुटा प्रमाण दिने वा झुटो प्रमाण दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: कैद सहितको सजाय
question_en: What is the penalty for intentionally giving or fabricating false evidence in a judicial proceeding?
answer_en: Punishment with imprisonment

question: गहनाको बाकससँग सम्बन्धित झूटा प्रमाणहरू बनाउने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: A ले गहनाहरू Z सँग सम्बन्धित बक्समा राख्छ, त्यो बक्समा फेला पार्न सकिन्छ भन्ने उद्देश्यले, र यो परिस्थितिले Z लाई चोरीको दोषी ठहराउन सक्छ।
question_en: What is an example of fabricating false evidence relating to a box of jewels?
answer_en: A puts jewels into a box belonging to Z, with the intention that they may be found in that box, and that this circumstance may cause Z to be convicted of theft.

question: Z को चोरीको झूटो दोषी ठहराउने नियतले Z को बक्समा गहनाहरू कसले हाल्यो?
answer: ए
question_en: Who put jewels into Z's box with the intention to falsely convict Z of theft?
answer_en: A

question: पसल-पुस्तक प्रविष्टिको सम्बन्धमा झूटा प्रमाणहरू निर्माण गर्ने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: न्यायको अदालतमा प्रमाणित प्रमाणको रूपमा प्रयोग गर्ने उद्देश्यले आफ्नो पसल-पुस्तकमा एक झूटा प्रविष्टि गर्दछ।
question_en: What is an example of fabricating false evidence in relation to a shop-book entry?
answer_en: A makes a false entry in his shop-book for the purpose of using it as corroborative evidence in a Court of Justice.

question: न्याय अदालतमा प्रमाणित प्रमाणको रूपमा प्रयोग गर्ने उद्देश्यले A ले आफ्नो पसल-पुस्तकमा गलत प्रविष्टि गर्दा यसको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यो पसल-पुस्तक प्रविष्टिको सम्बन्धमा झूटा प्रमाण निर्माण गर्ने उदाहरण हो।
question_en: What does it mean when A makes a false entry in his shop-book for the purpose of using it as corroborative evidence in a Court of Justice?
answer_en: It is an example of fabricating false evidence in relation to a shop-book entry.

question: आपराधिक षड्यन्त्रको सन्दर्भमा झूटा प्रमाण निर्माण गर्ने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: A, Z लाई आपराधिक षडयन्त्रमा दोषी ठहर गराउने उद्देश्यले, Z को हस्तलेखनको नक्कल गर्दै, त्यस्तो आपराधिक षड्यन्त्रमा सहयोगीलाई सम्बोधन गरिएको भनि चिठी लेख्छ, र चिठीलाई प्रहरी अधिकारीहरूले खोजी गर्ने सम्भावना रहेको ठाउँमा राख्छ।
question_en: What is an example of fabricating false evidence in the context of a criminal conspiracy?
answer_en: A, with the intention of causing Z to be convicted of a criminal conspiracy, writes a letter in imitation of Z's handwriting, purporting to be addressed to an accomplice in such criminal conspiracy, and puts the letter in a place which he knows that the officers of the police are likely to search.

question: यदि A ले Z को हस्तलेखनको नक्कल गर्दै, अपराधी सहयोगीलाई सम्बोधन गरेको भन्दै पत्र लेख्छ र पुलिस अधिकारीहरूले खोजी गर्ने सम्भावना भएको ठाउँमा राख्छ भने यसको के अर्थ हुन सक्छ?
answer: यो एक आपराधिक षड्यन्त्रको सन्दर्भमा Z लाई दोषी ठहराउने उद्देश्यले झूटा प्रमाणहरू बनाउने उदाहरण हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What could it mean if A writes a letter imitating Z's handwriting, purporting it to be addressed to a criminal accomplice, and places it where police officers are likely to search?
answer_en: This could be an example of fabricating false evidence in the context of a criminal conspiracy, with the intention of causing Z to be convicted.

question: कुनै पनि अवस्थामा जानीजानी झुटा प्रमाण दिने वा बनाएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for intentionally giving or fabricating false evidence in any case?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कुन अपराधमा तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद र जरिवानाको दायित्व पनि समावेश गरी दण्डनीय छ?
answer: जानाजानी कुनै पनि अवस्थामा झूटा प्रमाण दिनु वा बनाउनुहोस्
question_en: What crime is punishable by imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and also includes a liability to fine?
answer_en: Intentionally giving or fabricating false evidence in any case

question: स्पष्टीकरण 1 अनुसार न्यायिक कार्यवाही के मानिन्छ?
answer: कोर्ट-मार्शल अघिको मुद्दा एक न्यायिक प्रक्रिया हो।
question_en: What is considered a judicial proceeding according to Explanation 1?
answer_en: A trial before a Court-martial is a judicial proceeding.

question: स्पष्टीकरण 1 अनुसार कोर्ट-मार्शल अघि कस्तो प्रकारको कार्यवाही हो?
answer: कोर्ट-मार्शल अघिको मुद्दालाई न्यायिक प्रक्रिया मानिन्छ।
question_en: What type of proceeding is a trial before a Court-martial according to Explanation 1?
answer_en: A trial before a Court-martial is considered a judicial proceeding.

question: स्पष्टीकरण 2 अनुसार न्यायिक कार्यवाहीको चरणलाई के मानिन्छ?
answer: प्रारम्भिक कानून द्वारा निर्देशित एक अनुसन्धान न्याय अदालत समक्ष कार्यवाहीको लागि।
question_en: What is considered a stage of a judicial proceeding according to Explanation 2?
answer_en: An investigation directed by law preliminary to a proceeding before a Court of Justice.

question: स्पष्टीकरण 2 मा उल्लेख गरिएको न्याय अदालत समक्ष कार्यवाहीको लागि प्रारम्भिक कानून द्वारा निर्देशित अनुसन्धान के हो?
answer: यसलाई न्यायिक प्रक्रियाको चरण मानिन्छ।
question_en: What is an investigation directed by law preliminary to a proceeding before a Court of Justice referred to in Explanation 2?
answer_en: It is considered a stage of a judicial proceeding.

question: पूँजीगत अपराधको सजाय प्राप्त गर्ने अभिप्रायले झूटा प्रमाण दिने वा बनाएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: आजीवन कारावास, वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कठोर कैद, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for giving or fabricating false evidence with intent to procure the conviction of a capital offence?
answer_en: Imprisonment for life, or with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: फाँसीको कसुर सजाय गराउने नियतले झूटा प्रमाण दिने वा बनाएमा कानूनले के सजाय दिन्छ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कठोर कैद हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What does the law state as the penalty for giving or fabricating false evidence with intent to cause a capital offense conviction?
answer_en: The penalty is imprisonment for life, or with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and the person shall also be liable to fine.

question: व्याख्या ३ अनुसार न्यायिक प्रक्रियाको चरणलाई के मानिन्छ?
answer: कानून बमोजिम न्याय अदालतले निर्देशित गरेको र न्याय अदालतको अख्तियारमा सञ्चालन भएको अनुसन्धान।
question_en: What is considered a stage of a judicial proceeding according to Explanation 3?
answer_en: An investigation directed by a Court of Justice according to law, and conducted under the authority of a Court of Justice.

question: कानून बमोजिम न्यायलयले निर्देशित गरेको र स्पष्टीकरण ३ मा उल्लेखित न्यायलयको अख्तियारमा भएको अनुसन्धानलाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: यसलाई न्यायिक प्रक्रियाको चरण मानिन्छ।
question_en: What is an investigation directed by a Court of Justice according to law and conducted under the authority of a Court of Justice referred to in Explanation 3?
answer_en: It is considered a stage of a judicial proceeding.

question: निर्दोष व्यक्तिलाई सजाय र मृत्युदण्डमा पुर्‍याउने झुटो प्रमाण दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: यस्तो झुटो प्रमाण दिने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा कानुनमा पहिले उल्लेख गरिएको सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for giving false evidence which leads to the conviction and execution of an innocent person?
answer_en: The person who gives such false evidence shall be punished either with death or the punishment described earlier in the law.

question: गलत प्रमाण र निर्दोष व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्डमा परिणत गर्ने झूटा प्रमाण प्रदान गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: यस्तो झुटो प्रमाण दिने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा कानुनमा पहिले उल्लेख गरिएको सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What will happen to someone who provides false evidence that results in the wrongful conviction and execution of an innocent individual?
answer_en: The person who gives such false evidence shall be punished either with death or the punishment described earlier in the law.

question: आजीवन कारावास वा सात वर्ष वा सोभन्दा बढी सजाय हुने कसुरमा दोषी ठहर गराउने नियतले झूटा प्रमाण दिने वा बनाएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: त्यस्तो झुटो प्रमाण दिने वा बनाउने व्यक्तिलाई त्यस्तो कसुरमा दोषी ठहर भएका व्यक्तिलाई सजाय हुने गरी सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for giving or fabricating false evidence with the intent to cause a conviction for an offence punishable with imprisonment for life or a term of seven years or upwards?
answer_en: The person who gives or fabricates such false evidence shall be punished as a person convicted of that offence would be liable to be punished.

question: आजीवन कारावास वा सात वर्ष वा सोभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुने कसुरमा दोषी ठहर गराउने नियतले झूटा प्रमाण दिने वा बनाउने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: त्यस्तो झुटो प्रमाण दिने वा बनाउने व्यक्तिलाई त्यस्तो कसुरमा दोषी ठहर भएका व्यक्तिलाई सजाय हुने गरी सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What happens to a person who gives or fabricates false evidence with the intent to cause a conviction for an offence punishable with imprisonment for life or a term of seven years or upwards?
answer_en: The person who gives or fabricates such false evidence shall be punished as a person convicted of that offence would be liable to be punished.

question: कसैलाई झुटो प्रमाण दिन धम्की दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: झुटा प्रमाण पेश गर्न कसैलाई धम्की दिने व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि विवरणको सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for threatening any person to give false evidence?
answer_en: The person who threatens another to give false evidence shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिलाई भ्रामक गवाहीहरू प्रदान गर्न बाध्य पार्ने व्यक्तिको लागि सम्भावित दण्ड के हो?
answer: झूटा गवाही दिन कसैलाई जबरजस्ती गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्म जेल, जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for someone who coerces another individual into providing deceptive testimonies?
answer_en: The individual who coerces another into providing false testimonies may face up to seven years in prison, a fine, or both.

question: यदि झूटा प्रमाणले निर्दोष व्यक्तिलाई दोषी ठहराएर सजाय सुनाउँछ भने सम्भावित थप सजाय के हो?
answer: त्यस्ता झुटा प्रमाणका कारण निर्दोष व्यक्तिलाई दोषी ठहर गरी सजाय सुनाइएमा झुटा प्रमाण दिने वा धम्की दिने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा सात वर्षभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the potential additional punishment if the false evidence leads to an innocent person being convicted and sentenced?
answer_en: If an innocent person is convicted and sentenced as a result of such false evidence, the person who gave or threatened for false evidence could be punished with death or imprisonment for more than seven years.

question: झुटा प्रमाण दिएर वा धम्की दिने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन सक्छ जसले गर्दा निर्दोष व्यक्तिलाई दोषी ठहर गरी सजाय सुनाइन्छ?
answer: झुटो प्रमाण दिने वा धम्की दिने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा सात वर्षभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What could be the punishment for a person who gave or threatened for false evidence that led to an innocent person being convicted and sentenced?
answer_en: The person who gave or threatened for false evidence could be punished with death or imprisonment for more than seven years.

question: झुटा प्रमाणको प्रयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिले झूटा प्रमाण दिए वा बनाए जस्तै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for using evidence known to be false?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave or fabricated false evidence.

question: झूटा प्रमाण दिने वा बनाउने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: झूटा प्रमाणित प्रमाण प्रयोग गरे झैं व्यक्तिलाई सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: What happens to a person who gives or fabricates false evidence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he used evidence known to be false.

question: नक्कली प्रमाणपत्र जारी गर्दा वा हस्ताक्षर गर्दा के परिणाम हुन्छ?
answer: झूटा प्रमाण दिए जस्तै व्यक्तिलाई सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: What is the consequence for issuing or signing a false certificate?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave false evidence.

question: झुटो प्रमाण दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिले झूटो प्रमाणपत्र जारी गरे वा हस्ताक्षर गरे जस्तै गरी सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who gives false evidence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he issued or signed a false certificate.

question: नक्कली सर्टिफिकेट साँचो मानेर प्रयोग गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: झूटा प्रमाण दिए जस्तै व्यक्तिलाई सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for using a false certificate as if it were true?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave false evidence.

question: गलत सर्टिफिकेट साँचो मानेर प्रयोग गरेमा कसरी सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: झूटा प्रमाण दिए जस्तै व्यक्तिलाई सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: How is a person punished if they use a false certificate as if it were true?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave false evidence.

question: प्रमाणको रूपमा कानुनी रूपमा प्राप्य हुने घोषणामा झूटा बयान दिनुको नतिजा के हुन्छ?
answer: झूटा प्रमाण दिए जस्तै व्यक्तिलाई सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: What is the consequence of making a false statement in a declaration which is legally receivable as evidence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave false evidence.

question: झुटा प्रमाण दिने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: कानुनी रूपमा प्रमाणको रूपमा प्राप्य हुने घोषणापत्रमा झूटा बयान दिएका व्यक्तिलाई त्यसरी नै सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: What happens to an individual who gives false evidence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he made a false statement in a declaration which is legally receivable as evidence.

question: साँचो भए झूटो घोषणा प्रयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: झूटा प्रमाण दिए जस्तै व्यक्तिलाई सजाय दिइनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for using a false declaration as if it were true?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave false evidence.

question: झुटो प्रमाण दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई त्यसरी नै सजाय दिइनेछ जसरी उसले गलत घोषणालाई सत्य हो जस्तो गरी प्रयोग गरेको छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who gave false evidence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished in the same manner as if he used a false declaration as if it were true.

question: प्रमाण लुकाउने वा पुँजीगत अपराधको गलत जानकारी दिने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who hides evidence or gives false information about a capital offence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: गम्भिर अपराधसँग सम्बन्धित प्रमाण लुकाउने वा गलत सूचना उपलब्ध गराएकोमा दोषी पाइने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the potential punishment for a person who is found guilty of concealing evidence or providing false information related to a serious crime?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: प्रमाण लुकाउने वा गलत जानकारी दिने कसूरलाई आजीवन कारावास सजाय हुने सजाय के हो?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who hides evidence or gives false information about an offence punishable with imprisonment for life?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: प्रमाण लुकाउने वा आजीवन काराबास हुन सक्ने अपराधको बारेमा गलत जानकारी उपलब्ध गराउने दोषीलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for a person who has been found guilty of hiding evidence or providing false information about a crime that could lead to a life sentence?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: दश वर्षभन्दा कम कैद सजाय हुने कसूरको बारेमा प्रमाण लुकाउने वा गलत जानकारी दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कसुरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको विवरणको कैद, कसुरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको कैदको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको एक चौथाई भागसम्म पुग्न सक्ने अवधिको लागि, वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who hides evidence or gives false information about an offence punishable with less than ten years imprisonment?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence, for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of the imprisonment provided for the offence, or with fine, or with both.

question: प्रमाण लुकाएर वा अधिकतम दश वर्षभन्दा कम सजाय हुने अपराधको बारेमा गलत जानकारी उपलब्ध गराएर न्यायमा बाधा पुर्‍याउने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: न्यायमा बाधा पुर्‍याउने सम्भावित जरिवाना मौलिक कसुरमा तोकिएको लामो अवधिको कैदको एक चौथाइसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ। व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना, वा कैद र जरिवानाको संयोजनको सजाय पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for someone who obstructs justice by either concealing evidence or providing false information about an offence that carries a maximum sentence of less than ten years?
answer_en: The potential penalty for such obstruction of justice can extend up to one-fourth of the longest term of the imprisonment provided for the original offence. The person can also be punished with a fine, or a combination of imprisonment and fine.

question: यदि एक व्यक्तिले हत्या पीडितको शव लुकाउन सहयोग गर्छ भने के हुन्छ?
answer: हत्यारा र अपराध थाहा पाएको व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What happens if a person assists in hiding the body of a murder victim?
answer_en: The person, knowing the murderer and the crime, can be liable to imprisonment of either description for seven years, and also to fine.

question: हत्याको बारेमा थाहा पाएर पीडितको शव लुकाउन सहयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिको कानुनी परिणाम के हुन सक्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि विवरणमा सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What could be the legal consequence for a person who knows about a murder and helps in hiding the victim's body?
answer_en: The person can be liable to imprisonment of either description for seven years, and also to fine.

question: कानुनी रूपमा जानकारी दिन बाध्य व्यक्तिले जानाजानी अपराधको जानकारी दिन नदिने सजाय के हो?
answer: दण्ड भनेको छ महिनासम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for intentionally omitting to give information of an offence by a person who is legally bound to inform?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: आफूले कानुनी रूपमा जानकारी दिन बाध्य भएको अपराधको जानकारी दिन जानाजान नछोड्ने व्यक्तिको सम्भावित परिणामहरू के हुन सक्छन्?
answer: दण्ड भनेको छ महिनासम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What could be the possible consequences for someone who intentionally omits to give information of an offence they are legally bound to inform about?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: कसुरको सम्बन्धमा गलत जानकारी दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवैसँग हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for giving false information respecting an offence committed?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: गरेको अपराधको बारेमा गलत जानकारी दिएर दोषी ठहरिएका व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि विवरणको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the possible sentence for a person who is convicted for providing false information about a crime committed?
answer_en: The sentence could be imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: के 'अपराध' शब्दले भारत बाहिर गरिएका कार्यहरू पनि समावेश गर्दछ?
answer: हो, 'अपराध' शब्दले भारत बाहिर कुनै पनि ठाउँमा गरेको कुनै पनि कार्यलाई समावेश गर्दछ, जुन, यदि भारतमा गरिएको भए, निश्चित धाराहरू अन्तर्गत दण्डनीय हुनेछ।
question_en: Does the term 'offence' also include acts committed out of India?
answer_en: Yes, the term 'offence' includes any act committed at any place out of India, which, if committed in India, would be punishable under certain sections.

question: के 'अपराध' शब्दले भारत बाहिर कुनै पनि ठाउँमा गरिएका कार्यहरू समावेश गर्दछ जुन भारतमा भएमा केही धाराहरू अन्तर्गत दण्डनीय हुनेछ?
answer: हो
question_en: Does the term 'offence' include acts committed at any place outside of India that would be punishable under certain sections if committed in India?
answer_en: Yes

question: प्रमाणका रूपमा प्रस्तुत हुन नदिन कागजात नष्ट गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवैसँग हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for destroying a document to prevent its production as evidence?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: दुई वर्षसम्म वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्ने सजाय के हो?
answer: दण्ड भनेको प्रमाणको रूपमा प्रस्तुत हुन नदिन कागजात नष्ट गर्नु हो।
question_en: What is the punishment that may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both, for?
answer_en: The punishment is for destroying a document to prevent its production as evidence.

question: मुद्दा वा मुद्दा चलाउने उद्देश्यले झूटा व्यक्तित्वको अपराध के हो?
answer: यसमा कसैले झूटो रूपमा अर्को व्यक्तित्वलाई समावेश गर्दछ र यस्तो कल्पित चरित्रमा प्रवेश गर्दछ।
question_en: What is the crime of false personation for purpose of act or proceeding in suit or prosecution?
answer_en: It involves someone falsely personating another and in such assumed character makes an admission.

question: कसैले झूटो रूपमा अर्को व्यक्तित्व बनाउँदा र त्यस्तो कल्पित चरित्रमा प्रवेश गर्दा यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यो काम वा मुद्दा वा अभियोगमा कार्यवाहीको उद्देश्यको लागि झूटा व्यक्तित्वको अपराध हो।
question_en: What does it mean when someone falsely personates another and in such assumed character makes an admission?
answer_en: This is the crime of false personation for purpose of act or proceeding in suit or prosecution.

question: कुनै पनि मुद्दा वा फौजदारी अभियोजनमा कुनै कार्य गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको तीन वर्षसम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for anyone who does any act in any suit or criminal prosecution?
answer_en: Punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै मुद्दा वा फौजदारी अभियोजनमा कार्य गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद वा वैकल्पिक सजायको अधिकतम अवधि कति हुन्छ?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि तीन वर्ष हो। वैकल्पिक सजाय जरिवाना, वा जरिवाना र कैद दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum duration for imprisonment, or the alternative punishments, for someone who commits an act in any suit or criminal prosecution?
answer_en: The maximum duration for imprisonment is three years. The alternative punishments could be a fine, or both a fine and imprisonment.

question: जफत वा कार्यान्वयन हुन नदिन जालसाजीपूर्वक सम्पत्ति हटाउने वा लुकाउने कसूर र सजाय के हो?
answer: जब कुनै व्यक्तिले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई कुनै सम्पत्ति वा कुनै ब्याज ढाँटे, लुकाएर, हस्तान्तरण वा हस्तान्तरण गर्दा, त्यसरी सम्पत्ति वा त्यसको ब्याजलाई जब्ती वा जरिवानाको रूपमा लिनबाट रोक्ने उद्देश्यले कसुर गरिन्छ। सजाय भनेको दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the offense and punishment for fraudulently removing or concealing property to prevent its seizure as forfeited or in execution?
answer_en: The offense is committed when a person fraudulently removes, conceals, transfers or delivers to any person any property or any interest therein, intending thereby to prevent that property or interest therein from being taken as a forfeiture or in satisfaction of a fine. The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई कुनै सम्पत्ति वा कुनै ब्याज जफत वा जरिवानाको रूपमा लिनबाट रोक्ने उद्देश्यले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई जालसाजीपूर्वक हटाउँछ, लुकाउँछ, हस्तान्तरण गर्छ वा हस्तान्तरण गर्छ भने यसको अर्थ के हो र सम्भावित सजाय के हो?
answer: यसलाई जफत वा कार्यान्वयनमा हुनबाट जोगाउन सम्पत्तिलाई जालसाजीपूर्वक हटाउने वा लुकाउने अपराध भनिन्छ। यस अपराधको सजायमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when a person fraudulently removes, conceals, transfers or delivers to any person any property or any interest therein, intending thereby to prevent that property or interest therein from being taken as a forfeiture or in satisfaction of a fine, and what is the potential punishment?
answer_en: This is known as the offense of fraudulently removing or concealing property to prevent its seizure as forfeited or in execution. The punishment for this offense may include imprisonment for a term that could extend to two years, a fine, or both.

question: सम्पत्ति जफत वा कार्यान्वयन हुन नदिनको लागि ठगी दाबी गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा यस अपराधको लागि कानूनले कुनै विशेष सजाय दिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for fraudulent claim to property to prevent its seizure as forfeited or in execution?
answer_en: The law does not state a specific punishment for this offense in the provided text.

question: के कानूनले सम्पत्तिमा जालसाजी दावीको अपराधको लागि कुनै विशेष सजायको व्यवस्था गरेको छ कि सम्पत्ति जफत हुनबाट जोगाउन वा प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा कार्यान्वयनमा छ?
answer: होइन, कानूनले प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा यस अपराधको लागि कुनै विशेष सजाय उल्लेख गर्दैन।
question_en: Does the law state a specific punishment for the offense of fraudulent claim to property to prevent its seizure as forfeited or in execution in the provided text?
answer_en: No, the law does not state a specific punishment for this offense in the provided text.

question: सम्पत्ति जफत वा कार्यान्वयन हुन नदिन जालसाजीपूर्वक दाबी गर्नुको अर्थ के हो?
answer: त्यसको अर्थ त्यस्तो सम्पत्ति वा व्याजमा कुनै हक वा हक दावी छैन भन्ने थाहा भई त्यस सम्पत्ति वा ब्याजलाई जफत वा जरिवानाको रूपमा लिनबाट रोक्ने नियतले जालसाजीपूर्वक कुनै सम्पत्ति वा कुनै ब्याज स्वीकार गर्नु वा दाबी गर्नु हो।
question_en: What does it mean to fraudulently claim property to prevent its seizure as forfeited or in execution?
answer_en: It means to fraudulently accept, receive or claim any property or any interest therein, knowing that one has no right or rightful claim to such property or interest, with the intention of preventing that property or interest therein from being taken as a forfeiture or in satisfaction of a fine.

question: त्यस्तो सम्पत्ति वा ब्याजमा आफ्नो कुनै हक वा हक दावी छैन भन्ने थाहा भई सो सम्पत्ति वा व्याज जफत वा जरिवाना तिर्नु पर्दैन भन्ने नियतले जालसाजीपूर्वक स्वीकार गर्ने, लिने वा दाबी गर्नुको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यसको अर्थ छ कि सम्पत्ति जफत वा कार्यान्वयनमा हुनबाट रोक्नको लागि जालसाजी दावी गर्नु हो।
question_en: What does it mean to fraudulently accept, receive or claim any property or any interest therein, knowing that one has no right or rightful claim to such property or interest, with the intention of preventing that property or interest therein from being taken as a forfeiture or in satisfaction of a fine?
answer_en: It means to fraudulently claim property to prevent its seizure as forfeited or in execution.

question: जानीजानी अदालतको आदेशको अवज्ञा गर्नेलाई दिवाणी मुद्दामा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्ष कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for knowingly disobeying a court order in a civil suit?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to two years of imprisonment, or a fine, or both.

question: यदि कसैले जानाजानी दिवाणी मुद्दामा अदालतको आदेशको अवज्ञा गरेमा के हुन सक्छ?

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले कसूर लुकाएमा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई सन्तुष्टि दिन वा कुनै सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?

question_en: What is the punishment for giving gratification to any person, or restoring any property to any person, in consideration of that person's concealing an offence?
answer_en: If the offence is punishable with death, the person will be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine. If the offence is punishable with imprisonment for life or with imprisonment which may extend to ten years, the person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine. If the offence is punishable with imprisonment not extending to ten years, the person shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of imprisonment provided for the offence, or with fine, or with both.

question: कसैलाई मृत्युदण्ड, आजीवन कैद वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद वा दश वर्षभन्दा बढी कैद सजाय हुने भएमा कसैलाई कसैलाई सन्तुष्टि दिने वा कसूर लुकाउने सट्टामा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्नेलाई कैद र सम्भावित जरिवानाको अवधि के हो?

question_en: What is the duration of imprisonment and possible fines for someone who gives gratification to another person or restores property to them in exchange for concealing an offence, if the offence is punishable with death, punishable with imprisonment for life or up to ten years, or punishable with imprisonment not exceeding ten years?
answer_en: If the offence is punishable with death, the person will be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine. If the offence is punishable with imprisonment for life or with imprisonment which may extend to ten years, the person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine. If the offence is punishable with imprisonment not extending to ten years, the person shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of imprisonment provided for the offence, or with fine, or with both.

question: धारा 213 र 214 को प्रावधानहरु को अपवाद के हो?
answer: धारा 213 र 214 को प्रावधानहरूले कुनै पनि मामलामा विस्तार गर्दैन जसमा अपराधलाई कानुनी रूपमा कम्पाउन्ड गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What is the exception to the provisions of sections 213 and 214?
answer_en: The provisions of sections 213 and 214 do not extend to any case in which the offence may lawfully be compounded.

question: कुन केसहरूमा धारा २१३ र २१४ को प्रावधानहरू विस्तार हुँदैनन्?
answer: धारा 213 र 214 को प्रावधानहरूले कुनै पनि मामलामा विस्तार गर्दैन जसमा अपराधलाई कानुनी रूपमा कम्पाउन्ड गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: To what cases do the provisions of sections 213 and 214 not extend?
answer_en: The provisions of sections 213 and 214 do not extend to any case in which the offence may lawfully be compounded.

question: दश वर्ष नबढाई कैद सजाय हुने कसुरमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कसुरको लागि दिइएको विवरण अनुसारको कैद सजाय हुनेछ जुन कसुरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको कैदको एक चौथाई भागसम्म हुन सक्छ, वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if the offence is punishable with imprisonment not extending to ten years?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of imprisonment provided for the offence, or with fine, or with both.

question: दश वर्षभन्दा लामो कैद सजाय तोकिएको अपराध गरेको व्यक्तिलाई कैद वा अन्य सजायको अवधि के हो?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कसुरको लागि दिइएको विवरण अनुसारको कैद सजाय हुनेछ जुन कसुरको लागि प्रदान गरिएको सबैभन्दा लामो अवधिको कैदको एक चौथाई भागसम्म हुन सक्छ, वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the term of imprisonment or other penalties for someone who has committed an offence for which the longest term of imprisonment provided does not exceed ten years?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence for a term which may extend to one-fourth part of the longest term of imprisonment provided for the offence, or with fine, or with both.

question: मृत्युदण्डको सजाय भएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if the offence is punishable with death?
answer_en: The person will be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: जरिवाना र सात वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्ने कसुरको सजाय के हो ?
answer: अपराध मृत्युदण्डको सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for an offence that is liable to fine and imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years?
answer_en: The offence is punishable with death.

question: कसुरमा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय भएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if the offence is punishable with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment which may extend to ten years?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद र जरिवानाको दायित्व पनि समावेश हुने गरी सजाय हुने कसूरको सजाय के हो?
answer: कसुरमा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for an offence that is punishable with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and also includes a liability to a fine?
answer_en: The offence is punishable with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment which may extend to ten years.

question: यस संहिताको दफा 215 अन्तर्गत चोरी भएको सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न मद्दत गर्न उपहार लिँदा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: अपराधीलाई पक्रन र कसुरमा दोषी ठहराउनको लागि व्यक्तिले आफ्नो शक्तिमा सबै माध्यम प्रयोग नगरेमा, सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for taking a gift to help recover stolen property under section 215 of this code?
answer_en: Unless the person uses all means in his power to cause the offender to be apprehended and convicted of the offence, the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: यस संहिताको दफा 215 अन्तर्गत चोरी भएको सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न मद्दत गर्न उपहार लिएर अपराधीलाई पक्राउ गर्न र दोषी ठहराउनको लागि कुनै व्यक्तिले आफ्नो शक्तिमा सबै माध्यमहरू प्रयोग गर्दैन भने के हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवैसँग हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What happens if a person does not use all means in his power to cause the offender to be apprehended and convicted after taking a gift to help recover stolen property under section 215 of this code?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: संहिताको दफा २१६ बमोजिम हिरासतबाट फरार भएको वा पक्राउ पर्ने आदेश भएको अपराधीलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्ति हिरासतमा रहेको वा पक्राउ गर्न आदेश दिइएको अपराधको गम्भीरताको आधारमा सजाय फरक हुन्छ। मृत्युदण्डको अपराधको लागि, सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि वर्णनको अवधिको लागि कैद हो जुन सात वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना हुन सक्छ। कसुरमा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने भएमा तीन वर्षसम्मका लागि, जरिवानासहित वा नतिरिकन कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ। एक वर्षसम्म नभई दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने कसुर भएमा त्यस्तो व्यक्तिलाई कसुरको विवरण अनुसार कैद सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for harbouring an offender who has escaped from custody or whose apprehension has been ordered under section 216 of the code?
answer_en: The punishment varies based on the severity of the offence for which the person was in custody or is ordered to be apprehended. For a capital offence, the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and liable to fine. If the offence is punishable with imprisonment for life or imprisonment for ten years, the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, with or without fine. If the offence is punishable with imprisonment which may extend to one year and not to ten years, the person shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence.

question: संहिताको दफा २१६ बमोजिम मृत्युदण्डको कसुरमा थुनामा रहेका अपराधीलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद वा १० वर्षसम्म कैद वा १० वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने कसूरलाई के विशेष सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कैपिटल कसुरको लागि हिरासतमा रहेका अपराधीलाई शरण दिएमा, सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि वर्णनको अवधिको लागि सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना हुन सक्छ। कसुरदार आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने कसूरमा हिरासतमा भएमा, जरिवाना सहित वा नतिरिकन तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद सजाय हो। कसुरदार एक वर्ष नभई दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने कसूरमा थुनामा रहेको भएमा उसलाई शरण दिने व्यक्तिलाई कसुरको विवरण अनुसार कैद सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the specific punishment for harbouring an offender who was in custody for a capital offence, an offence punishable with life imprisonment or imprisonment for ten years, or an offence punishable with imprisonment for up to a year and not to ten years, as per section 216 of the code?
answer_en: For harbouring an offender who was in custody for a capital offence, the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and liable to fine. If the offender was in custody for an offence punishable with imprisonment for life or imprisonment for ten years, the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, with or without fine. If the offender was in custody for an offence punishable with imprisonment which may extend to one year and not to ten years, the person harbouring him shall be punished with imprisonment of the description provided for the offence.

question: चोरीको सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न मद्दत गर्न उपहार लिएपछि सजायबाट बच्न व्यक्तिले के गर्नुपर्छ?
answer: अपराधीलाई पक्राउ गर्न र अपराधको अभियोगमा सजाय दिनको लागि व्यक्तिले आफ्नो शक्तिमा भएका सबै साधनहरू प्रयोग गर्नुपर्छ।
question_en: What does a person need to do to avoid punishment after taking a gift to help recover stolen property?
answer_en: The person must use all means in his power to cause the offender to be apprehended and convicted of the offence.

question: सजायबाट बच्न चोरी भएको सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न मद्दत गर्न उपहार लिएपछि व्यक्तिले के गर्नुपर्छ?
answer: अपराधीलाई पक्राउ गर्न र अपराधको अभियोगमा सजाय दिनको लागि व्यक्तिले आफ्नो शक्तिमा भएका सबै साधनहरू प्रयोग गर्नुपर्छ।
question_en: What must a person do after taking a gift to help recover stolen property to avoid punishment?
answer_en: The person must use all means in his power to cause the offender to be apprehended and convicted of the offence.

question: संहिताको धारा २१६ अन्तर्गत 'आश्रय दिने अपराधी' भन्नाले के बुझिन्छ?
answer: आश्रय दिने अपराधी भन्नाले कसैलाई बुझाउँछ जसले अपराधी भाग्ने वा पक्राउ गर्न आदेश दिएको थाहा पाएर उसलाई पक्राउ गर्नबाट रोक्ने नियतले आश्रय दिन्छ वा लुकाउँछ।
question_en: What does 'harbouring offender' mean under Section 216 of the code?
answer_en: Harbouring offender refers to someone who, knowing of the offender's escape or order for apprehension, shelters or hides that person with the intention of preventing him from being apprehended.

question: 'आश्रय दिने अपराधी' कसलाई मानिन्छ?
answer: अपराधी भाग्ने वा पक्राउ गर्न आदेश दिएको थाहा पाएर पक्राउ हुन नदिने मनसायले आश्रय दिने वा लुकाउने व्यक्तिलाई 'शरणकर्ता' मानिन्छ।
question_en: Who is considered as 'harbouring offender'?
answer_en: Someone who, knowing of the offender's escape or order for apprehension, shelters or hides that person with the intention of preventing him from being apprehended is considered as 'harbouring offender'.

question: लुटेरा वा डाँकालाई आश्रय दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: डाँका वा डाँकालाई शरण दिनेलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the penalty for harbouring robbers or dacoits?
answer_en: The penalty for harbouring robbers or dacoits is rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: डाँका वा डाँकालाई आश्रय दिनेलाई कैद र जरिवाना के हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय कठोर कैद हो जुन उत्तरदायी जरिवाना सहित सात वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who harbors robbers or dacoits, in terms of imprisonment and fines?
answer_en: The punishment is rigorous imprisonment which may extend up to seven years, along with a liable fine.

question: यस सन्दर्भमा 'अपराध' शब्दमा के समावेश छ?
answer: 'अपराध' शब्दले कुनै पनि काम वा छुट समावेश गर्दछ जसमा कुनै व्यक्ति भारत बाहिर दोषी भएको आरोप लगाइएको छ, जुन यदि भारतमा दोषी भएको भए, अपराधको रूपमा दण्डनीय हुने थियो।
question_en: What is included in the term 'Offence' in this context?
answer_en: The term 'Offence' includes any act or omission of which a person is alleged to have been guilty out of India, which, if he had been guilty of it in India, would have been punishable as an offence.

question: भारतमा गरेको खण्डमा भारतीय कानून अनुसार कुन कार्य वा भूललाई ​​'अपराध' मानिनेछ?
answer: कुनै व्यक्ति भारत बाहिर दोषी भएको कथित कुनै कार्य वा छाडना, यदि उनी भारतमा दोषी भएको भए, अपराधको रूपमा दण्डनीय हुने थियो।
question_en: What act or omission, if committed in India, would be considered as an 'Offence' according to Indian law?
answer_en: Any act or omission of which a person is alleged to have been guilty out of India, if he had been guilty of it in India, would have been punishable as an offence.

question: प्रावधानमा के अपवादहरू छन्?
answer: बन्दरगाह वा लुकाउने व्यक्तिको पति वा पत्नीले पक्राउ गर्ने वा अपराध गर्ने मुद्दामा यो प्रावधान विस्तारित हुँदैन।
question_en: What are the exceptions to the provision?
answer_en: The provision does not extend to the case in which the harbour or concealment is by the husband or wife of the person to be apprehended or the offender.

question: बन्दरगाह वा लुकाउने मामिलामा यो प्रावधान कसलाई लागू हुँदैन?
answer: पक्राउ पर्ने वा अपराध गर्ने व्यक्तिको पति वा पत्नीलाई यो प्रावधान लागू हुँदैन।
question_en: To whom does the provision not extend in case of harbour or concealment?
answer_en: The provision does not extend to the husband or wife of the person to be apprehended or the offender.

question: व्यक्तिलाई सजाय वा सम्पत्ति जफत हुनबाट जोगाउने उद्देश्यले कानूनको निर्देशन नमान्ने जनसेवकले के जोखिम लिन्छ?
answer: दण्ड संहिताले यस अंशमा विशेष सजाय प्रदान गर्दैन।
question_en: What does a public servant risk for disobeying direction of law with intent to save person from punishment or property from forfeiture?
answer_en: The penal code does not provide specific punishments in this excerpt.

question: के दण्ड संहिताले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई सजाय वा सम्पत्ति जफत हुनबाट बचाउने उद्देश्यले कानूनको निर्देशन नमान्ने निजामती कर्मचारीलाई विशेष सजायको व्यवस्था गरेको छ?
answer: होइन, दण्ड संहिताले यस अंशमा विशेष सजायहरू प्रदान गर्दैन।
question_en: Does the penal code provide specific punishments for a public servant who disobeys the direction of law with the intent to save a person from punishment or property from forfeiture?
answer_en: No, the penal code does not provide specific punishments in this excerpt.

question: यस्तो कसुरमा कति लामो जेल सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: यस्तो कसुरमा सबैभन्दा लामो कैदको अवधि यस अंशमा निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the term of the longest imprisonment provided for such offence?
answer_en: The term of the longest imprisonment provided for such offence is not specified in this excerpt.

question: यस्तो कसुरमा सबैभन्दा लामो कैदको अवधि यस अंशमा निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छ?
answer: होइन, यस्तो अपराधको लागि दिइएको सबैभन्दा लामो कैदको अवधि यस अंशमा निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छैन।
question_en: Is the term of the longest imprisonment provided for such offence specified in this excerpt?
answer_en: No, the term of the longest imprisonment provided for such offence is not specified in this excerpt.

question: कसैलाई कानुनी सजायबाट जोगाउन वा कम सजायको अधीनमा बस्न जानीजानी आचरण गर्ने निजामती कर्मचारीलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a public servant who intentionally conducts himself in a way to save someone from legal punishment or subject them to less punishment?
answer_en: The public servant shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीले जानाजानी कसैलाई कानुनी सजायबाट जोगाउन वा कम सजायको दायरामा ल्याउने गरी आचरण गरेमा त्यसको सम्भावित परिणाम के हुन सक्छ ?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What could be the possible consequences if a public servant intentionally conducts himself in a way to save someone from legal punishment or subject them to less punishment?
answer_en: The public servant shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.
