answer: अधिकतम अवधि दुई वर्षसम्म साधारण कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवै हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum term, fine, or both, for someone who is punished for negligently allowing a person charged or convicted of an offence to escape from confinement?
answer_en: The maximum term is up to two years of simple imprisonment, or a fine, or both.

question: जानाजानी आफ्नो कानुनी आशंकामा बाधा पुर्‍याउने वा हिरासतबाट भाग्न खोज्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person who intentionally obstructs his lawful apprehension or attempts to escape from custody?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: जानाजानी आफ्नो कानुनी आशंकामा बाधा पुर्‍याएको वा हिरासतबाट भाग्न खोजेको दोषी ठहरिएको व्यक्तिलाई के सम्भावित सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिले दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय भोग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential punishment for someone who has been found guilty of intentionally obstructing their lawful apprehension or trying to escape from custody?
answer_en: The individual may face imprisonment of either description for a term which could extend to two years, or a fine, or both.

question: के अवरोधको सजाय व्यक्तिलाई अभियोग लगाइएको मूल अपराधको सजाय भन्दा फरक छ?
answer: हो, यस दफाको सजाय त्यो सजायको अतिरिक्त हो जसको लागि पक्राउ वा थुनामा राखिएको व्यक्तिलाई आरोप लगाइएको वा जुन अपराधको लागि दोषी ठहरिएको थियो।
question_en: Is the punishment for obstruction separate from the punishment for the original offence the person was charged with?
answer_en: Yes, the punishment in this section is in addition to the punishment for which the person to be apprehended or detained in custody was liable for the offence with which he was charged, or of which he was convicted.

question: के यस दफामा उल्लिखित सजाय बाधा पुर्‍याउने सजायको अतिरिक्त हो कि पक्राउ वा हिरासतमा रहेको व्यक्तिलाई आरोप लगाइएको वा दोषी ठहरिएको अपराधको लागि जिम्मेवार छ?
answer: हो, अवरोधको सजाय व्यक्तिलाई अभियोग लगाइएको मौलिक अपराधको सजाय भन्दा फरक छ।
question_en: Is the punishment mentioned in this section for obstruction in addition to the punishment that the person being apprehended or detained was liable for the offence they were charged with or convicted of?
answer_en: Yes, the punishment for obstruction is separate from the punishment for the original offence the person was charged with.

question: अर्काको कानुनी पक्रनमा अवरोध गर्ने वा हिरासतबाट छुटाउन खोज्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person who obstructs the lawful apprehension of another person or attempts to rescue them from custody?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिको कानुनी आशंकामा अवरोध गर्ने वा हिरासतबाट छुटाउन खोज्ने व्यक्तिलाई कानूनले के भन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What does the law say about a person who obstructs the lawful apprehension of another person or attempts to rescue them from custody?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: पक्राउ पर्ने वा उद्धार गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने कसुर लागेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if the person to be apprehended, or rescued, is charged with an offence punishable with imprisonment for life or a term which may extend to ten years?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद सजाय हुने कसुरमा अभियोग लागेका व्यक्तिलाई पक्रन वा उद्धार गर्ने प्रयास गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who attempts to apprehend or rescue a person charged with an offence punishable with imprisonment for life or a term which may extend to ten years?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: पक्राउ पर्ने वा उद्धार गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्डको सजाय हुने अपराधको अभियोग लागेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कैद सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if the person to be apprehended, or rescued, is charged with an offence punishable with death?
answer_en: Shall be punished with imprisonment.

question: मृत्युदण्डको सजाय हुने अपराधको अभियोग लागेका व्यक्तिलाई पक्रन वा उद्धार गर्न खोज्ने व्यक्तिको परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: उनीहरुलाई कैद सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the consequence for a person who tries to apprehend or rescue someone charged with an offence punishable with death?
answer_en: They shall be punished with imprisonment.

question: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय भोग्नुपर्ने व्यक्तिलाई बचाउन खोज्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो जुन सात वर्षसम्म पुग्न सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person attempting to rescue someone who is liable to imprisonment for life?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय भोग्नुपर्ने व्यक्तिलाई बचाउन खोज्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम सजाय र थप दायित्व के हो?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence and additional liability for someone who attempts to rescue a person who is liable to life imprisonment?
answer_en: The maximum sentence is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and the person is also liable to a fine.

question: मृत्युदण्डको सजाय भोगिरहेका व्यक्तिलाई बचाउन खोज्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्ष नबढ्ने अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्ने छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person attempting to rescue someone who is under sentence of death?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life or imprisonment of either description for a term not exceeding ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: मृत्युदण्डको सजाय भोगिरहेका व्यक्तिलाई भाग्न मद्दत गर्न खोजेको दोषीलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कैद वा दश वर्ष भन्दा बढी कैद हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What is the sentence for someone who is found guilty of trying to help a person escape who is under a death sentence?
answer_en: The sentence is life imprisonment or imprisonment not exceeding ten years, and the person can also be fined.

question: धारा 225A के कार्यहरू सम्बन्धित छ?
answer: धारा 225A ले सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई पक्रन नछोड्ने, वा भाग्ने पीडासँग सम्बन्धित छ, अन्यथा प्रदान नगरिएको अवस्थामा।
question_en: What actions does section 225A pertain to?
answer_en: Section 225A pertains to the omission to apprehend, or sufferance of escape, on part of a public servant, in cases not otherwise provided for.

question: कानूनको कुन दफाले अन्यथा व्यवस्था नभएको अवस्थामा सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई पक्राउ गर्न छोड्ने वा भाग्नु पर्ने कुरासँग सम्बन्धित छ?
answer: धारा 225A यससँग सम्बन्धित छ।
question_en: Which section of law pertains to the omission to apprehend, or sufferance of escape, on part of a public servant, in cases not otherwise provided for?
answer_en: Section 225A pertains to this.

question: धारा 225A मा परिभाषित गरिए अनुसार सार्वजनिक सेवकको जिम्मेवारी के हो?
answer: दफा 221, दफा 222 वा दफा 223, वा हालको लागि प्रचलित अन्य कुनै कानूनमा व्यवस्था नभएको कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई पक्रन वा थुनामा राख्न निजामती कर्मचारी कानुनी रूपमा बाध्य छ।
question_en: What is the responsibility of a public servant as defined in section 225A?
answer_en: The public servant is legally bound to apprehend, or to keep in confinement, any person in any case not provided for in section 221, section 222 or section 223, or in any other law for the time being in force.

question: दफा २२१, दफा २२२ वा दफा २२३ वा हालका लागि प्रचलित अन्य कुनै कानूनमा व्यवस्था नभएको कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई निजामति कर्मचारी कानुनी रूपमा पक्राउ गर्न वा थुनामा राख्न बाध्य छ भनी कानूनको कुन दफामा परिभाषित छ?
answer: यो धारा 225A मा परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: In which section of the law is it defined that a public servant is legally bound to apprehend, or to keep in confinement, any person in cases not provided for in section 221, section 222 or section 223, or in any other law for the time being in force?
answer_en: This is defined in section 225A.

question: जानाजानी कैदबाट उम्कन कसैलाई सहयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for intentionally aiding someone to escape from confinement?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine or with both.

question: जानीजानी अर्कालाई कैदबाट उम्कन मद्दत गरेकोमा दोषी पाइएमा के सजाय हुन सक्छ?
answer: दण्ड भनेको तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको विवरणको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What can be the penalty for someone found guilty of intentionally helping another person to escape from confinement?
answer_en: The penalty is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine or with both.

question: लापरवाहीपूर्वक कसैलाई कैदबाट भाग्न मद्दत गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको दुई वर्षसम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for negligently aiding someone to escape from confinement?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: दुई वर्षसम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजायलाई सजायको रूपमा के बुझिन्छ?
answer: यसले लापरवाहीपूर्वक कसैलाई कैदबाट उम्कन मद्दत गरेको सजायलाई जनाउँछ।
question_en: What does simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both, refer to in terms of punishment?
answer_en: It refers to the punishment for negligently aiding someone to escape from confinement.

question: कानुनी आशंकामा प्रतिरोध वा अवरोध गर्ने, भाग्ने वा उद्धार गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: दण्ड भनेको छ महिनासम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for resistance or obstruction to lawful apprehension, or escape or rescue?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: कानुनी आशंकाको प्रतिरोध गर्ने वा अवरोध गर्ने, भाग्ने वा उद्धारमा सहजीकरण गर्ने कसैलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: सम्भावित दण्डहरू या त वर्णनको एक अवधिको लागि कैद हुन् जुन छ महिनासम्म विस्तार हुन सक्छ, वा जरिवाना वा दुवैसँग।
question_en: What may be the possible penalties for someone who resists or obstructs lawful apprehension, or escapes or facilitates a rescue?
answer_en: The possible penalties are imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: सजाय माफीको शर्त उल्लङ्घन गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको त्यो सजाय हो जुन व्यक्तिलाई सुरुमा सजाय दिइएको थियो, यदि उसले पहिले नै त्यो सजायको कुनै अंश भोगेको छैन भने, र यदि उसले त्यो सजायको कुनै अंश भोगेको छ भने, त्यो सजायको यति धेरै सजाय उसले भोगेको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for violating the condition of remission of punishment?
answer_en: The punishment is the punishment to which the person was originally sentenced, if he has already suffered no part of that punishment, and if he has suffered any part of that punishment, then with so much of that punishment as he has not already suffered.

question: सजाय तोकिएको र दण्डमा छुट दिइएको तर त्यस माफीका शर्तहरू उल्लङ्घन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिले सजाय पाउँछ जुन उनीहरूलाई सुरुमा सजाय दिइएको थियो, यदि उनीहरूले पहिले नै त्यो सजायको कुनै अंश भोगेका छैनन्। यदि उनीहरूले त्यो सजायको कुनै अंश भोगेका छन् भने, उनीहरूले त्यो सजायको यति धेरै पाउँछन् कि उनीहरूले पहिले नै भोगेका छैनन्।
question_en: What happens to a person who was sentenced and given remission of punishment but violates the conditions of that remission?
answer_en: The person receives the punishment to which they were originally sentenced, if they have already suffered no part of that punishment. If they have suffered any part of that punishment, then they receive so much of that punishment as they have not already suffered.

question: न्यायिक कारबाहीका क्रममा सरकारी कर्मचारीलाई जानाजानी अपमान वा अवरोध गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवानाको सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for intentionally insulting or interrupting a public servant during a judicial proceeding?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees.

question: न्यायिक कारबाहीका क्रममा कसैले जानाजानी राष्ट्रसेवकको अपमान वा अवरोध गरेमा त्यसको सम्भावित परिणाम के हुन सक्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवानाको सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What could be the possible consequences if someone intentionally insults or interrupts a public servant during a judicial proceeding?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees.

question: कतिपय अपराधका पीडितको पहिचान खुलासा गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कतिपय कसुरको पीडितको पहिचान खुलासा गर्ने सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for disclosing the identity of a victim of certain offences?
answer_en: The punishment for disclosing the identity of a victim of certain offences is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कैद र जरिवानाको सर्तमा कसैले निश्चित अपराधको पीडितको पहिचान खुलासा गरेमा परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: कतिपय अपराधको पीडितको पहिचान खुलासा गरेमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना तिर्न सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the consequence if someone discloses the identity of a victim of certain offences, in terms of imprisonment and fines?
answer_en: The consequence of disclosing the identity of a victim of certain offences is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years and the person shall also be liable to a fine.

question: कुन अवस्थामा पीडितको पहिचान बताउन सकिन्छ?
answer: प्रहरी चौकीका इन्चार्ज वा प्रहरी अधिकृतले त्यस्तो अनुसन्धानको प्रयोजनका लागि असल नियतले त्यस्तो अपराधको अनुसन्धान गरिरहेको लिखित आदेशमा भएमा पीडितको पहिचान बताउन सकिन्छ; वा द्वारा, वा पीडितको लिखित अधिकारको साथ; वा जहाँ पीडित मृत वा नाबालिग वा अस्वस्थ दिमागको छ भने, पीडितको आफन्तले वा लिखित रूपमा अख्तियारी लिएर।
question_en: Under what conditions can the identity of the victim be made known?
answer_en: The identity of the victim can be made known if it's under the order in writing of the officer-in-charge of the police station or the police officer making the investigation into such offence acting in good faith for the purposes of such investigation; or by, or with the authorisation in writing of, the victim; or where the victim is dead or minor or of unsound mind, by, or with the authorisation in writing of, the next of kin of the victim.

question: पीडित मृतक, नाबालिग वा अस्वस्थ दिमाग भएको अवस्थामा पीडितको पहिचान खुलाउन कसले अधिकार दिन सक्छ?
answer: पीडितको मृत्यु भएको अवस्थामा, नाबालिग वा अस्वस्थ दिमाग भएको अवस्थामा, उनीहरूको पहिचान पीडितको आफन्तले वा लिखित रूपमा अख्तियारी दिएर खुलासा गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: Who can authorize the disclosure of a victim's identity in cases where the victim is deceased, a minor, or of unsound mind?
answer_en: In cases where the victim is dead, a minor, or of unsound mind, their identity can be disclosed by, or with the authorisation in writing of, the next of kin of the victim.

question: पीडितको पहिचान रिहाइको लागि आफन्तले कसलाई अधिकार दिन सक्छ?
answer: आफन्तले कुनै मान्यता प्राप्त कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संस्थाको अध्यक्ष वा सचिवलाई जुनसुकै नामले पनि अख्तियारी दिन सक्नेछ।
question_en: Who can the next of kin give authorisation to for the release of the victim's identity?
answer_en: The next of kin can give authorisation to the chairman or the secretary, by whatever name called, of any recognised welfare institution or organisation.

question: कुनै मान्यता प्राप्त कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संस्थाको अध्यक्ष वा सचिवले पीडितको परिचय खुलाउनको लागि कसबाट अधिकार प्राप्त गर्न सक्छ?
answer: कुनै मान्यता प्राप्त कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संस्थाको अध्यक्ष वा सचिवले जुनसुकै नामले बोलाए पनि आफन्तबाट अख्तियारी लिन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: Who can the chairman or the secretary of any recognised welfare institution or organisation receive authorisation from for the release of a victim's identity?
answer_en: The chairman or the secretary, by whatever name called, of any recognised welfare institution or organisation can receive authorisation from the next of kin.

question: मान्यता प्राप्त कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संस्था के हो?
answer: एक मान्यता प्राप्त कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संगठन एक सामाजिक कल्याण संस्था वा संगठन हो जुन यस तर्फ केन्द्र वा राज्य सरकार द्वारा मान्यता प्राप्त छ।
question_en: What is a recognised welfare institution or organisation?
answer_en: A recognised welfare institution or organisation is a social welfare institution or organisation recognised in this behalf by the Central or State Government.

question: सामाजिक कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संस्थालाई मान्यता प्राप्त कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संस्थाको रूपमा कसले मान्यता दिन्छ?
answer: एक सामाजिक कल्याण संस्था वा संगठन केन्द्र वा राज्य सरकार द्वारा एक कल्याणकारी संस्था वा संगठन को रूप मा मान्यता प्राप्त छ।
question_en: Who recognises a social welfare institution or organisation as a recognised welfare institution or organisation?
answer_en: A social welfare institution or organisation is recognised as a welfare institution or organisation by the Central or State Government.

question: अदालतको पूर्व अनुमति बिना उपदफा (१) मा उल्लिखित कसुरको सजाय के हो?
answer: कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for the offence referred to in sub-section (1) without previous permission of the court?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years and shall also be liable to fine.

question: उपदफा (१) बमोजिम अदालतको पूर्व अनुमति बिना कुनै अपराध गरेमा के दण्डनीय परिणाम हुन सक्छ?
answer: कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What can be the penal consequences of committing an offence without previous permission of the court under sub-section (1)?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कुनै पनि उच्च अदालत वा सर्वोच्च अदालतको फैसला छाप्नु वा प्रकाशन गर्नुको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यस खण्डको अर्थ भित्रको अपराध।
question_en: What does the printing or publication of the judgment of any High Court or the Supreme Court not amount to?
answer_en: An offence within the meaning of this section.

question: यस खण्डको अर्थमा अपराध नमान्ने कुरालाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: कुनै उच्च अदालत वा सर्वोच्च अदालतको फैसला छाप्ने वा प्रकाशन गर्ने
question_en: What is the term for something that does not amount to an offence within the meaning of this section?
answer_en: The printing or publication of the judgment of any High Court or the Supreme Court

question: न्यायाधीश वा मूल्याङ्कन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for personation of a juror or assessor?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्ने अपराधको सम्भावित सजाय के हुन सक्छ?
answer: न्यायाधीश वा मूल्याङ्कनकर्ताको व्यक्तित्व
question_en: What could be the possible punishment for a crime that could extend up to two years of imprisonment, or with fine, or with both?
answer_en: Personation of a juror or assessor

question: जमानत वा धरौटीमा रिहा भएका व्यक्तिलाई अदालतमा उपस्थित हुन नसकेकोमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनसक्ने कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद।
question_en: What is the punishment for failure by person released on bail or bond to appear in court?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: जमानत वा धरौटीमा रिहा भएको तर अदालतमा हाजिर हुन नसकेका व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ ?
answer: एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनसक्ने कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for a person who has been released on bail or bond but fails to appear in court?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: धारा 229A अन्तर्गत के सजाय पूर्वाग्रह होइन?
answer: धरौटी जफत गर्न आदेश दिने अदालतको शक्ति।
question_en: What does the punishment under section 229A not prejudice?
answer_en: The power of the court to order forfeiture of the bond.

question: धरौटी जफत गर्ने आदेश दिने अदालतको अधिकार कुन दफा अन्तर्गत छ ?
question_en: Under which section is the power of the court to order forfeiture of the bond not prejudiced?
answer_en: Section 229A

question: धारा 230 मा 'सिक्का' लाई कसरी परिभाषित गरिएको छ?
answer: सिक्का कुनै समयको लागि पैसाको रूपमा प्रयोग हुने धातु हो, र त्यसरी प्रयोग गर्नको लागि कुनै राज्य वा सार्वभौम शक्तिको अख्तियारद्वारा छाप लगाइन्छ र जारी गरिन्छ।
question_en: How is 'Coin' defined in section 230?
answer_en: Coin is metal used for the time being as money, and stamped and issued by the authority of some State or Sovereign Power in order to be so used.

question: धारा 230 बमोजिम कुनै राज्य वा सार्वभौम शक्तिको अख्तियारद्वारा मुद्राको रूपमा प्रयोग गरिएको, छाप लगाइएको र जारी गरिएको धातुको परिभाषा के हो?
answer: 'सिक्का' शब्दलाई खण्ड २३० मा परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What is the definition of a metal used as money, stamped and issued by the authority of some State or Sovereign Power for its use as such, as per section 230?
answer_en: The term 'Coin' is defined as such in section 230.

question: भारतीय सिक्का के हो?
answer: भारतीय सिक्का धातुको छाप लगाइन्छ र भारत सरकारको अख्तियारद्वारा जारी गरिन्छ।
question_en: What is an Indian coin?
answer_en: Indian coin is metal stamped and issued by the authority of the Government of India.

question: भारत सरकारको अख्तियारद्वारा जारी गरिएको धातुलाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: भारतीय सिक्का धातुको छाप लगाइन्छ र भारत सरकारको अख्तियारद्वारा जारी गरिन्छ।
question_en: What is metal stamped and issued by the authority of the Government of India?
answer_en: An Indian coin is metal stamped and issued by the authority of the Government of India.

question: दृष्टान्त अनुसार सिक्का मानिदैन?
answer: काउरी, पैसाको रूपमा प्रयोग गरिएको छापरहित तामाको गाँठो र पदकलाई सिक्काको रूपमा लिइँदैन।
question_en: What is not considered as a coin according to the illustrations?
answer_en: Cowries, lumps of unstamped copper used as money, and medals are not considered as coins.

question: काउरी, पैसाको रूपमा प्रयोग गरिएको अनस्ट्याम्प गरिएको तामाको गाँठो, र दृष्टान्त अनुसार पदकहरू के हुन्?
answer: तिनीहरूलाई सिक्का रूपमा मानिने छैन।
question_en: What are cowries, lumps of unstamped copper used as money, and medals considered as according to the illustrations?
answer_en: They are not considered as coins.

question: नक्कली सिक्कालाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: नक्कली सिक्काको सजाय सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for counterfeiting coin?
answer_en: The punishment for counterfeiting coin is imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years and a fine.

question: सिक्का जालसाजीको लागि अधिकतम कैद अवधि र सम्भावित अतिरिक्त परिणाम के हो?
answer: सिक्का नक्कली गरेमा अधिकतम सात वर्षको जेल सजाय र जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term and potential additional consequence for coin counterfeiting?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term for coin counterfeiting is seven years and it may also include a fine.

question: भारतीय सिक्का नक्कली गर्नेलाई के हुन्छ सजाय ?
answer: भारतीय सिक्का नक्कली गरेमा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for counterfeiting Indian coin?
answer_en: The punishment for counterfeiting Indian coin is imprisonment for life or imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and a fine.

question: नक्कली भारतीय सिक्काको लागि अधिकतम कैद र सम्भावित थप जरिवाना कति छ?
answer: नक्कली भारतीय सिक्काको लागि अधिकतम जेल सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र सम्भावित अतिरिक्त जरिवाना छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term and potential additional penalty for counterfeiting Indian coin?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term for counterfeiting Indian coin is imprisonment for life or a term which may extend to ten years, and a potential additional penalty is a fine.

question: नक्कली सिक्का बनाउन वा बिक्री गर्ने औजारसँग सम्बन्धित अपराध के हो?
answer: नक्कली सिक्का बनाउने प्रयोजनका लागि कुनै पनि मर वा उपकरण बनाउन वा मर्मत गर्ने वा निर्माण गर्ने वा मर्मत गर्ने प्रक्रियाको कुनै भाग वा खरिद, बिक्री वा डिस्पोज गर्नु अपराध हो।
question_en: What is the offense related to making or selling instrument for counterfeiting coin?
answer_en: Making or mending, or performing any part of the process of making or mending, or buying, selling or disposing of any die or instrument for the purpose of counterfeiting coin is an offense.

question: नक्कली सिक्का बनाउने उद्देश्यका लागि कुनै पनि मर वा उपकरण बनाउन वा सुधार गर्ने, वा किन्न, बेच्ने वा डिस्पोज गर्ने प्रक्रियाको कुनै पनि भाग गर्ने अपराध के हो?
answer: यो नक्कली सिक्काको लागि उपकरण बनाउन वा बेच्न सम्बन्धित अपराध हो।
question_en: What constitutes the crime of making or mending, or performing any part of the process of making or mending, or buying, selling or disposing of any die or instrument for the purpose of counterfeiting coin?
answer_en: This is an offense related to making or selling instrument for counterfeiting coin.

question: भारतीय सिक्का केलाई मानिन्छ ?
answer: कम्पनीको रुपैया र फारुखाबाद रुपैया नामक सिक्का, जुन पहिले भारत सरकारको अख्तियारमा पैसाको रुपमा प्रयोग गरिन्थ्यो, लाई भारतीय सिक्का मानिन्छ।
question_en: What is considered as Indian coin?
answer_en: The coin denominated as the Company's rupee and the 'Farukhabad rupee', which was formerly used as money under the authority of the Government of India, are considered as Indian coin.

question: कम्पनीको रुपैया र फारुखाबाद रुपैया भनेर कुन सिक्का पहिले कुन सरकारको अख्तियारमा पैसाको रूपमा प्रयोग गरिन्थ्यो?
answer: कम्पनीको रुपैया र 'फारुखाबाद रुपैया' नामक सिक्का भारत सरकारको अख्तियारमा पैसाको रूपमा प्रयोग गरिन्थ्यो र यसलाई भारतीय सिक्का मानिन्छ।
question_en: Which coins denominated as the Company's rupee and the 'Farukhabad rupee' were previously used as money under the authority of which government?
answer_en: The coins denominated as the Company's rupee and the 'Farukhabad rupee' were used as money under the authority of the Government of India and are considered as Indian coins.

question: नक्कली सिक्का बनाउने उद्देश्यले कुनै उपकरण वा सामग्री प्रयोग गर्ने वा प्रयोग गर्ने उद्देश्यले के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद र जरिवाना पनि हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for using or intending to use any instrument or material for the purpose of counterfeiting coin?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and also a fine.

question: नक्कली सिक्का बनाउन कुनै उपकरण वा सामग्री प्रयोग गर्ने वा प्रयोग गर्ने योजना गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद र जरिवानाको सम्भावित अवधि कति छ?
answer: कैदको अवधि तीन वर्षसम्म हुन सक्छ, र त्यहाँ जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential duration of imprisonment and fine for someone who uses or plans to use any instrument or material for counterfeiting coins?
answer_en: The duration of imprisonment may extend to three years, and there may also be a fine.

question: भारतीय सिक्का नक्कली बनाउने औजार बनाउन वा बेच्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for making or selling an instrument for counterfeiting Indian coin?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and also a fine.

question: भारतीय सिक्काको नक्कली औजार बनाउन वा बिक्री गरेमा अधिकतम कैद र थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: अधिकतम सात वर्ष कैद र जरिवानाको व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and additional penalty for making or selling a counterfeiting instrument for Indian coin?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is seven years, and there is also a fine.

question: नक्कली सिक्काको लागि प्रयोग गर्ने नियतले कुनै उपकरण वा सामग्री राखेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद र जरिवाना पनि हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for possessing any instrument or material with the intention of using it for counterfeiting coin?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and also a fine.

question: नक्कली सामग्री राख्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद अवधि र थप जरिवानाको सर्तमा के सजाय हुन्छ?

question: धारा २५४ बमोजिम, प्रारम्भिक कब्जाको समयमा यसको परिवर्तनको बारेमा अनभिज्ञ रूपमा परिवर्तन गरिएको सिक्कालाई वास्तविक रूपमा वितरण गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सम्भावित जरिवाना छ?

question_en: What is the maximum duration of imprisonment or type of other punishment for someone who intentionally removes a government stamp from a document or erases writing from a substance bearing a government stamp in order to cause loss to the government?
answer_en: The maximum duration of imprisonment for someone who intentionally removes a government stamp from a document or erases writing from a substance bearing a government stamp in order to cause loss to the government is up to three years, and they may also be fined or both.

question: यसअघि सरकारलाई नोक्सान पु¥याउने उद्देश्यले प्रयोग भएको सरकारी छाप प्रयोग गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सरकारलाई नोक्सान पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्यले पहिले प्रयोग गरेको सरकारी छाप प्रयोग गरेमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for using a government stamp known to have been used before with intent to cause loss to the Government?
answer_en: The punishment for using a government stamp known to have been used before with intent to cause loss to the Government is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: सरकारलाई आर्थिक नोक्सान पुर्‍याउने प्रयासमा पहिले प्रयोग भइसकेको सरकारी टिकट प्रयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम सम्भावित सजाय के हुन सक्छ?
answer: सरकारलाई आर्थिक नोक्सान पुर्‍याउने प्रयासमा पहिले प्रयोग भइसकेको सरकारी छाप प्रयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम सम्भावित सजाय दुई वर्ष कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum possible sentence for someone who uses a government stamp known to have been used before in an attempt to cause financial loss to the Government?
answer_en: The maximum possible sentence for someone who uses a government stamp known to have been used before in an attempt to cause financial loss to the Government is two years of imprisonment, or a fine, or both.

question: टिकट प्रयोग भएको जनाउने चिन्ह मेटाउने वा हटाउने वा जानीजानी त्यस्तो टिकट बेच्ने वा निष्कासन गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: टिकट प्रयोग भएको जनाउने चिन्ह मेटाउने वा हटाउने वा जानीजानी त्यस्तो छाप बेच्ने वा खारेज गरेमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for erasing or removing a mark denoting that a stamp has been used, or knowingly selling or disposing of such a stamp?
answer_en: The punishment for erasing or removing a mark denoting that a stamp has been used, or knowingly selling or disposing of such a stamp is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले टिकट प्रयोग भएको छ भनी सङ्केत गर्ने चिन्ह मेटाउने वा हटाउने वा जानीजानी त्यस्तो टिकट बेच्ने वा नष्ट गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: कुनै व्यक्तिले टिकट प्रयोग भएको जनाउने चिन्ह मेटाउने वा हटाउने वा जानीजानी त्यस्तो छाप बेच्ने वा खारेज गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the possible sentence for a person who erases or removes a mark indicating that a stamp has been used, or knowingly sells or disposes of such a stamp?
answer_en: A person who erases or removes a mark that denotes a stamp has been used, or knowingly sells or disposes of such a stamp, may face imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: हुलाक प्रयोजनका लागि कुनै काल्पनिक टिकट बनाउन, उच्चारण गर्ने, कारोबार गर्ने, बेच्ने वा प्रयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for making, uttering, dealing in, selling, or using for postal purposes any fictitious stamp?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with fine which may extend to two hundred rupees.

question: हुलाक प्रयोजनका लागि कुनै काल्पनिक टिकट बनाउने, उच्चारण गर्ने, कारोबार गर्ने, बेच्ने वा प्रयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: अधिकतम जरिवाना दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum fine for a person making, uttering, dealing in, selling, or using for postal purposes any fictitious stamp?
answer_en: The maximum fine may extend to two hundred rupees.

question: यस सन्दर्भमा 'काल्पनिक टिकट' ले के बुझाउँछ?
answer: 'काल्पनिक टिकट' भन्नाले हुलाकको दर जनाउने उद्देश्यले सरकारले जारी गरेको झूटो रूपमा कुनै पनि टिकटलाई जनाउँछ, वा कागजमा वा अन्यथा, त्यस उद्देश्यका लागि सरकारले जारी गरेको कुनै टिकटको प्रतिकृति वा नक्कल वा प्रतिनिधित्व।
question_en: What does 'fictitious stamp' refer to in this context?
answer_en: A 'fictitious stamp' refers to any stamp falsely purporting to be issued by Government for the purpose of denoting a rate of postage, or any facsimile or imitation or representation, whether on paper or otherwise, of any stamp issued by Government for that purpose.

question: सरकारले जारी गरेको झूटा छापको उद्देश्य के हो, वा सरकारले जारी गरेको कुनै टिकटको कागजमा होस् वा अन्य कुनै प्रतिकृति वा नक्कल वा प्रतिनिधित्व?
answer: यस्तो टिकटको उद्देश्य हुलाकको दरलाई जनाउनु हो। यसलाई प्रायः 'काल्पनिक टिकट' भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is the purpose of a stamp falsely purporting to be issued by Government, or any facsimile or imitation or representation, whether on paper or otherwise, of any stamp issued by Government?
answer_en: The purpose of such a stamp is to denote a rate of postage. This is often referred to as a 'fictitious stamp'.

question: धारा २५५ देखि २६३ सम्म 'सरकार' शब्द कसलाई समावेश गरिएको छ?
answer: 'सरकार' शब्दले भारतको कुनै पनि भागमा, र महामहिमको शासनको कुनै पनि भागमा वा कुनै विदेशी देशमा कार्यकारी सरकार सञ्चालन गर्न कानूनद्वारा अधिकृत व्यक्ति वा व्यक्तिहरूलाई समावेश गर्दछ।
question_en: Who does the term 'Government' include in sections 255 to 263?
answer_en: The term 'Government' includes the person or persons authorized by law to administer executive government in any part of India, and also in any part of Her Majesty's dominions or in any foreign country.

question: 'सरकार' शब्दले भारतको कुनै पनि भाग, महामहिमको अधिराज्य वा कुनै विदेशी देशमा कार्यकारी सरकार सञ्चालन गर्न कानुनद्वारा अधिकार दिएको अवस्थामा के बुझिन्छ?
answer: धारा २५५ देखि २६३ मा 'सरकार' शब्दले त्यस्तो निकायलाई जनाउँछ।
question_en: What does the term 'Government' refer to when it is authorized by law to administer executive government in any part of India, Her Majesty's dominions or any foreign country?
answer_en: In sections 255 to 263, the term 'Government' refers to such an entity.

question: तौलका लागि नक्कली यन्त्र प्रयोग गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for fraudulently using a false instrument for weighing?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: तौलका लागि नक्कली यन्त्र प्रयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन सक्छ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि वर्णनको कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What may be the punishment for a person who fraudulently uses a false instrument for weighing?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or a fine, or both.

question: तौल र नापसँग सम्बन्धित अपराधलाई के मानिन्छ?
answer: कुनै पनि गलत तौल वा लम्बाइ वा क्षमताको गलत नापको जालसाजी प्रयोगलाई तौल र मापनसँग सम्बन्धित अपराध मानिन्छ।
question_en: What is considered an offence related to weights and measures?
answer_en: Fraudulent use of any false weight or false measure of length or capacity is considered an offence related to weights and measures.

question: तौल र नापको सम्बन्धमा कस्तो प्रकारको गतिविधिलाई धोखाधडी र आपत्तिजनक मानिन्छ?
answer: कुनै पनि गलत वजन वा लम्बाइ वा क्षमताको गलत नापको प्रयोगलाई तौल र नापको सम्बन्धमा धोखाधडी र आपत्तिजनक मानिन्छ।
question_en: What type of activity is considered fraudulent and offensive in relation to weights and measures?
answer_en: The use of any false weight or false measure of length or capacity is considered fraudulent and offensive in relation to weights and measures.

question: त्यो भन्दा फरक तौल वा नाप प्रयोग गर्दा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for using a different weight or measure from what it is?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: गलत तौल वा मापन प्रयोगको लागि सम्भावित दण्ड के हो?

question_en: What is the potential penalty for using an incorrect weight or measure?
answer_en: Imprisonment which may extend to one year, or a fine, or both.

answer: सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for being in possession of false weight or measure?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: कानून बमोजिम नक्कली तौल वा नाप लिएर कैदमा परेमा के हुन सक्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।

answer: सम्भावित परिणामहरू एक वर्षसम्म कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What could be the possible consequences of making or selling false weight or measure?
answer_en: The possible consequences are imprisonment which may extend to one year, or a fine, or both.

question: सार्वजनिक उपद्रव के हो?
answer: एक व्यक्ति सार्वजनिक उपद्रवको लागि दोषी छ जसले कुनै कार्य गर्दछ वा गैरकानूनी भूलको दोषी छ जसले सार्वजनिक वा वरपर बसोबास गर्ने वा सम्पत्ति कब्जा गर्ने मानिसहरूलाई सामान्य चोट, खतरा वा रिस उठाउँछ, वा जसले कुनै सार्वजनिक अधिकारको प्रयोग गर्न सक्ने व्यक्तिहरूलाई चोटपटक, अवरोध, खतरा वा अप्ठ्यारो निम्त्याउँछ।
question_en: What is a public nuisance?
answer_en: A person is guilty of a public nuisance who does any act or is guilty of an illegal omission which causes any common injury, danger or annoyance to the public or to the people in general who dwell or occupy property in the vicinity, or which must necessarily cause injury, obstruction, danger or annoyance to persons who may have occasion to use any public right.

question: सार्वजनिक उपद्रवको दोषी कसलाई मान्न सकिन्छ?
answer: सार्वजनिक अधिकारको प्रयोग गर्ने अवसर हुन सक्ने व्यक्तिहरूलाई चोटपटक, अवरोध, खतरा वा अप्ठ्यारो पार्ने व्यक्तिलाई वा वरपर बसोबास गर्ने वा बसोबास गर्ने सर्वसाधारणलाई सामान्य चोटपटक, खतरा वा रिस उठाउने कुनै काम गर्ने वा गैरकानूनी बेवास्ता गर्ने व्यक्ति।
question_en: Who can be considered guilty of a public nuisance?
answer_en: A person who does any act or is guilty of an illegal omission which causes any common injury, danger or annoyance to the public or to the people in general who dwell or occupy property in the vicinity, or which must necessarily cause injury, obstruction, danger or annoyance to persons who may have occasion to use any public right.

question: जीवनको लागि खतरनाक रोगको संक्रमण फैलिन सक्ने लापरवाही कार्यलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?

answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

answer: सम्भावित परिणामहरू छ महिनासम्म कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What might be the potential consequences for an act likely to spread a dangerous infectious disease due to negligence?
answer_en: The potential consequences could be imprisonment which may extend to six months, or a fine, or both.

question: जानीजानी जीवनको लागि खतरनाक रोग फैलाउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?

question_en: What is the punishment for someone who knowingly spreads a disease dangerous to life?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: जानीजानी ज्यान जोखिममा पार्ने रोग फैलाएको अभियोगमा दोषी ठहरिएका व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the possible sentence for someone who is found guilty of knowingly spreading a life-threatening disease?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: क्वारेन्टाइन नियम नमान्दा के परिणाम हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई छ महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the consequence for disobeying a quarantine rule?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: क्वारेन्टाइन नियम नमान्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई छ महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person who disobeys quarantine rules?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: बिक्री गर्ने उद्देश्यले खानेकुरा वा पेय पदार्थमा मिसावट गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?

question_en: What is the punishment for adulterating food or drink intended for sale?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.

question: बिक्रीको लागि बनाइएको खाना वा पेय पदार्थमा मिसावट गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद अवधि र सम्भावित जरिवाना रकमको हिसाबले के हुन सक्छ?
answer: त्यस्तो व्यक्तिलाई ६ महिनासम्म कैद, एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ ।

answer_en: The person may be punished with imprisonment for up to six months, a fine up to one thousand rupees, or both.

question: हानिकारक खानेकुरा वा पेय पदार्थ बेच्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: त्यस्तो व्यक्तिलाई छ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What happens to someone who sells noxious food or drink?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.

question: कुनै पनि औषधि वा चिकित्सा तयारीको प्रभावकारिता कम गर्ने वा सञ्चालन परिवर्तन गर्ने तरिकामा मिसावट गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?

question: कुनै पनि सार्वजनिक मुहान वा जलाशयको पानी स्वेच्छाले भ्रष्ट वा फोहोर गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?

answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is six months and the fine may extend to one thousand rupees.

question: जनावरको सम्बन्धमा लापरवाही आचरणको नतिजा के हो?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What are the consequences for negligent conduct with respect to an animal?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.

question: जनावरको सम्बन्धमा लापरवाही आचरणलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: छ महिनासम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for negligent conduct with respect to an animal?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.

question: संहिताले अन्यथा व्यवस्था नगरेको अवस्थामा सार्वजनिक उपद्रव गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: यस कार्यको सजाय दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for committing a public nuisance in cases not otherwise provided for by the Code?
answer_en: The punishment for this act is a fine which may extend to two hundred rupees.

question: संहिताले अन्यथा व्यवस्था नगरेको अवस्थामा सार्वजनिक उपद्रव गर्ने अधिकतम जरिवाना कति हो?
answer: यस कार्यको लागि अधिकतम जरिवाना दुई सय रुपैयाँ छ।
question_en: What is the maximum fine for committing a public nuisance in cases not otherwise provided for by the Code?
answer_en: The maximum fine for this act is two hundred rupees.

question: बन्द गर्न आदेश दिएपछि सार्वजनिक उपद्रव जारी राख्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: यो सजाय छ महिनासम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्ने साधारण कैद हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for continuing a public nuisance after injunction to discontinue?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with a fine, or with both.

question: यदि कसैले बन्द गर्न निर्देशन दिएपछि सार्वजनिक उपद्रव जारी राख्यो भने सम्भावित परिणामहरू के हुन सक्छ?
answer: सम्भावित नतिजाहरू एक अवधिको लागि साधारण कारावास हो जुन छ महिनासम्म विस्तार हुन सक्छ, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवै संग।
question_en: What could be the potential consequences if someone continues a public nuisance after being instructed to discontinue?
answer_en: The potential consequences are simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with a fine, or with both.

question: पाठ अनुसार के अश्लील मानिन्छ?
answer: कुनै पुस्तक, पर्चा, कागज, लेखन, रेखाचित्र, चित्रकला, प्रतिनिधित्व, चित्र वा अन्य कुनै पनि वस्तु लोभलाग्दो वा पूर्वहितका लागि अपील गर्ने वा त्यसको प्रभावले त्यसमा रहेको वा मूर्त विषय पढ्न, हेर्न वा सुन्ने सम्भावना भएका व्यक्तिहरूलाई भ्रष्ट र भ्रष्ट बनाउँछ भने त्यसलाई अश्लील मानिनेछ।
question_en: What is considered obscene according to the text?
answer_en: A book, pamphlet, paper, writing, drawing, painting, representation, figure or any other object is deemed to be obscene if it is lascivious or appeals to the prurient interest or if its effect tends to deprave and corrupt persons who are likely to read, see or hear the matter contained or embodied in it.

question: पुस्तक, पर्चा, पत्रपत्रिका, लेखन, रेखाचित्र, चित्र, प्रतिनिधित्व, चित्र वा अन्य कुनै वस्तुको सन्दर्भमा अश्लीलतालाई कसरी परिभाषित गरिन्छ?
answer: यी वस्तुहरूको सन्दर्भमा अश्लीलता भनेको कुनै पनि कुरालाई परिभाषित गरिएको छ जुन कामुक वा पूर्वहितको लागि अपील गर्दछ वा यदि यसको प्रभावले यसमा समावेश वा मूर्त विषय पढ्न, हेर्न वा सुन्ने सम्भावना भएका व्यक्तिहरूलाई भ्रष्ट र भ्रष्ट बनाउँछ।
question_en: How is obscenity defined in the context of books, pamphlets, papers, writings, drawings, paintings, representations, figures or any other objects?
answer_en: Obscenity in the context of these objects is defined as anything that is lascivious or appeals to the prurient interest or if its effect tends to deprave and corrupt persons who are likely to read, see or hear the matter contained or embodied in it.

question: पाठ बमोजिम अश्‍लील वस्तु सम्बन्धी कस्ता कार्य दण्डनीय छन्?
answer: उल्लेखित प्रयोजनका लागि कुनै पनि अश्लील वस्तुलाई बेच्ने, भाडामा दिने, वितरण गर्ने, सार्वजनिक रूपमा प्रदर्शन गर्ने वा सर्कुलेशनमा राख्ने, साथै उल्लेखित उद्देश्यका लागि कुनै अश्लील वस्तु पैठारी, निकासी वा ढुवानी गर्ने, वा अश्लील वस्तुहरू बनाइ, उत्पादन, निकासी, सार्वजनिक रूपमा राखिएको, सार्वजनिक रूपमा राख्ने वा राख्ने कुनै पनि व्यवसायमा भाग लिने वा नाफा लिने। यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध भएको कुनै पनि कार्यमा संलग्न भएको वा गर्न तयार छ भनी कुनै पनि व्यक्ति संलग्न भएको वा गर्न तयार छ भनी प्रचार गर्ने वा यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध भएको कुनै कार्य गर्न प्रस्ताव गर्ने वा गर्ने प्रयास गर्ने तरिका।
question_en: What actions regarding obscene objects are punishable according to the text?
answer_en: Selling, letting to hire, distributing, publicly exhibiting, or any manner of putting into circulation any obscene object, as well as importing, exporting, or conveying any obscene object for the mentioned purposes, or taking part in or receiving profits from any business in the course of which obscene objects are made, produced, kept, imported, exported, conveyed, publicly exhibited or in any manner put into circulation, or advertising or making known that any person is engaged or is ready to engage in any act which is an offence under this section, or offering or attempting to do any act which is an offence under this section.

question: यस दफा अन्तर्गतका केही अपराधहरू कानून बमोजिम अश्लील वस्तुहरूसँग सम्बन्धित छन्?
answer: उल्लेखित प्रयोजनका लागि कुनै पनि अश्लील वस्तुलाई बेच्ने, भाडामा दिने, वितरण गर्ने, सार्वजनिक रूपमा प्रदर्शन गर्ने वा सर्कुलेशनमा राख्ने, साथै उल्लेखित उद्देश्यका लागि कुनै अश्लील वस्तु पैठारी, निकासी वा ढुवानी गर्ने, वा अश्लील वस्तुहरू बनाइ, उत्पादन, निकासी, सार्वजनिक रूपमा राखिएको, सार्वजनिक रूपमा राख्ने वा राख्ने कुनै पनि व्यवसायमा भाग लिने वा नाफा लिने। यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध भएको कुनै पनि कार्यमा संलग्न भएको वा गर्न तयार छ भनी कुनै पनि व्यक्ति संलग्न भएको वा गर्न तयार छ भनी प्रचार गर्ने वा यस दफा अन्तर्गत अपराध भएको कुनै कार्य गर्न प्रस्ताव गर्ने वा गर्ने प्रयास गर्ने तरिका।
question_en: What are some offences under this section related to obscene objects according to the law?
answer_en: Selling, letting to hire, distributing, publicly exhibiting, or any manner of putting into circulation any obscene object, as well as importing, exporting, or conveying any obscene object for the mentioned purposes, or taking part in or receiving profits from any business in the course of which obscene objects are made, produced, kept, imported, exported, conveyed, publicly exhibited or in any manner put into circulation, or advertising or making known that any person is engaged or is ready to engage in any act which is an offence under this section, or offering or attempting to do any act which is an offence under this section.

question: यस दफा अन्तर्गतको अपराधको सजाय के हो?
answer: पहिलो पटक दोषी ठहर भएमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र दुई हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for offences under this section?
answer_en: On first conviction, the punishment may extend to two years of imprisonment and a fine which may extend to two thousand rupees.

question: एक निश्चित दफा अन्तर्गत पहिलो सजायमा सम्भावित कैद अवधि र जरिवाना रकम कति छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र दुई हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential imprisonment duration and fine amount on first conviction under a certain section?
answer_en: The punishment may extend to two years of imprisonment and a fine which may extend to two thousand rupees.

question: अश्लील वस्तुहरू संलग्न भएको दोस्रो वा पछिको सजायको लागि के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: पाँच वर्षसम्म कैद र पाँच हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a second or subsequent conviction involving obscene objects?
answer_en: Imprisonment for a term which may extend to five years, and also with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees.

question: अश्लील वस्तुहरू समावेश भएको दोस्रो वा पछिको सजायको लागि सम्भावित सजाय र जरिवाना के हो?
answer: पाँच वर्षसम्म कैद र पाँच हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the possible sentence and fine for a second or subsequent conviction involving obscene objects?
answer_en: Imprisonment for a term which may extend to five years, and also with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees.

question: अश्लील वस्तुहरूको प्रकाशनको सम्बन्धमा के अपवादहरू दिइन्छ?
answer: अपवादहरू कुनै पनि पुस्तक, पर्चा, कागज, लेखन, रेखाचित्र, चित्रकला, प्रतिनिधित्व वा चित्रहरू हुन् जुन सार्वजनिक हितको लागि उचित छ वा धार्मिक उद्देश्यका लागि राखिएको वा प्रयोग गरिन्छ। थप रूपमा, कुनै पनि प्रतिनिधित्व मूर्तिकला, उत्कीर्ण, चित्रित वा कुनै पुरातन स्मारक वा कुनै मन्दिरमा, वा मूर्तिहरू ढुवानीका लागि प्रयोग गरिएको कुनै कारमा, वा कुनै धार्मिक उद्देश्यका लागि राखिएको वा प्रयोग गरिएको।
question_en: What exceptions are given in relation to the publication of obscene objects?
answer_en: The exceptions are any book, pamphlet, paper, writing, drawing, painting, representation or figure that is justified as being for the public good or is kept or used bona fide for religious purposes. Additionally, any representation sculptured, engraved, painted on or in any ancient monument or any temple, or on any car used for the conveyance of idols, or kept or used for any religious purpose.

question: पुस्तकहरू, पर्चाहरू, कागजहरू, चित्रहरू, चित्रहरू, प्रतिनिधित्वहरू, चित्रहरू, पुरातन स्मारकहरू, मन्दिरहरू, र मूर्तिहरू ढुवानीका लागि प्रयोग गरिने कारहरूको सन्दर्भमा अश्लीलता नियमको अपवादको रूपमा के योग्य छ?
answer: अपवादहरू कुनै पनि पुस्तक, पर्चा, कागज, लेखन, रेखाचित्र, चित्रकला, प्रतिनिधित्व वा चित्रहरू हुन् जुन सार्वजनिक हितको लागि उचित छ वा धार्मिक उद्देश्यका लागि राखिएको वा प्रयोग गरिन्छ। थप रूपमा, कुनै पनि प्रतिनिधित्व मूर्तिकला, उत्कीर्ण, चित्रित वा कुनै पुरातन स्मारक वा कुनै मन्दिरमा, वा मूर्तिहरू ढुवानीका लागि प्रयोग गरिएको कुनै कारमा, वा कुनै धार्मिक उद्देश्यका लागि राखिएको वा प्रयोग गरिएको।
question_en: What qualifies as exceptions to the obscenity rule in regards to books, pamphlets, papers, drawings, paintings, representations, figures, ancient monuments, temples, and cars used for the conveyance of idols?
answer_en: The exceptions are any book, pamphlet, paper, writing, drawing, painting, representation or figure that is justified as being for the public good or is kept or used bona fide for religious purposes. Additionally, any representation sculptured, engraved, painted on or in any ancient monument or any temple, or on any car used for the conveyance of idols, or kept or used for any religious purpose.

question: बीस वर्ष मुनिका व्यक्तिलाई अश्लील वस्तु बेच्ने, भाडामा दिन, वितरण गर्ने, प्रदर्शन गर्ने वा फैलाउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: पहिलो पटक दोषी ठहर भएमा तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र दुई हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुने व्यवस्था छ । दोश्रो पटक वा पछि दोषी ठहर भएमा सात वर्षसम्म कैद र पाँच हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिबाना हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for selling, letting to hire, distributing, exhibiting or circulating obscene objects to a person under twenty years?
answer_en: On first conviction, the punishment is imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, and with fine which may extend to two thousand rupees. In the event of a second or subsequent conviction, the punishment is imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and also with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees.

question: बीस वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरका व्यक्तिलाई अश्लील वस्तुहरू बेच्ने, भाडामा दिन, वितरण गर्ने, प्रदर्शन गर्ने वा प्रसारण गरेकोमा पहिलो र त्यसपछिको सजायमा के हुन्छ?
answer: पहिलो पटक दोषी ठहर भएमा तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र दुई हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुने व्यवस्था छ । दोश्रो पटक वा पछि दोषी ठहर भएमा सात वर्षसम्म कैद र पाँच हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिबाना हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the penalty upon first and subsequent convictions for selling, letting to hire, distributing, exhibiting or circulating obscene objects to a person under twenty years?
answer_en: On first conviction, the punishment is imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, and with fine which may extend to two thousand rupees. In the event of a second or subsequent conviction, the punishment is imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and also with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees.

question: सार्वजनिक स्थानमा अश्लील कार्य गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय तीन महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for performing any obscene act in a public place?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to three months or with fine, or with both.

question: सार्वजनिक स्थानमा कुनै पनि अश्लील कार्य गर्ने सम्बन्धमा कानूनले के भन्छ?
answer: सार्वजनिक स्थानमा अश्लील कार्य गरेमा तीन महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्ने कानुनमा उल्लेख छ ।
question_en: What does the law state about performing any obscene act in a public place?
answer_en: The law states that performing any obscene act in a public place can result in imprisonment which may extend to three months or with fine, or with both.

question: अनाधिकृत लटरी अफिस राख्ने दण्ड के हो?
answer: सजाय छ महिनासम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What are the penalties for keeping an unauthorized lottery office?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.

question: अनाधिकृत लटरी अफिस चलाउने सम्भावित सजाय के हुन सक्छ?
answer: सजाय ६ महिनासम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What can be the possible punishments for running an unauthorized lottery office?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment up to six months, a fine, or both.

question: अनाधिकृत चिठ्ठा सम्बन्धी कुनै प्रस्ताव प्रकाशित गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the penalty for publishing any proposal related to unauthorized lotteries?
answer_en: The punishment is a fine which may extend to one thousand rupees.

question: अनाधिकृत चिठ्ठा सम्बन्धी कुनै प्रस्ताव प्रकाशित गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for publishing any proposal related to unauthorized lotteries?
answer_en: The punishment is a fine which may extend to one thousand rupees.

question: कुनै पनि वर्गको धर्मको अपमान गर्ने मनसायले पूजास्थललाई हानि पुर्‍याउने वा अपवित्र पार्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for damaging or defiling a place of worship with intent to insult the religion of any class?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै धर्मको अपमान गर्न जानबूझकर पूजास्थललाई हानि पुर्‍याउने वा अपवित्र गर्ने व्यक्तिको परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: नतिजा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the consequence for someone who intentionally damages or defiles a place of worship to insult a religion?
answer_en: The consequence is imprisonment which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै पनि वर्गको धर्म वा धार्मिक आस्थाको अपमान गरी धार्मिक भावनामा आघात पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्यले जानाजानी र द्वेषपूर्ण कार्यलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कैद सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What are the penalties for deliberate and malicious acts intended to outrage religious feelings of any class by insulting its religion or religious beliefs?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment.

question: कुनै पनि वर्गको धर्म वा धार्मिक आस्थाको अपमान गरेर जानीजानी र द्वेषपूर्ण काम गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कैद सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who deliberately and maliciously acts to outrage the religious feelings of any class by insulting its religion or religious beliefs?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment.

question: धारा २९६ अनुसार स्वेच्छाले धार्मिक सभामा बाधा पु¥याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing disturbance to a religious assembly according to section 296?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with a fine, or with both.

question: धारा २९६ अनुसार स्वेच्छाले धार्मिक सभामा बाधा पु¥याउनेलाई अधिकतम सजाय के हो ?
answer: अधिकतम जरिवाना एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum penalty, according to section 296, for voluntarily causing disturbance to a religious assembly?
answer_en: The maximum penalty can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with a fine, or with both.

question: दफन २९७ अनुसार धार्मिक भावनामा चोट पुर्याउने वा धर्मको अपमान गर्ने नियतले समाधिस्थलमा अतिक्रमण गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for trespassing on burial places with the intention of wounding religious feelings or insulting religion according to section 297?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with a fine, or with both.

question: दफन २९७ अन्तर्गत धर्मको अपमान गर्ने वा धार्मिक भावनामा चोट पुर्‍याउने मनसायले दफन गर्ने ठाउँमा अतिक्रमण गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम सजाय के हो?
answer: अधिकतम जरिवाना एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum penalty for an individual who trespasses on burial places with the intention of insulting religion or wounding religious feelings under section 297?
answer_en: The maximum penalty can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with a fine, or with both.

question: धार्मिक भावनामा चोट पुर्याउने उद्देश्यले शब्द उच्चारण गर्ने वा आवाज निकाल्नेलाई दफा २९८ अनुसार के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कागजातले धारा 298 अन्तर्गत यस कार्यको लागि सजाय निर्दिष्ट गर्दैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for uttering words or making sounds with the deliberate intent to wound religious feelings according to section 298?
answer_en: The document does not specify the punishment for this action under section 298.

question: के कागजातले धारा २९८ अन्तर्गत धार्मिक भावनामा चोट पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्यले शब्द उच्चारण गर्ने वा आवाज निकाल्ने सजाय तोकेको छ?
answer: होइन, कागजातले धारा 298 अन्तर्गत यस कार्यको लागि सजाय निर्दिष्ट गर्दैन।
question_en: Does the document specify the punishment for uttering words or making sounds with the deliberate intent to wound religious feelings under section 298?
answer_en: No, the document does not specify the punishment for this action under section 298.

question: यदि कसैले कुनै मानव शवलाई कुनै अपमान प्रदान गर्दछ, वा अन्त्येष्टि समारोहको लागि भेला भएका व्यक्तिहरूलाई खलल पुर्‍याउँछ भने के हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What happens if someone offers any indignity to any human corpse, or causes disturbance to any persons assembled for the performance of funeral ceremonies?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: मानव शवमा कुनै प्रकारको अपमान गरेमा वा अन्त्येष्टि समारोहमा भेला भएका मानिसहरूलाई अराजकता पुर्‍याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for offering any indignity to a human corpse or causing disturbance to people assembled for funeral ceremonies?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै पूजास्थल वा कुनै समाधिस्थलमा वा अन्त्येष्टिको लागि छुट्याइएको ठाउँ वा मृतकका अवशेषहरूका लागि भण्डारको रूपमा छुट्याइएको कुनै पनि स्थानमा कुनै अपराध गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for committing any trespass in any place of worship or on any place of sepulture, or any place set apart for the performance of funeral rites or as a depository for the remains of the dead?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with a fine, or with both.

question: पूजास्थल, समाधिस्थल, वा अन्त्येष्टिको लागि छुट्याइएको ठाउँ वा मृतकका अवशेषहरूका लागि भण्डारको रूपमा अतिक्रमण गर्दा के सजाय हुन सक्छ?
answer: सजायमा एक वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What can the punishment include for trespassing in a place of worship, place of sepulture, or any place set apart for funeral rites or as a depository for the remains of the dead?
answer_en: The punishment may include up to one year of imprisonment, a fine, or both.

question: मानिसको ज्यान लिने कार्यलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्ष कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for an act causing the death of a person?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिको मृत्यु गराउने कार्यको सजायमा के समावेश छ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्ष कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What does the punishment for an act causing the death of a person include?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to one year of imprisonment, or with fine, or with both.

question: अपराधी हत्या भनेको के हो?
answer: कसैको मृत्यु गराउने नियतले वा मृत्यु हुनसक्ने शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने नियतले वा त्यस्तो कार्यबाट मृत्यु हुने सम्भावना रहेको थाहा पाएर मृत्यु गराउने कार्यलाई अपराधयोग्य हत्या भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is culpable homicide?
answer_en: Culpable homicide is where someone causes death by doing an act with the intention of causing death, or with the intention of causing such bodily injury as is likely to cause death, or with the knowledge that he is likely by such act to cause death.

question: मृत्यु गराउने नियतले वा मृत्यु हुनसक्ने शारीरिक हानी पु¥याउने नियतले वा त्यस्तो कार्यबाट मृत्यु हुनसक्छ भनी थाहा पाएर मृत्यु गराउनुको अर्थ के हो ?
answer: यसलाई अपराधी हत्या भनिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when someone causes death by doing an act with the intention of causing death, or with the intention of causing such bodily injury as is likely to cause death, or with the knowledge that he is likely by such act to cause death?
answer_en: This is referred to as culpable homicide.

question: एक व्यक्तिले विकार अन्तर्गत परिश्रम गरिरहेका अर्कालाई शारीरिक चोट पुर्‍याउने र उनीहरूको मृत्युलाई गति दिने परिदृश्य के हो?
answer: यस अवस्थामा, स्पष्टीकरण १ बमोजिम व्यक्तिले अर्को व्यक्तिको मृत्युको कारण भएको मानिनेछ।
question_en: What is the scenario in which a person causes bodily injury to another who is labouring under a disorder and accelerates their death?
answer_en: In this case, the person shall be deemed to have caused the other person's death according to Explanation 1.

question: यदि एक व्यक्तिले शारीरिक चोटको कारणले गर्दा अर्को व्यक्तिको मृत्युलाई गति दिन्छ भने कानुनी व्याख्या के हो?
answer: स्पष्टीकरण १ बमोजिम व्यक्तिले अर्को व्यक्तिको मृत्युको कारण भएको मानिनेछ।
question_en: What is the legal interpretation if a person causes bodily injury that accelerates the death of another person with a disorder?
answer_en: The person shall be deemed to have caused the other person's death according to Explanation 1.

question: शारीरिक चोटले मृत्यु निम्त्याउने बारे व्याख्या २ ले के बताउँछ?
answer: स्पष्टीकरण २ ले उचित उपचार र दक्ष उपचारबाट मृत्यु हुन नसकेको भए पनि त्यस्तो शारीरिक चोटपटक लाग्ने व्यक्तिको मृत्यु भएको मानिने उल्लेख छ ।
question_en: What does Explanation 2 state about causing death by bodily injury?
answer_en: Explanation 2 states that the person who causes such bodily injury shall be deemed to have caused the death, even if the death might have been prevented by proper remedies and skilful treatment.

question: उचित उपचार र दक्ष उपचारले रोक्न सकिने शारीरिक चोटपटकबाट मृत्यु भएको अवस्थामा स्पष्टीकरण २ अनुसार मृत्यु कसले गरेको मानिन्छ ?
answer: यसरी शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने व्यक्तिलाई व्याख्या २ अनुसार मृत्यु भएको मानिन्छ।
question_en: Who is deemed to have caused the death according to Explanation 2, in the case of death caused by bodily injury that could have been prevented by proper remedies and skilful treatment?
answer_en: The person who causes such bodily injury is deemed to have caused the death according to Explanation 2.

question: आमाको गर्भमा बच्चाको मृत्युको कारणको बारेमा व्याख्या 3 ले के भन्छ?
answer: स्पष्टीकरण ३ मा आमाको गर्भमा बच्चाको मृत्यु हुनु हत्या होइन भनी उल्लेख छ । यद्यपि, यो जीवित बच्चाको मृत्युको कारण दोषी हत्या हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What does Explanation 3 say about causing the death of a child in the mother's womb?
answer_en: Explanation 3 states that causing the death of a child in the mother's womb is not homicide. However, it may amount to culpable homicide to cause the death of a living child.

question: आमाको गर्भमा बच्चाको मृत्यु हुनुलाई हत्या वा अपराधी हत्या मानिन्छ भन्ने बारे स्पष्टीकरण ३ ले के बताउँछ?
answer: स्पष्टीकरण ३ मा आमाको गर्भमा बच्चाको मृत्यु हुनु हत्या होइन भनिएको छ । यद्यपि, यो जीवित बच्चाको मृत्युको कारण दोषी हत्या हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What does Explanation 3 state about whether causing the death of a child in the mother's womb is considered homicide or culpable homicide?
answer_en: Explanation 3 says that causing the death of a child in the mother's womb is not homicide. However, it may amount to culpable homicide to cause the death of a living child.

question: पाठ अनुसार हत्यालाई के मानिन्छ ?
answer: मृत्यु गराउने नियतले वा कसूर गर्नेलाई मृत्यु हुने सम्भावना थाहा भएमा वा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने नियतले गरिएको हो र सामान्य मृत्युको प्रकृतिमा शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने नियतले गरेको भएमा दण्डनीय हत्यालाई हत्या मानिन्छ। यो पनि हत्या हो यदि कार्य यति खतरनाक छ कि यसले, सबै सम्भाव्यतामा, मृत्यु निम्त्याउनुपर्दछ, र मृत्यु वा त्यस्ता चोटपटकको जोखिम निम्त्याउनको लागि कुनै बहाना बिना गरिएको छ।
question_en: What is considered as murder according to the text?
answer_en: Culpable homicide is considered as murder if the act is done with the intention of causing death or such bodily injury as the offender knows to be likely to cause death, or if it is done with the intention of causing bodily injury to any person and the bodily injury intended to be inflicted is sufficient in the ordinary course of nature to cause death. It is also murder if the act is so dangerous that it must, in all probability, cause death, and is committed without any excuse for incurring the risk of causing death or such injury.

question: कस्ता सर्तहरूमा अपराधिक हत्यालाई हत्या मानिन्छ?
answer: मृत्यु गराउने नियतले वा कसूर गर्नेलाई मृत्यु हुने सम्भावना थाहा भएमा वा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने नियतले गरिएको हो र सामान्य मृत्युको प्रकृतिमा शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने नियतले गरेको भएमा दण्डनीय हत्यालाई हत्या मानिन्छ। यो पनि हत्या हो यदि कार्य यति खतरनाक छ कि यसले, सबै सम्भाव्यतामा, मृत्यु निम्त्याउनुपर्दछ, र मृत्यु वा त्यस्ता चोटपटकको जोखिम निम्त्याउनको लागि कुनै बहाना बिना गरिएको छ।
question_en: What are the conditions under which culpable homicide is considered as murder?
answer_en: Culpable homicide is considered as murder if the act is done with the intention of causing death or such bodily injury as the offender knows to be likely to cause death, or if it is done with the intention of causing bodily injury to any person and the bodily injury intended to be inflicted is sufficient in the ordinary course of nature to cause death. It is also murder if the act is so dangerous that it must, in all probability, cause death, and is committed without any excuse for incurring the risk of causing death or such injury.

question: पाठमा हत्याको पहिलो दृष्टान्त के हो?
answer: A ले उसलाई मार्ने नियतले Z लाई गोली हान्छ। परिणाममा Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ। ए हत्या गर्छ।
question_en: What is the first illustration of murder in the text?
answer_en: A shoots Z with the intention of killing him. Z dies in consequence. A commits murder.

question: A को पाठमा मार्ने नियतले गर्दा कसको मृत्यु हुन्छ?
answer: A को मार्ने नियतले गर्दा Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ।
question_en: Who dies as a result of A's intention to kill in the text?
answer_en: Z dies as a result of A's intention to kill.

question: पाठमा हत्याको दोस्रो दृष्टान्त के हो?
answer: ए, Z ले यस्तो रोगमा परिश्रम गरिरहेको छ कि प्रहारले उसको मृत्यु हुनसक्छ भन्ने थाहा पाएर उसलाई शारीरिक चोट पुर्‍याउने मनसायले प्रहार गर्दछ। प्रहारको परिणाममा Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ। ए हत्याको दोषी छ।
question_en: What is the second illustration of murder in the text?
answer_en: A, knowing that Z is labouring under such a disease that a blow is likely to cause his death, strikes him with the intention of causing bodily injury. Z dies in consequence of the blow. A is guilty of murder.

question: Z लाई यस्तो रोग लागेर मृत्यु हुनसक्छ भन्ने थाहा पाएर उहाँलाई शारीरिक चोट पुर्याउने नियतले प्रहार गर्छ, र झटकाको फलस्वरूप Zको मृत्यु हुन्छ भन्ने थाहा हुँदा हत्याको दोषी को हो?
answer: ए
question_en: Who is guilty of murder when knowing that Z is labouring under such a disease that a blow is likely to cause his death, they strike him with the intention of causing bodily injury, and Z dies as a consequence of the blow?
answer_en: A

question: पाठमा हत्याको तेस्रो दृष्टान्त के हो?
answer: A ले जानाजानी Z लाई तरवार-कट वा क्लब-घाउ दिन्छ जुन प्रकृतिको सामान्य मार्गमा मानिसको मृत्युको कारण हो। परिणाममा Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ। यहाँ A हत्याको लागि दोषी छ, यद्यपि उसले Z को मृत्युको कारण नबनाएको हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the third illustration of murder in the text?
answer_en: A intentionally gives Z a sword-cut or club-wound sufficient to cause the death of a man in the ordinary course of nature. Z dies in consequence. Here A is guilty of murder, although he may not have intended to cause Z's death.

question: A ले Z लाई जानाजानी प्रकृतिको सामान्य मार्गमा मानिसको मृत्युको लागि पर्याप्त तरवार काट्ने वा क्लबको घाउ दिन्छ र त्यसको परिणाममा Z को मृत्यु हुन्छ, A ले Z को मृत्यु गराउने उद्देश्य नभएको भए पनि हत्याको दोषी को हुन्छ?
answer: ए हत्याको दोषी छ।
question_en: Who is guilty of murder when A intentionally gives Z a sword-cut or club-wound sufficient to cause the death of a man in the ordinary course of nature and Z dies in consequence, even if A may not have intended to cause Z's death?
answer_en: A is guilty of murder.

question: के उसले भीडमा लोडेड तोप हानेर पूर्वनिर्धारित डिजाइन बिना कसैलाई मार्यो भने हत्याको दोषी छ?
answer: हो
question_en: Is A guilty of murder if he fires a loaded cannon into a crowd and kills someone without a premeditated design?
answer_en: Yes

question: यदि एकले भीडमा लोड गरिएको तोप चलाउँछ र पूर्वनिर्धारित डिजाइन बिना कसैलाई मार्छ भने, के त्यो हत्याको दोषी हो?
answer: हो
question_en: If A fires a loaded cannon into a crowd and kills someone without a premeditated design, is he guilty of murder?
answer_en: Yes

question: निर्दोष हत्यालाई कहिले हत्या मानिदैन?
answer: अपराधीले गम्भीर र आकस्मिक उत्तेजनाद्वारा आत्मसंयमको शक्तिबाट वञ्चित भई उक्साहट दिने व्यक्तिको मृत्यु वा गल्ती वा दुर्घटनावश अन्य कसैको मृत्यु भएमा अपराधी हत्या होइन।
question_en: When is culpable homicide not considered murder?
answer_en: Culpable homicide is not murder if the offender, whilst deprived of the power of self-control by grave and sudden provocation, causes the death of the person who gave the provocation or causes the death of any other person by mistake or accident.

question: कस्ता परिस्थितिहरूले अपराधी हत्यालाई हत्याको रूपमा वर्गीकृत नगर्न नेतृत्व गर्दछ?
answer: अपराधीले गम्भीर र आकस्मिक उत्तेजनाद्वारा आत्मसंयमको शक्तिबाट वञ्चित भई उक्साहट दिने व्यक्तिको मृत्यु वा गल्ती वा दुर्घटनावश अन्य कसैको मृत्यु भएमा अपराधी हत्या होइन।
question_en: What circumstances lead to a culpable homicide not being classified as murder?
answer_en: Culpable homicide is not murder if the offender, whilst deprived of the power of self-control by grave and sudden provocation, causes the death of the person who gave the provocation or causes the death of any other person by mistake or accident.

question: अपराधी हत्या हत्या नभएको अपवादका लागि के सर्तहरू छन्?
answer: उत्तेजकता अपराधी द्वारा खोजी वा स्वैच्छिक रूपमा उक्साउनु हुँदैन, कानूनको आज्ञापालनमा वा सार्वजनिक सेवकले आफ्नो शक्तिको वैध प्रयोगमा गरेको कुनै पनि कुराले दिनु हुँदैन, र निजी रक्षाको अधिकारको वैधानिक प्रयोगमा गरिएको कुनै पनि कुराद्वारा दिइनु हुँदैन।
question_en: What are the conditions for the exception of culpable homicide not being murder?
answer_en: The provocation must not be sought or voluntarily provoked by the offender, not given by anything done in obedience to the law or by a public servant in the lawful exercise of their powers, and not given by anything done in the lawful exercise of the right of private defence.

question: अपराधीले अपराधी हत्यालाई हत्या मान्न नपर्ने के गर्नुपर्छ?
answer: अपराधीले खोज्ने वा स्वेच्छाले उत्तेजकता दिनु हुँदैन, र यो कानूनको आज्ञापालन वा आफ्नो शक्तिको वैध प्रयोगमा सार्वजनिक सेवकले गरेको कुनै पनि कुराले दिनु हुँदैन। यसलाई निजी रक्षाको अधिकारको कानुनी अभ्यासमा गरिएको कुनै पनि कुराले दिनु हुँदैन।
question_en: What does the offender must not do for a culpable homicide to not be considered as murder?
answer_en: The offender must not seek or voluntarily provoke the provocation, and it should not be given by anything done in obedience to the law or by a public servant in the lawful exercise of their powers. It should also not be given by anything done in the lawful exercise of the right of private defence.

question: कसले निर्धारण गर्छ कि अपराधलाई हत्याको मात्रामा रोक्नको लागि उत्तेजक गम्भीर र अचानक पर्याप्त थियो?
answer: उक्साहट गम्भीर र अचानक हत्याको मात्रामा अपराध हुनबाट जोगाउनको लागि पर्याप्त थियो कि यो तथ्यको प्रश्न हो।
question_en: What determines if the provocation was grave and sudden enough to prevent the offence from amounting to murder?
answer_en: Whether the provocation was grave and sudden enough to prevent the offence from amounting to murder is a question of fact.

question: कुनै अपराधलाई हत्याको रूपमा वर्गीकृत गर्नबाट रोक्नको लागि उत्तेजित गम्भीर र अचानक पर्याप्त थियो कि भनेर निर्धारण गर्ने विधि के हो?
answer: यो तथ्यको प्रश्न द्वारा निर्धारण गरिन्छ।
question_en: What is the method to determine if a provocation was grave and sudden enough to prevent an offence from being classified as murder?
answer_en: It is determined by a question of fact.

question: यदि A ले जानाजानी Y, Z को बच्चालाई Z द्वारा दिएको उत्तेजनाबाट उत्तेजित जोशको प्रभावमा मार्छ भने, के यो हत्या वा अपराधी हत्या मानिन्छ?
answer: बच्चाले उक्साहट नदिएको हुनाले हत्या भएको मानिन्छ र उत्तेजित कार्य गर्दा दुर्घटना वा दुर्भाग्यबाट बालकको मृत्यु भएको होइन ।
question_en: If A intentionally kills Y, Z's child, under the influence of passion excited by a provocation given by Z, is it considered murder or culpable homicide?
answer_en: It is considered murder as the provocation was not given by the child, and the death of the child was not caused by accident or misfortune in doing an act caused by the provocation.

question: Z ले दिएको उत्तेजनाबाट उत्तेजित आवेगको प्रभावमा A द्वारा Z को बच्चा, Y को जानाजानी हत्यालाई हत्या र अपराधी हत्याको रूपमा किन मानिन्छ?
answer: यो हत्या भएको मानिनेछ किनभने उत्तेजकता बच्चाले दिएको थिएन, र बच्चाको मृत्यु कुनै दुर्घटना वा दुर्भाग्यको कारणले भएको उत्तेजनाबाट उत्तेजित कार्यको परिणाम होइन।
question_en: Why would the intentional killing of Z's child, Y, by A under the influence of passion excited by a provocation given by Z be considered murder and not culpable homicide?
answer_en: It would be considered murder because the provocation was not given by the child, and the child's death was not the result of an accident or misfortune resulting from an act provoked by the provocation given.

question: यदि A ले Y मा पिस्तौल चलाउँछ, न त आफूलाई नजिकै रहेको Z लाई मार्न सक्छ भन्ने नियत वा आफूलाई थाहा नभएको, तर नजरबाट टाढा छ, र Z मार्न समाप्त हुन्छ, के A ले हत्या गरेको छ वा अपराधी हत्या गरेको छ?
answer: ए ले निन्दनीय हत्या गरेको छ ।
question_en: If A fires a pistol at Y, neither intending nor knowing himself to be likely to kill Z, who is near him, but out of sight, and ends up killing Z, has A committed murder or culpable homicide?
answer_en: A has committed culpable homicide.
