question: यदि उसले Y मा पिस्तौल चलाउँछ भने, न त आफूलाई नजिकै रहेको तर नजरबाट टाढा रहेको Z मार्न सक्छ भन्ने नियतले वा आफैंलाई थाहा नभएको र Z लाई मार्छ भने उसले के गरेको छ?
answer: ए ले निन्दनीय हत्या गरेको छ ।
question_en: What has A committed if he fires a pistol at Y, neither intending nor knowing himself to be likely to kill Z, who is near him but out of sight, and ends up killing Z?
answer_en: A has committed culpable homicide.

question: A ले कानुनी रूपमा A लाई गिरफ्तार गर्ने र उसलाई अचानक र हिंसात्मक जोशमा उत्तेजित गर्ने बेलिफ Z लाई मार्छ भने, के यो हत्या वा अपराधी हत्या मानिन्छ?
answer: सार्वजनिक सेवकले आफ्नो शक्तिको प्रयोगमा गरेको कामबाट उत्तेजित गराउने कार्यलाई हत्या मानिन्छ ।
question_en: If A kills Z, a bailiff, who lawfully arrested A and excited him to sudden and violent passion, is it considered murder or culpable homicide?
answer_en: It is considered murder as the provocation was given by a thing done by a public servant in the exercise of his powers.

question: A ले कानूनबमोजिम गिरफ्तार गरी उसलाई अचानक र हिंसात्मक आवेगमा उत्तेजित गर्ने Z, बेलिफलाई मार्दा के मानिन्छ, यदि कुनै सार्वजनिक सेवकले आफ्नो शक्तिको प्रयोगमा गरेको कामबाट उत्तेजकता दिइएको थियो भने?
answer: हत्या मानिन्छ ।
question_en: What is it considered when A kills Z, a bailiff, who lawfully arrested A and excited him to sudden and violent passion, if the provocation was given by a thing done by a public servant in the exercise of his powers?
answer_en: It is considered murder.

question: Z ले झूटा साक्षीको आरोप लगाएपछि उसले अचानक जोशमा Z मारेपछि A लाई के आरोप लाग्छ?
answer: हत्या
question_en: What is the charge for A when he kills Z in sudden passion after Z accused him of perjury?
answer_en: Murder

question: झुटो आरोप लगाइएपछि A ले अचानक आवेगमा Z मारेमा के भनिन्छ?
answer: हत्या
question_en: What is the crime called when A kills Z in sudden passion after being accused of perjury?
answer_en: Murder

question: Z ले उसलाई नाक तान्नबाट रोक्न खोजेपछि Z मारेपछि A ले के अपराध गर्‍यो?
answer: हत्या
question_en: What crime did A commit when he killed Z after Z tried to stop him from pulling his nose?
answer_en: Murder

question: जेडले नाक तान्नबाट रोक्न खोज्दा ए ले जेडलाई मारेर कस्तो कार्य गर्‍यो?
answer: हत्या
question_en: What act did A commit by killing Z when Z tried to stop him from pulling his nose?
answer_en: Murder

question: A ले रिसाएको B लाई चक्कु हानेर B ले Z मारेमा के आरोप लाग्छ?
answer: हत्या
question_en: What is the charge for A when he hands a knife to B, who is in a rage, and B kills Z?
answer_en: Murder

question: रिसमा भएको B लाई चक्कु दिएर B लाई Z मार्न प्रयोग गरेमा A के अपराध हुन्छ?
answer: हत्या
question_en: What crime is A guilty of if he hands a knife to B, who is in a rage, and B uses it to kill Z?
answer_en: Murder

question: उसले रिसाएको बेला A लाई दिएको छुरीले Z लाई मार्दा B लाई के आरोप लाग्छ?
answer: दोषी हत्या
question_en: What is the charge for B when he kills Z with a knife that A handed to him while he was in a rage?
answer_en: Culpable homicide

question: B ले रिसाएको अवस्थामा A लाई दिएको छुरीले Z लाई मार्दा B ले गरेको अपराधको कानुनी शब्द के हो?
answer: दोषी हत्या
question_en: What is the legal term for the crime committed by B when he kills Z with a knife that A handed to him while he was in a rage?
answer_en: Culpable homicide

question: A को लागि के चार्ज हुन्छ जब उसले आत्मरक्षामा Z लाई गोली हानेर आफैलाई घोडाको कुटाइबाट जोगाउनको लागि मार्छ?
answer: दोषी हत्या
question_en: What is the charge for A when he shoots Z dead in self-defense to prevent himself from being horsewhipped?
answer_en: Culpable homicide

question: आफूलाई घोडाको कुटाइबाट जोगाउन आत्मरक्षामा Z लाई गोली हानेर A ले गरेको अपराधको कानुनी शब्द के हो?
answer: दोषी हत्या
question_en: What is the legal term for the offense A commits when he shoots Z dead in self-defense to prevent himself from being horsewhipped?
answer_en: Culpable homicide

question: सार्वजनिक न्यायको प्रवर्द्धनमा निजामती कर्मचारीले गरेको अपराधिक हत्यालाई हत्या मान्न सकिन्छ ?
answer: छैन
question_en: Can culpable homicide be considered as murder if it is committed by a public servant in the advancement of public justice?
answer_en: No

question: के सार्वजनिक न्यायको उन्नतिमा निजामती कर्मचारीले गरेको हत्यालाई अपराध मान्नु गलत हो ?
answer: हो
question_en: Is it incorrect to consider culpable homicide as murder when it is committed by a public servant in the advancement of public justice?
answer_en: Yes

question: जोशको तातोमा अचानक झगडामा बिना पूर्वयोजना गरियो भने अपराधी हत्यालाई हत्या मानिन्छ?
answer: छैन
question_en: Is culpable homicide considered as murder if committed without premeditation in a sudden fight in the heat of passion?
answer_en: No

question: के यो सत्य हो कि जोशको तातोमा अचानक लडाईमा पूर्वाभास बिना गरिएको हो भने अपराधी हत्या हत्या मानिदैन?
answer: हो
question_en: Is it true that culpable homicide is not considered as murder if committed without premeditation in a sudden fight in the heat of passion?
answer_en: Yes

question: पाठ बमोजिम हत्या मान्न नहुने अपराधिक हत्यामा के अपवाद छ?
answer: मृत्यु भएको व्यक्तिले अठार वर्षभन्दा माथिको उमेरमा मृत्यु भोगेमा वा आफ्नै सहमतिमा मृत्युको जोखिम मोलेर हत्या गर्नु अपराधयोग्य हत्या होइन ।
question_en: What is the exception for culpable homicide to not be considered murder according to the text?
answer_en: Culpable homicide is not murder when the person whose death is caused, being above the age of eighteen years, suffers death or takes the risk of death with his own consent.

question: पाठ अनुसार, कसैको मृत्युलाई अपराधी हत्याको मामला भए पनि कुन परिस्थितिमा हत्या मानिँदैन?
answer: मृत्यु हुने व्यक्तिको उमेर अठार वर्षभन्दा माथिको भएमा वा मृत्युको जोखिम आफ्नै सहमतिमा लिएको भए हत्या मानिने छैन ।
question_en: Under what circumstances would a person's death not be considered murder, even if it is a case of culpable homicide, according to the text?
answer_en: If the person whose death was caused was above the age of eighteen years and suffered death or took the risk of death with his own consent, it would not be considered murder.

question: पाठमा उल्लेख भए अनुसार हत्याको सजाय के हो ?
answer: हत्या गर्नेलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for murder as mentioned in the text?
answer_en: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कसलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय दिइनेछ, र कसलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ, पाठमा उल्लेख गरिएको छ?
answer: जसले हत्या गर्छ
question_en: Who shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, and also be liable to fine, as mentioned in the text?
answer_en: Whoever commits murder

question: हत्या गर्नेलाई जन्मकैदको सजाय के हुन्छ ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय पाएर हत्या गर्नेलाई मृत्युदण्ड दिइनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a life-convict who commits murder?
answer_en: Whoever, being under sentence of imprisonment for life, commits murder, shall be punished with death.

question: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय भोगिरहेको तर हत्या गरेको व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय भोगिरहेको तर हत्या गरेको व्यक्तिको सजाय मृत्यु हो।
question_en: What is the penalty for someone who is already serving a life sentence but commits murder?
answer_en: The penalty for someone who is already serving a life sentence but commits murder is death.

question: अपराधी हत्यालाई हत्या नभई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: हत्या नभई दण्डनीय हत्या गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र मृत्यु गराउने काम मृत्यु गराउने नियतले वा मृत्यु हुनसक्ने शारीरिक चोटपटक गरेको भए निजलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for culpable homicide not amounting to murder?
answer_en: Whoever commits culpable homicide not amounting to murder, shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine, if the act by which the death is caused is done with the intention of causing death, or of causing such bodily injury as is likely to cause death.

question: कसैले मृत्यु गराउने नियतले कुनै काम गरेमा वा मृत्यु हुनसक्ने खालको शारीरिक चोटपटक ल्याएर हत्या गरेमा त्यसको परिणाम के हुन्छ ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ। यो हत्याको मात्रा नभई दोषी हत्या मानिन्छ।
question_en: What is the intended consequence if someone commits an act with the intention of causing death, or causing such bodily injury that is likely to cause death, but it does not amount to murder?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine. This is considered culpable homicide not amounting to murder.

question: अठार वर्ष मुनिको व्यक्तिलाई उक्साएर मृत्यु गराउनुको नतिजा के हुन्छ?
answer: A, उक्साएर, स्वेच्छाले Z, अठार वर्ष मुनिका व्यक्तिलाई आत्महत्या गर्न बाध्य बनाउँछ। यहाँ, जेडको युवावस्थाको कारण, उसले आफ्नै मृत्युको लागि सहमति दिन असक्षम थियो; त्यसकारण एले हत्यामा संलग्न भएको बताए ।
question_en: What is the consequence of causing death of a person under eighteen years by instigation?
answer_en: A, by instigation, voluntarily causes Z, a person under eighteen years of age to commit suicide. Here, on account of Z's youth, he was incapable of giving consent to his own death; A has therefore abetted murder.

question: अठार वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरका व्यक्तिलाई युवावस्थाका कारण सहमति दिन नसक्ने भएकाले स्वेच्छाले आत्महत्या गर्न उक्साएमा कसलाई जिम्मेवार मानिन्छ?
answer: A जवाफदेही बनाइएको छ किनकि उनीहरूले हत्यामा संलग्न गरेका छन्।
question_en: Who is held accountable if they voluntarily instigate a person under eighteen years to commit suicide, considering the person is incapable of giving consent due to their youth?
answer_en: A is held accountable as they have therefore abetted murder.

question: धारा 304A अनुसार लापरवाहीबाट मृत्यु निम्त्याउने सजाय के हो?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing death by negligence according to section 304A?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: धारा 304A ले लापरवाहीबाट मृत्यु निम्त्याउने सजायको बारेमा के बताउँछ?
answer: धारा 304A ले व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ भनिएको छ।
question_en: What does section 304A state about the punishment for causing death by negligence?
answer_en: Section 304A states that the person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: धारा 304B मा वर्णन गरिए अनुसार दाइजोको मृत्यु के हो?
answer: दाइजोको मृत्यु भन्नाले महिलाको विवाहको सात वर्ष भित्रमा कुनै जलेको वा शारीरिक चोटपटक वा सामान्य परिस्थितिमा बाहेक अन्य कुनै कारणले मृत्यु भएको र दाइजोको माग वा सम्बन्धमा उनको पति वा पतिको कुनै आफन्तबाट निर्दयी वा उत्पीडनमा परेको देखाइएको छ।
question_en: What is dowry death as described in section 304B?
answer_en: Dowry death is where the death of a woman is caused by any burns or bodily injury or occurs otherwise than under normal circumstances within seven years of her marriage and it is shown that soon before her death she was subjected to cruelty or harassment by her husband or any relative of her husband for, or in connection with, any demand for dowry.

question: महिलाको मृत्युलाई दाइजोको मृत्यु मानिने परिस्थितिहरू के के हुन्?
answer: विवाह भएको सात वर्षभित्र कुनै महिलाको मृत्यु कुनै जलेको वा शारीरिक चोटपटक वा सामान्य परिस्थितिमा बाहेक अन्य कारणले भएमा दाइजोको मृत्यु मानिन्छ र दाइजोको माग वा सम्बन्धमा पति वा पतिको कुनै आफन्तबाट निर्दयी वा उत्पीडनमा परेको देखाइएको छ।
question_en: What are the circumstances described under which a woman's death is considered a dowry death?
answer_en: A woman's death is considered a dowry death if it is caused by any burns or bodily injury or occurs otherwise than under normal circumstances within seven years of her marriage and it is shown that soon before her death she was subjected to cruelty or harassment by her husband or any relative of her husband for, or in connection with, any demand for dowry.

question: धारा ३०४बी अनुसार दाइजो मृत्युको सजाय के छ ?
answer: दाइजोका लागि मृत्युदण्ड दिने व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षभन्दा कम नभई आजीवन कैदसम्मको सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for dowry death according to section 304B?
answer_en: The person who commits dowry death shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than seven years but which may extend to imprisonment for life.

question: दाइजोमा मृत्यु हुनेलाई न्यूनतम र अधिकतम कैद कति हुन्छ ?
answer: दफा ३०४बी अनुसार न्युनतम कैद सात वर्ष र अधिकतम आजीवन कारावाससम्म हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the minimum and maximum imprisonment term for someone who commits dowry death?
answer_en: The minimum imprisonment term is seven years and the maximum can extend to life imprisonment, according to section 304B.

question: दफा ३०५ अनुसार बालबालिका वा पागल व्यक्तिलाई आत्महत्या गर्न दुरुत्साहन गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: यस्तो आत्महत्या गर्न दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for abetment of suicide of a child or insane person according to section 305?
answer_en: Whoever abets the commission of such suicide, shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for a term not exceeding ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: सम्भावित कारावास लम्बाइ र जरिवाना सहित बच्चा वा पागल व्यक्तिको आत्महत्या गर्न उक्साउने व्यक्तिको कानुनी नतिजा के हुन्छ?
answer: दफा ३०५ बमोजिम आत्महत्या गर्न दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई मृत्युदण्ड वा आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the legal consequence for someone who abets the suicide of a child or insane person, including potential imprisonment length and fines?
answer_en: According to section 305, whoever abets the commission of such suicide, shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for a term not exceeding ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: धारा ३०६ अनुसार आत्महत्या दुरुत्साहन गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: यस्तो आत्महत्या गर्न दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for abetment of suicide according to section 306?
answer_en: Whoever abets the commission of such suicide, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: धारा ३०६ अनुसार आत्महत्या गर्न दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम जेल सजाय र थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: दफा ३०६ बमोजिम आत्महत्या गर्न दुरुत्साहन गर्ने व्यक्तिको अधिकतम जेल सजाय १० वर्षसम्म छ र उनीहरूलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum prison term and additional penalties for someone who abets a suicide, according to section 306?
answer_en: The maximum prison term for someone who abets a suicide, according to section 306, is up to ten years and they may also be liable to a fine.

question: धारा ३०७ अनुसार हत्याको प्रयास भनेको के हो ?
answer: हत्याको प्रयास भनेको कुनै व्यक्तिले त्यस्तो नियत वा ज्ञानका साथ कुनै कार्य गर्दछ र त्यस्तो कार्यले मृत्यु भएको खण्डमा हत्याको दोषी ठहरिने अवस्था हो।
question_en: What constitutes an attempt to murder according to section 307?
answer_en: An attempt to murder is when a person does any act with such intention or knowledge, and under such circumstances that, if he by that act caused death, he would be guilty of murder.

question: हत्याको प्रयास मानिने व्यक्तिको कार्यको परिभाषा के हो?
answer: हत्याको प्रयास भनेको कुनै व्यक्तिले त्यस्तो नियत वा ज्ञानका साथ कुनै कार्य गर्दछ र त्यस्तो कार्यले मृत्यु भएको खण्डमा हत्याको दोषी ठहरिने अवस्था हो।
question_en: What is the definition of a person's act that would be considered as an attempt to murder?
answer_en: An attempt to murder is when a person does any act with such intention or knowledge, and under such circumstances that, if he by that act caused death, he would be guilty of murder.

question: मृत्युको कारण के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: मृत्यु गराउने सजाय दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो र अपराधीलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing death?
answer_en: The punishment for causing death is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and the offender shall also be liable to fine.

question: मृत्युको कारण दोषी ठहरिएका व्यक्तिको लागि अधिकतम जेल सजाय र अन्य दायित्वहरू के हो?
answer: मृत्यु निम्त्याउने कसैको लागि अधिकतम जेल सजाय दश वर्ष सम्म छ, र तिनीहरू पनि जरिवानाको लागि उत्तरदायी छन्।
question_en: What is the maximum prison term and other liabilities for someone convicted of causing death?
answer_en: The maximum prison term for someone convicted of causing death is up to ten years, and they are also liable to a fine.

question: कसैलाई चोट पुगेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: यदि कुनै व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याएको छ भने, अपराधीलाई या त आजीवन कैद वा पहिले उल्लेख गरिए अनुसार सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment if hurt is caused to any person?
answer_en: If hurt is caused to any person, the offender shall be liable either to imprisonment for life, or to such punishment as is previously mentioned.

question: कसैलाई चोट पुर्याउने अपराधीको दायित्व के हो?
answer: कसैलाई चोट पुर्याउने अपराधीलाई कि त आजीवन कारावास वा पहिले उल्लेख गरिए अनुसार सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the liability of an offender who has caused hurt to any person?
answer_en: The offender who has caused hurt to any person shall be liable either to imprisonment for life, or to such punishment as is previously mentioned.

question: चोट लागेमा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय के हुन्छ ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय पाएको व्यक्तिले चोट पुर्‍यायो भने उसलाई मृत्युदण्डको सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a life-convict if hurt is caused?
answer_en: If a life-convict causes hurt, he may be punished with death.

question: यदि तिनीहरूले चोट पुर्‍याएमा जीवन-दोषीलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय पाएको व्यक्तिले चोट पुर्‍यायो भने उसलाई मृत्युदण्डको सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What could potentially happen to a life-convict if they cause hurt?
answer_en: If a life-convict causes hurt, he may be punished with death.

question: अपराधी हत्याको प्रयास गर्ने सम्भावित सजाय के हो?
answer: अपराधी हत्याको प्रयास गर्ने सम्भावित सजाय कैद हो।
question_en: What is the potential punishment for attempting to commit culpable homicide?
answer_en: The potential punishment for attempting to commit culpable homicide is imprisonment.

question: अपराधी हत्याको प्रयासको अपेक्षित परिणाम के हुन्छ?
answer: अपराधी हत्याको प्रयासको अपेक्षित परिणाम जेल हो।
question_en: What is the expected consequence of attempting to commit culpable homicide?
answer_en: The expected consequence of attempting to commit culpable homicide is imprisonment.

question: अपराधसँग सम्बन्धित दृष्टान्तहरूमा के कार्यहरू वर्णन गरिएको छ?
answer: वर्णन गरिएका कार्यहरूमा मार्ने नियतले गोली हानेर, एक्सपोजरबाट बच्चाको मृत्यु गराउने, हत्या गर्ने उद्देश्यले बन्दुक चलाउने, र विष खुवाएर हत्या गर्ने इरादा समावेश छन्।
question_en: What actions are described in the illustrations related to the offence?
answer_en: The actions described include shooting with intent to kill, causing death of a child by exposure, intending to murder and firing a gun, and intending to murder by poisoning.

question: दृष्टान्त अनुसार ज्यान मार्ने नियतले गोली हानेर, पर्दाफास गरेर बालकको ज्यान लिने, हत्या गर्ने मनसायले बन्दुक चलाउने, विष खुवाएर हत्या गर्ने जस्ता कार्यसँग के कस्ता कसुरहरू सम्बन्धित छन् ?
answer: दृष्टान्तहरूले अपराधसँग सम्बन्धित यी कार्यहरू वर्णन गर्दछ।
question_en: What offences are related to the actions such as shooting with intent to kill, causing death of a child by exposure, intending to murder and firing a gun, and intending to murder by poisoning, as per the illustrations?
answer_en: The illustrations describe these actions related to the offence.

question: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय पाएको व्यक्तिलाई चोट लाग्दा के हुन्छ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय पाएको व्यक्तिलाई चोट पु¥याएमा मृत्युदण्डको सजाय हुन सक्छ ।
question_en: What happens when a person under sentence of imprisonment for life causes hurt?
answer_en: If a person under sentence of imprisonment for life causes hurt, he may be punished with death.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले हानि पुर्‍याएमा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय हुन सक्ने सम्भावित सजाय के हो?
answer: सम्भावित सजाय मृत्यु हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential punishment for a person under sentence of imprisonment for life if they cause harm?
answer_en: The potential punishment could be death.

question: कुनै कार्यले कसैलाई चोट पुर्याएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing hurt to any person by an act?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कानुनी नतिजाहरूको सन्दर्भमा अर्को व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याउने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What may happen to a person who hurts another person, in terms of legal consequences?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.

question: आत्महत्याको प्रयास गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: त्यस्तो व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for attempting to commit suicide?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year or with fine, or with both.

question: एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्ने अपराधको सजाय के हो?
answer: आत्महत्याको प्रयास गर्नेलाई सजाय।
question_en: What is the penalty for a crime that may extend to one year of simple imprisonment or with fine, or both?
answer_en: The punishment for attempting to commit suicide.

question: यस ऐन अनुसार 'ठग' को परिभाषा के हो?
answer: ‘ठग’ भन्नाले यो ऐन पारित भएपछि जुनसुकै बेला हत्याको माध्यमबाट लुटपाट वा बालचोरी गर्ने प्रयोजनका लागि कुनै पनि व्यक्ति वा अन्य व्यक्तिसँग बानी परेको वा त्यसमा संलग्न भएको व्यक्तिलाई ‘ठग’ भनिन्छ।
question_en: What is the definition of a 'thug' according to this act?
answer_en: A 'thug' is defined as whoever, at any time after the passing of this Act, shall have been habitually associated with any other or others for the purpose of committing robbery or child-stealing by means of or accompanied with murder.

question: यो कार्य कसलाई 'ठग' को रूपमा वर्गीकृत गर्दछ?
answer: यस ऐनले ऐन पारित भइसकेपछि डकैती वा बालचोरी गर्ने वा हत्यामा संलग्न हुने उद्देश्यले अरुसँग सम्बन्ध राखेको व्यक्तिलाई ‘ठग’ भनी वर्गीकरण गरेको छ।
question_en: Who does this act categorize as a 'thug'?
answer_en: This act categorizes as a 'thug' anyone who, after the passing of the act, has habitually associated with others for the purpose of committing robbery or child-stealing through or accompanied by murder.

question: ठगलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: ठगको सजाय आजीवन कारावास हो, र जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for being a thug?
answer_en: The punishment for being a thug is imprisonment for life, and also being liable to fine.

question: यदि कसैलाई ठग भएको आरोपमा आजीवन कारावास भयो भने उसको के दायित्व हुन्छ ?
answer: कसैलाई ठग भएको आरोपमा आजीवन कारावासको सजाय पनि हुन्छ।
question_en: What is someone liable to if they are imprisoned for life for being a thug?
answer_en: Someone imprisoned for life for being a thug is also liable to a fine.

question: गर्भपतन गराउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ; र, यदि महिलाले छिट्टै बच्चा जन्माएमा सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing a miscarriage?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both; and, if the woman be quick with child, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: गर्भपात गराउने कैदको अधिकतम लम्बाइ कति हुन्छ, र यदि महिलाले बच्चा जन्माएमा यो लम्बाइ फरक हुन्छ?
answer: गर्भपतन गराउने कैदको अधिकतम अवधि तीन वर्षसम्म हुन सक्छ। तर, छिट्टै बच्चा जन्माएमा सात वर्षसम्म कैद हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the maximum length of imprisonment for causing a miscarriage, and does this length differ if the woman is quick with child?
answer_en: The maximum length of imprisonment for causing a miscarriage may extend to three years. However, if the woman is quick with child, the imprisonment may extend to seven years.

question: महिलाको सहमतिबिना गर्भपतन गराउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: प्रदान गरिएको पाठमा सजायको विवरण पूर्ण रूपमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन, तर यो महिलाको सहमति बिना अन्तिम अघिल्लो खण्डमा परिभाषित गरिएको अपराध हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing a miscarriage without the woman's consent?
answer_en: The punishment details are not completely provided in the provided text, but it is an offence defined in the last preceding section without the consent of the woman.

question: पछिल्लो अघिल्लो खण्डमा महिलाको मञ्जुरीविना गरेको अपराधलाई के भनिएको छ ?
answer: महिलाको सहमतिबिना गर्भपतन गराउनुलाई पछिल्लो खण्डमा अपराधको रूपमा परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What is defined as an offence in the last preceding section without the consent of the woman?
answer_en: Causing a miscarriage without the woman's consent is defined as an offence in the last preceding section.

question: गर्भपतन गराउने नियतले मृत्यु गराउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing death with the intent to cause miscarriage?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to ten years, and the individual shall also be liable to fine.

question: जानाजानी गर्भपतन गराएर मृत्यु निम्त्याउने व्यक्तिको लागि सम्भावित दण्ड के हो?
answer: सम्भावित जरिवाना दश वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for someone who intentionally causes a miscarriage leading to death?
answer_en: The potential penalty is imprisonment which may extend to ten years, and the individual shall also be liable to fine.

question: महिलाको मञ्जुरीविना काम गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय या त आजीवन कारावास हो, वा माथि उल्लेखित सजाय सहित।
question_en: What is the punishment if the act is done without the woman's consent?
answer_en: The punishment is either imprisonment for life, or with the punishment above mentioned.

question: महिलाको मञ्जुरीमा काम गरेमा परिणाम के हुन्छ ?
answer: नतिजा आजीवन कारावास वा पहिले उल्लेख गरिएको सजाय होइन।
question_en: What is the consequence if the act is done with the woman's consent?
answer_en: The consequence is not imprisonment for life or the previously mentioned punishment.

question: के यो अपराधीलाई थाहा हुनु आवश्यक छ कि कार्यले मृत्यु हुन सक्छ?
answer: होइन, यो अपराधको लागि यो आवश्यक छैन कि अपराधीलाई यो कार्यले मृत्युको कारण हुन सक्छ भनेर थाहा हुनुपर्छ।
question_en: Is it essential for the offender to know that the act is likely to cause death?
answer_en: No, it is not essential to this offence that the offender should know that the act is likely to cause death.

question: के यो अपराधको लागि आवश्यक छ कि अपराधीलाई थाहा छ कि आफ्नो कार्यले मृत्यु हुन सक्छ?
answer: होइन, अपराधीलाई थाहा हुनु आवश्यक छैन कि तिनीहरूको कार्यले यो विशेष अपराधको लागि मृत्यु हुन सक्छ।
question_en: Is it necessary for this offence that the offender is aware their actions may result in death?
answer_en: No, the offender does not need to know that their actions could possibly lead to death for this specific offence.

question: बच्चालाई जिउँदै जन्माउनबाट रोक्ने वा जन्मेपछि मर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: दश वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for preventing a child from being born alive or causing it to die after birth?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to ten years, or with fine, or with both.

question: बच्चालाई जिउँदै जन्माउनबाट रोक्ने वा जन्मेपछि मर्न लगाएमा कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने सजायको हद के हो?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the extent of punishment that includes imprisonment, fine, or both for preventing a child from being born alive or causing it to die after birth?
answer_en: The punishment may extend to ten years.

question: निर्दोष हत्याको कार्य गरेर छिटो गर्भमा रहेको बच्चाको मृत्यु गराउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय कैद हो जुन अवधि सम्म विस्तार हुन सक्छ जुन दिइएको पाठमा निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing death of a quick unborn child by act amounting to culpable homicide?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to a term which is not specified in the given text.

question: अकस्मात जन्मेको बच्चाको मृत्यु दण्डनीय हत्याको कार्यले के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय कैद हो जुन अवधि सम्म विस्तार हुन सक्छ जुन दिइएको पाठमा निर्दिष्ट गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing the death of a quick unborn child by an act amounting to culpable homicide?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to a term which is not specified in the given text.

question: गर्भवति महिलाको मृत्यु हुनसक्ने कार्य थाहा पाएर गर्भमा रहेको बच्चाको मृत्यु गराउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ र जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing the death of an unborn child knowing the act is likely to cause the death of a pregnant woman?
answer_en: The punishment can extend up to ten years and may also be liable to fine.

question: गर्भवती महिलाको मृत्यु हुनसक्ने कार्यले गर्दा गर्भमा रहेको बच्चाको मृत्यु हुनसक्ने थाहा भई मृत्यु गराउनेलाई अधिकतम सजाय र थप दायित्व के हो?
answer: अधिकतम दश वर्षसम्म सजाय हुन सक्छ र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum punishment and additional liabilities for causing the death of an unborn child knowing the act is likely to cause the death of a pregnant woman?
answer_en: The maximum punishment can extend up to ten years and the person may also be liable to fine.

question: बाह्र वर्ष मुनिको बच्चालाई बाबुआमा वा हेरचाह गर्ने व्यक्तिले खुलासा गर्ने र त्याग्दा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for exposing and abandoning a child under twelve years, by parent or person having care of it?
answer_en: The punishment can extend up to seven years of imprisonment, or with fine, or with both.

question: बाह्र वर्ष मुनिको बच्चालाई परित्याग गर्ने अभिभावक वा व्यक्तिलाई कैद र जरिवाना सहितको अधिकतम सजाय के हो?
answer: सजाय सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum punishment, including imprisonment and fines, for a parent or person who abandons a child under twelve years of age?
answer_en: The punishment can extend up to seven years of imprisonment, or with fine, or with both.

question: बच्चाको जन्म लुकाएर शवको गोप्य विसर्जन गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for concealing the birth of a child by secretly disposing of the dead body?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: शवलाई गोप्य रुपमा विसर्जन गरेर सन्तानको जन्म लुकाउनेलाई कति सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum punishment for a person who conceals the birth of a child by secretly disposing the dead body?
answer_en: The maximum punishment can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with a fine, or with both.

question: 'हार्ट' शब्दले कानूनमा के बुझाउँछ?
answer: चोट भनेको कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई शारीरिक पीडा, रोग वा अशक्तता निम्त्याउने कार्यलाई जनाउँछ।
question_en: What does the term 'Hurt' refer to in law?
answer_en: Hurt refers to the act of causing bodily pain, disease or infirmity to any person.

question: कानूनमा 'हर्ट' शब्दले कुन कार्यलाई जनाउँछ?
answer: कानूनमा 'हर्ट' शब्दले कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई शारीरिक पीडा, रोग वा अशक्तता निम्त्याउने कार्यलाई जनाउँछ।
question_en: What act does the term 'Hurt' in law refer to?
answer_en: The term 'Hurt' in law refers to the act of causing bodily pain, disease or infirmity to any person.

question: 'गर्भस्य चोट' भनेको के हो?
answer: गहकिलो चोट भनेको कमजोर हुनु, दृष्टि वा श्रवणको स्थायी एकान्तमा, कुनै सदस्य वा जोर्नीको एकान्त, कुनै सदस्य वा जोर्नीको शक्तिको विनाश वा स्थायी क्षति, टाउको वा अनुहारको स्थायी विकृति, हड्डी वा दाँत भाँच्नु वा विच्छेदन र जीवनलाई खतरामा पार्ने कुनै पनि चोट समावेश गर्दछ।
question_en: What constitutes 'Grievous hurt'?
answer_en: Grievous hurt includes emasculation, permanent privation of sight or hearing, privation of any member or joint, destruction or permanent impairing of the powers of any member or joint, permanent disfiguration of the head or face, fracture or dislocation of a bone or tooth and any hurt which endangers life.

question: कमजोरी, दृष्टि वा श्रवणको स्थायी एकान्त, कुनै सदस्य वा जोर्नीको एकान्त, कुनै सदस्य वा जोर्नीको शक्तिको विनाश वा स्थायी क्षति, टाउको वा अनुहारको स्थायी विकृति, हड्डी वा दाँत भाँच्नु वा विचलित हुनु र जीवनलाई खतरामा पार्ने कुनै चोटले के बुझाउँछ?
answer: यसले 'गिभस दुखाइ' लाई जनाउँछ।
question_en: What does emasculation, permanent privation of sight or hearing, privation of any member or joint, destruction or permanent impairing of the powers of any member or joint, permanent disfiguration of the head or face, fracture or dislocation of a bone or tooth and any hurt which endangers life refer to?
answer_en: These refer to 'Grievous hurt'.

question: पाठ अनुसार स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्याउने को परिभाषा के हो?
answer: स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्याउनु भनेको कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याउने नियतले वा कुनै व्यक्तिले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई चोट पुर्याउने सम्भावना रहेको थाहा पाएर कुनै पनि कार्य गर्नुलाई परिभाषित गर्दछ।
question_en: What is the definition of voluntarily causing hurt according to the text?
answer_en: Voluntarily causing hurt is defined as doing any act with the intention of thereby causing hurt to any person, or with the knowledge that one is likely to cause hurt to any person, and does thereby cause hurt to any person.

question: कसैले कसैलाई हानि पु¥याउने नियतले कुनै कार्य गर्दा वा कसैलाई हानि पु¥याउने सम्भावना रहेको थाहा पाएर त्यसले कसैलाई हानि पु¥याउने नियतले कुनै कार्य गर्दा के बुझिन्छ ?
answer: यो पाठ अनुसार स्वैच्छिक चोट को रूप मा परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What does it mean when someone is doing any act with the intention of thereby causing hurt to any person, or with the knowledge that one is likely to cause hurt to any person, and does thereby cause hurt to any person?
answer_en: This is defined as voluntarily causing hurt according to the text.

question: स्वैच्छिक रूपमा गम्भीर चोट पुर्याउने परिभाषा के हो?
answer: स्वैच्छिक रूपमा गहिरो चोट पुर्‍याउनु भनेको स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्‍याउने भनेर परिभाषित गरिएको छ, यदि कसैलाई चोट पुर्याउन मन लागेको छ वा आफैलाई हुन सक्ने सम्भावना थाहा छ भने त्यो गम्भीर चोट हो, र यदि चोट जसले कारण दिन्छ त्यो गम्भीर चोट हो। एक व्यक्तिलाई स्वेच्छाले गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउन भनिएको छैन बाहेक जब उसले दुबै गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ र आफूलाई गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउने सम्भावित इरादा वा जान्दछ।
question_en: What is the definition of voluntarily causing grievous hurt?
answer_en: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt is defined as voluntarily causing hurt, if the hurt which one intends to cause or knows oneself to be likely to cause is grievous hurt, and if the hurt which one causes is grievous hurt. A person is not said voluntarily to cause grievous hurt except when he both causes grievous hurt and intends or knows himself to be likely to cause grievous hurt.

question: कहिले एक व्यक्तिले स्वेच्छाले गहिरो चोट पुर्याएको भन्न सकिन्छ?
answer: एक व्यक्तिलाई स्वेच्छिक रूपमा गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ भनिन्छ जब उसले दुबै गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ र आफूलाई गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउने सम्भावित इरादा वा जान्दछ।
question_en: When can a person be said to voluntarily cause grievous hurt?
answer_en: A person is said to voluntarily cause grievous hurt when he both causes grievous hurt and intends or knows himself to be likely to cause grievous hurt.

question: पाठ अनुसार स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्‍याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्याउने सजाय एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing hurt as per the text?
answer_en: The punishment for voluntarily causing hurt is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.

question: कानुन बमोजिम स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्याएमा अधिकतम कैद र जरिवाना कति हुन्छ ?
answer: स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्‍याएमा अधिकतम एक वर्ष कैद र एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term and fine for voluntarily causing hurt according to the law?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term for voluntarily causing hurt can be up to one year, and the fine can go up to one thousand rupees.

question: 'स्वैच्छिक रूपमा खतरनाक हतियार वा माध्यमद्वारा चोट पुर्याउनु' भन्नाले के बुझिन्छ?
answer: स्वैच्छिक रूपमा खतरनाक हतियार वा माध्यमले चोट पुर्याउनु भनेको गोली, छुरा वा काट्ने वा अपराधको हतियारको रूपमा प्रयोग गरी मृत्यु हुन सक्ने कुनै पनि उपकरणको माध्यमबाट स्वैच्छिक रूपमा चोट पुर्‍याउनु हो।
question_en: What does 'Voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means' refer to?
answer_en: Voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means refers to voluntarily causing hurt by means of any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting, or any instrument which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death.

question: अपराधको हतियारको रूपमा प्रयोग हुने र मृत्यु हुनसक्ने साधन भन्नाले के बुझिन्छ?
answer: अपराधको हतियारको रूपमा प्रयोग हुने र मृत्युको कारण हुने सम्भावित उपकरणले 'स्वैच्छिक रूपमा खतरनाक हतियार वा माध्यमले चोट पुर्याउने' लाई जनाउँछ, जसमा गोली हान्न, छुरा प्रहार वा काट्ने कुनै पनि उपकरण समावेश हुन्छ।
question_en: What is meant by an instrument that is used as a weapon of offence and is likely to cause death?
answer_en: An instrument that is used as a weapon of offence and is likely to cause death refers to 'voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means', which includes any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting.

question: एक प्रकारको पीडादायी चोट पुर्याउन खोज्ने व्यक्तिले वास्तवमा अर्को प्रकारको गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ भने के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिले अझै पनि स्वैच्छिक रूपमा गहिरो चोट पुर्याएको भनिन्छ, यद्यपि आफूलाई एक प्रकारको गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउने सम्भावना रहेको वा थाहा भए पनि, उसले वास्तवमा अर्को प्रकारको गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ।
question_en: What happens if a person intending to cause grievous hurt of one kind actually causes grievous hurt of another kind?
answer_en: The person is still said to have voluntarily caused grievous hurt, even if intending or knowing himself to be likely to cause grievous hurt of one kind, he actually causes grievous hurt of another kind.

question: के एक व्यक्तिले अझै पनि स्वेच्छाले गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याएको मानिन्छ यदि उसले कुनै निश्चित प्रकारको पीडादायी चोट पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्य राख्यो तर अर्को प्रकारको कारण समाप्त भयो?
answer: हो, व्यक्तिले अझै पनि स्वैच्छिक रूपमा गहिरो चोट पुर्याएको भनिन्छ, यद्यपि वा आफैलाई एक प्रकारको गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउने सम्भाव्यता थाहा भए पनि, उसले वास्तवमा अर्को प्रकारको गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउँछ।
question_en: Is a person still considered to have voluntarily caused grievous hurt if he intended to cause a certain kind of grievous hurt but ended up causing a different kind?
answer_en: Yes, the person is still said to have voluntarily caused grievous hurt, even if intending or knowing himself to be likely to cause grievous hurt of one kind, he actually causes grievous hurt of another kind.

question: आगो, विष, संक्षारक पदार्थ, विष्फोटक पदार्थ वा मानव शरीरलाई हानि पु¥याउने कुनै पनि पदार्थको प्रयोग गरी हानि पु¥याएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्मको कैद वा आजीवन कारावाससम्म हुन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing harm using fire, poison, corrosive substance, explosive substance, or any substance harmful to the human body?
answer_en: The punishment can range from imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, or with imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: आगो, विष, संक्षारक पदार्थ, विष्फोटक पदार्थ वा मानव शरीरलाई हानिकारक कुनै पदार्थ प्रयोग गरी हानि पुऱ्याउन दोषी पाइएमा कसैलाई कस्तो सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्मको कैद वा आजीवन कारावाससम्म हुन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for someone who is found guilty of causing harm using fire, poison, corrosive substance, explosive substance, or any substance harmful to the human body?
answer_en: The punishment can range from imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, or with imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छाले गम्भिर चोट पुर्‍याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउने सजाय सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt?
answer_en: The punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt is imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउनको लागि कति समयसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ र अरू के दायित्वहरू छन्?
answer: कसैलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ र स्वेच्छिक रूपमा गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याएमा जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: How long can one be imprisoned and what other liabilities are there for voluntarily causing grievous hurt?
answer_en: One can be imprisoned for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine for voluntarily causing grievous hurt.

question: खतरनाक हतियार प्रयोग गरेर हानि पुर्‍याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: खतरनाक हतियार प्रयोग गरी हानि पुर्‍याउने सजाय दश वर्षसम्म कैद वा आजीवन कारावाससम्म हुन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing harm using dangerous weapons?
answer_en: The punishment for causing harm using dangerous weapons can range from imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, or with imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: खतरनाक हतियार प्रयोग गरी हानि पुर्‍याउनको लागि कैद वा वैकल्पिक सजायको लागि अधिकतम अवधि के हो?
answer: खतरनाक हतियारको प्रयोग गरी हानि पुऱ्याएमा अधिकतम सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा वैकल्पिक रूपमा दश वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना समेत हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term for imprisonment or the alternative punishment for causing harm using dangerous weapons?
answer_en: The maximum term for causing harm using dangerous weapons can be imprisonment for life, or alternatively, imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, along with a fine.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिको शरीरको कुनै अंग वा अङ्गलाई स्थायी वा आंशिक क्षति वा विकृति पु¥याएमा वा जलाएमा वा अपाङ्गता भएमा वा कुरूप वा अशक्त बनाएमा वा एसिड हानेर गम्भीर चोट पुर्याएमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय दश वर्ष भन्दा कम नहुने अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing permanent or partial damage or deformity to, or burns or maims or disfigures or disables, any part or parts of the body of a person or causes grievous hurt by throwing acid?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than ten years.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिको शरीरको कुनै अंग वा अङ्गलाई स्थायी वा आंशिक क्षति वा विकृति पु¥याएमा वा जलाएमा वा अपाङ्ग गरेमा वा कुरूप वा अशक्त बनाएमा वा एसिड हानेर गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याएमा न्यूनतम कैद सजाय कति हुन्छ ?
answer: कैदको न्यूनतम अवधि दस वर्ष छ।
question_en: What is the minimum term of imprisonment for causing permanent or partial damage or deformity to, or burns or maims or disfigures or disables, any part or parts of the body of a person or causes grievous hurt by throwing acid?
answer_en: The minimum term of imprisonment is ten years.

question: स्वेच्छाले कुनै व्यक्तिमाथि एसिड फाल्ने वा फ्याँक्ने प्रयास गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय भनेको पाँच वर्षभन्दा कम नहुने तर सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद हो र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily throwing or attempting to throw acid on any person?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than five years but which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कम्तीमा पाँच वर्ष र अधिकतम सात वर्षसम्मको सजाय हुने गरी जरिवानासहितको अपराधमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: यस्तो अपराधको सजाय स्वेच्छिक रूपमा कुनै पनि व्यक्तिमाथि एसिड फाल्ने वा फ्याँक्ने प्रयास गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What is the penalty for a crime that carries a minimum sentence of five years and a maximum sentence of seven years, along with a fine?
answer_en: The penalty for such a crime could be voluntarily throwing or attempting to throw acid on any person.

question: धारा 326A र 326B को सन्दर्भमा 'एसिड' भन्नाले के बुझाउँछ?
answer: 'एसिड' भन्नाले अम्लीय वा संक्षारक चरित्र वा जलाउने प्रकृति भएको कुनै पनि पदार्थ समावेश गर्दछ, जसले शारीरिक चोटपटक वा दाग वा विकृति वा अस्थायी वा स्थायी अशक्तता निम्त्याउन सक्षम हुन्छ।
question_en: What does 'acid' refer to in the context of sections 326A and 326B?
answer_en: 'Acid' includes any substance which has acidic or corrosive character or burning nature, that is capable of causing bodily injury leading to scars or disfigurement or temporary or permanent disability.

question: सेक्सन ३२६ए र ३२६बी मा परिभाषित गरिए अनुसार कुन प्रकारको पदार्थले शारीरिक चोटपटक वा दाग वा विकृति वा अस्थायी वा स्थायी असक्षमता निम्त्याउन सक्षम छ?
answer: अम्लीय वा संक्षारक चरित्र वा जलाउने प्रकृति भएको कुनै पनि पदार्थलाई बुझाउन 'एसिड' शब्द प्रयोग गरिन्छ।
question_en: What kind of substance is capable of causing bodily injury leading to scars or disfigurement or temporary or permanent disability, as defined in sections 326A and 326B?
answer_en: The term 'acid' is used to refer to any substance which has acidic or corrosive character or burning nature that can cause such injuries.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा सम्पत्ति हानि पुर्‍याउन वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउनको लागि के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न, वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउन चोट पुर्‍याउने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम सजाय र थप दायित्व के हो?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय दश वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum sentence and additional liabilities for a person who voluntarily causes hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act?
answer_en: The maximum sentence is imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and the person may also be liable to a fine.

question: धारा 326A र 326B को सन्दर्भमा 'स्थायी वा आंशिक क्षति वा विकृति' भन्नाले के बुझाउँछ?
answer: स्थायी वा आंशिक क्षति वा विकृति अपरिवर्तनीय हुनु आवश्यक छैन।
question_en: What does 'permanent or partial damage or deformity' refer to in the context of sections 326A and 326B?
answer_en: Permanent or partial damage or deformity shall not be required to be irreversible.

question: के धारा 326A र 326B मा उल्लेख गरिएको 'स्थायी वा आंशिक क्षति वा विकृति' अपरिवर्तनीय हुनु आवश्यक छ?
answer: होइन, स्थायी वा आंशिक क्षति वा विकृति अपरिवर्तनीय हुन आवश्यक छैन।
question_en: Is the 'permanent or partial damage or deformity' as referenced in sections 326A and 326B required to be irreversible?
answer_en: No, permanent or partial damage or deformity shall not be required to be irreversible.

question: यस दफा अन्तर्गतको जरिवाना कसलाई तिर्नु पर्छ?
answer: यस दफा अन्तर्गतको जरिवाना पीडितलाई तिर्नुपर्नेछ।
question_en: Who should the fine imposed under this section be paid to?
answer_en: The fine imposed under this section shall be paid to the victim.

question: यस दफा अन्तर्गतको जरिवाना कसलाई तिर्नु पर्ने हो?
answer: पीडित
question_en: Who is the fine imposed under this section supposed to be paid to?
answer_en: The victim

question: कसूर गर्ने मनसायले हानि पु¥याएमा वा चोट पुग्छ भन्ने थाहा पाएर के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कैद, र उत्तरदायी जरिवाना।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing harm with the intent of committing an offence or knowing it will cause hurt?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and a liable fine.

question: हानि पु¥याउने वा हानि पु¥याउने नियतले गरेको अपराधको लागि अधिकतम सम्भावित सजाय र थप जरिवाना कति छ ?
answer: कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कैद, र उत्तरदायी जरिवाना।
question_en: What is the maximum possible sentence and additional penalties for a crime committed with the intent of causing harm or knowing it will cause hurt?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and a liable fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न, वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउन गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउनको लागि के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय, वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद जुन दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the penalty for voluntarily causing grievous hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act?
answer_en: Punishment with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा सम्पत्ति लुटाउन वा गैरकानूनी कार्य गर्न बाध्य पार्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: आजीवन कारावासको सजाय, वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद जुन दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who voluntarily causes grievous hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act?
answer_en: Punishment with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्याउन वा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न बाध्य पार्ने सजाय के हो?
answer: कुनै पनि विवरणको लागि सात वर्षसम्म कैद, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing hurt to extort a confession, or to compel restoration of property?
answer_en: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and also liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती स्वीकार वा सम्पत्ति पुनर्स्थापना गर्न चोट पुर्याउने व्यक्तिलाई कैद र थप दायित्वको अधिकतम अवधि के हो?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि सात वर्षसम्म हुन सक्छ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and additional liability for someone who voluntarily causes hurt to extort a confession or compel restoration of property?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment may extend to seven years, and the person is also liable to a fine.

question: प्रहरी अधिकारीले कसैलाई कबुली दिन वा चोरी भएको निश्चित सम्पत्ति कहाँ छ भनी औंल्याउन यातना दिएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: प्रहरी अधिकारी अपराधको दोषी छ र सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि वर्णनको अवधिको लागि सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the penalty if a police officer tortures someone to induce a confession or to point out where certain stolen property is?
answer_en: The police officer is guilty of an offence and the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and also liable to fine.

question: चोरी भएको सम्पत्तिको स्थान खुलाउन वा स्वीकार गर्न कसैलाई यातना दिने प्रहरी अधिकृतलाई के कसुर र सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: प्रहरी अधिकारी अपराधको दोषी छ र सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि वर्णनको अवधिको लागि सात वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the offence and punishment for a police officer who tortures someone to make them confess or disclose the location of stolen property?
answer_en: The police officer is guilty of an offence and the punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and also liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छिक रूपमा जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती स्वीकार गर्न, वा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न बाध्य पार्न गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउनको लागि के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt to extort confession, or to compel restoration of property?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: स्वेच्छाले जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती स्वीकार गर्न वा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न बाध्य पार्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद र थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: अधिकतम दश वर्ष कैद हुनेछ, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term and additional penalty for a person who voluntarily causes grievous hurt to extort confession, or to compel restoration of property?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term is ten years, and the person shall also be liable to a fine.

question: बक्यौता राजस्व तिर्न बाध्य पार्न कसैलाई यातना दिने राजस्व अधिकृतलाई के कसुर हो ?
answer: यस दफा अन्तर्गतको अपराधमा राजस्व अधिकारी दोषी छ।
question_en: What is the offence for a revenue officer who tortures someone to compel them to pay certain arrears of revenue due?
answer_en: The revenue officer is guilty of an offence under this section.

question: बक्यौता राजस्व तिर्न बाध्य पार्न कसैलाई यातना दिएमा निश्चित दफा अन्तर्गतको कसूरको दोषी को हो?
answer: राजस्व अधिकारी अपराधमा दोषी छन्।
question_en: Who is guilty of an offence under a certain section if they torture someone to compel them to pay certain arrears of revenue due?
answer_en: The revenue officer is guilty of the offence.

question: भाडा तिर्न बाध्य पार्न रयतलाई यातना दिने जमिन्दारलाई के अपराध हुन्छ ?
answer: जमिन्दार यस दफा अन्तर्गतको अपराधको लागि दोषी छ।
question_en: What is the offence for a zamindar who tortures a raiyat to compel them to pay rent?
answer_en: The zamindar is guilty of an offence under this section.

question: भाडा तिर्न बाध्य पार्न रयतलाई यातना दिएमा यस दफा अन्तर्गत कसलाई दोषी मानिन्छ?
answer: जमिन्दार
question_en: Who is considered guilty of an offence under this section if they torture a raiyat to compel them to pay rent?
answer_en: A zamindar

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई आफ्नो कर्तव्यबाट जोगाउन स्वेच्छाले चोट पुर्याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing hurt to deter a public servant from his duty?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई आफ्नो कर्तव्य पूरा गर्नबाट रोक्न स्वेच्छाले हानि पुऱ्याउने व्यक्तिको सम्भावित परिणाम के हुन सक्छ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What could be the potential consequences for a person who voluntarily causes harm to prevent a public servant from performing his duties?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: सार्वजनिक सेवकलाई आफ्नो कर्तव्यबाट रोक्न स्वेच्छाले गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt to deter a public servant from his duty?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीलाई आफ्नो कर्तव्यबाट जोगाउन स्वेच्छाले गम्भीर चोट पुर्याउने व्यक्तिलाई कैद र अन्य सजायको अधिकतम अवधि के हो?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि दस वर्ष हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and other penalties for a person who voluntarily causes grievous hurt to deter a public servant from his duty?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is ten years, and the person is also liable to a fine.

question: अरूको जीवन वा व्यक्तिगत सुरक्षालाई खतरामा पार्ने कार्य गरेर गम्भीर चोट पुर्‍याउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for causing grievous hurt by act endangering life or personal safety of others?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.

question: कसैको जीवन वा व्यक्तिगत सुरक्षालाई खतरामा पार्ने कार्यबाट गम्भीर चोट पुर्याउने अपराधको लागि कैद र जरिवाना रकम के हो?
answer: दुई वर्षसम्म कैद र एक हजार रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the imprisonment term and fine amount for a crime that involves causing grievous hurt by act endangering life or personal safety of others?
answer_en: The imprisonment term can extend to two years and the fine amount may extend to one thousand rupees.

question: गलत संयम भनेको के हो?
answer: गलत संयम भनेको जब कसैले स्वेच्छाले कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई बाधा पुर्‍याउँछ ताकि त्यो व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि दिशामा अघि बढ्नबाट रोक्नको लागि त्यो व्यक्तिलाई अगाडि बढ्ने अधिकार छ।
question_en: What is wrongful restraint?
answer_en: Wrongful restraint is when someone voluntarily obstructs any person so as to prevent that person from proceeding in any direction in which that person has a right to proceed.

question: कसैले स्वेच्छाले कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई त्यस व्यक्तिलाई अगाडि बढ्ने अधिकार भएको कुनै पनि दिशामा अघि बढ्नबाट रोक्नको लागि अवरोध गर्दा यसको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यसलाई गलत संयम भनिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when someone voluntarily obstructs any person so as to prevent that person from proceeding in any direction in which that person has a right to proceed?
answer_en: This is referred to as wrongful restraint.

question: गलत संयमको अपवाद के हो?
answer: जमिन वा पानीमाथिको निजी मार्गको अवरोध जुन असल विश्वासका साथ व्यक्तिले आफूलाई अवरोध गर्ने कानूनी अधिकार छ भनी विश्वास गर्छ, त्यो गलत निषेधको अर्थमा अपराध होइन।
question_en: What is the exception to wrongful restraint?
answer_en: The obstruction of a private way over land or water which a person in good faith believes himself to have a lawful right to obstruct, is not an offence within the meaning of wrongful restraint.

question: गलत निषेधको अर्थमा के अपराध मानिदैन?
answer: जमिन वा पानीमाथिको निजी मार्गको अवरोध जसलाई असल विश्वासमा रहेको व्यक्तिले आफूलाई अवरोध गर्ने कानूनी अधिकार छ भनी विश्वास गर्छ।
question_en: What is not considered an offence within the meaning of wrongful restraint?
answer_en: The obstruction of a private way over land or water which a person in good faith believes himself to have a lawful right to obstruct

question: गलत बन्दी के हो?
answer: गलत कारावास भनेको जब कसैले गलत तरिकाले कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई निश्चित परिधिको सीमाभन्दा बाहिरको कार्यवाहीबाट रोक्नको लागि रोक्छ।
question_en: What is wrongful confinement?
answer_en: Wrongful confinement is when someone wrongfully restrains any person in such a manner as to prevent that person from proceedings beyond certain circumscribing limits.

question: कुन शब्दले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई निश्चित परिधिको सीमाभन्दा बाहिर जानबाट रोक्नको लागि गलत तरिकाले एक व्यक्तिलाई रोक्ने कार्यलाई वर्णन गर्दछ?
answer: शब्द गलत कैद हो।
question_en: What term describes the act of wrongfully restraining a person in such a manner as to prevent that person from proceeding beyond certain circumscribing limits?
answer_en: The term is wrongful confinement.

question: गलत निषेध गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजायमा एक महिनासम्म कैद वा पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for wrongful restraint?
answer_en: The punishment is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.

question: गलत प्रतिबन्धको लागि कैद र जरिवानाको अधिकतम अवधि कति छ?
answer: गल्ती गर्नेलाई अधिकतम एक महिना कैद र पाँच सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the maximum duration of imprisonment and amount of fine for wrongful restraint?
answer_en: The maximum duration of imprisonment for wrongful restraint may extend to one month, and the fine may extend to five hundred rupees.

question: गलत तरिकाले तीन वा सोभन्दा बढी दिन थुनामा राखेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: गलत तरिकाले तीन दिन वा सोभन्दा बढी थुनामा राखेमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for wrongful confinement for three or more days?
answer_en: The punishment for wrongful confinement for three days or more is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेमा तीन दिन वा सोभन्दा बढी कैदको अवधि के हुन सक्छ?
answer: गलत तरिकाले तीन दिन वा सोभन्दा बढी कैदको सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What may the imprisonment term extend to for wrongful confinement for three days or more?
answer_en: The imprisonment term for wrongful confinement for three days or more may extend to two years.

question: गलत तरिकाले दश वा सोभन्दा बढी दिन थुनामा राखेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: गलत तरिकाले दश दिन वा सोभन्दा बढी थुनामा राखेमा तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for wrongful confinement for ten or more days?
answer_en: The punishment for wrongful confinement for ten days or more is imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेको अभियोगमा दश वा सोभन्दा बढी दिनको सजाय पाएको व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद र थप दायित्व कति हुन्छ?
answer: गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेको अभियोगमा दश वा सोभन्दा बढी दिनसम्म कैद हुने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम तीन वर्षसम्म कैद हुनेछ र उनीहरूलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term and additional liability for a person convicted of wrongful confinement for ten or more days?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term for a person convicted of wrongful confinement for ten or more days is up to three years, and they shall also be liable to a fine.

question: मुक्ति रिट जारी भएको व्यक्तिलाई कसैले गलत तरिकाले थुन्यो भने के हुन्छ?
answer: त्यस व्यक्तिको मुक्तिको लागि रिट विधिवत जारी भएको थाहा पाएर कसैलाई गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेमा निजलाई यस परिच्छेदको अन्य कुनै दफा बमोजिम सजाय हुन सक्ने कैद सजायको अतिरिक्त दुई वर्षसम्म कैदको सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What happens if someone wrongfully confines a person for whose liberation writ has been issued?
answer_en: Whoever keeps any person in wrongful confinement, knowing that a writ for the liberation of that person has been duly issued, shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years in addition to any term of imprisonment to which he may be liable under any other section of this Chapter.

question: त्यो व्यक्तिको मुक्तिको लागि रिट जारी भएको थाहा पाएर गलत तरिकाले व्यक्तिलाई थुन्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई यस परिच्छेदको अन्य कुनै दफा अन्तर्गत जिम्मेवार हुन सक्ने कैदको अवधिको अतिरिक्त दुई वर्षसम्मको कैद सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who wrongfully confines a person, knowing that a writ for that person's liberation has been issued?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years in addition to any term of imprisonment to which he may be liable under any other section of this Chapter.

question: गोप्य रूपमा गलत थुनामा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: गोप्य रूपमा गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेको सजायको लागि दुई वर्षसम्म कैद हुने सजाय हो जुन अन्य कुनै सजायको अतिरिक्त उसलाई त्यस्तो गलत कारावासको लागि जिम्मेवार हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for wrongful confinement in secret?
answer_en: The punishment for wrongful confinement in secret is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years in addition to any other punishment to which he may be liable for such wrongful confinement.

question: अन्य दायित्वका अतिरिक्त गोप्य रूपमा गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेको अभियोगमा कसैलाई कैदको अधिकतम अवधि कति हुन्छ?
answer: गोप्य रूपमा गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राखेको अभियोगमा कसैलाई कैदको अधिकतम अवधि अन्य दायित्वहरूको अतिरिक्त दुई वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum duration of imprisonment for someone convicted of wrongful confinement in secret, in addition to other liabilities?
answer_en: The maximum duration of imprisonment for someone convicted of wrongful confinement in secret can extend to two years, in addition to other liabilities.

question: सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउन गलत तरिकाले थुनामा राख्ने सजाय के हो?
answer: सम्पत्ति फिर्ता लिनको लागि गलत कैद वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउने सजाय दिइएको पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।
question_en: What is the punishment for wrongful confinement to extort property, or constrain to illegal act?
answer_en: The punishment for wrongful confinement to extort property, or constrain to an illegal act has not been provided in the given text.

question: के सम्पत्ति फिर्ता लिनको लागि गलत कैद वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउने सजाय पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छ?
answer: होइन, सम्पत्ति फिर्ता लिनको लागि गलत कैद वा गैरकानूनी कार्यमा बाधा पुर्‍याउने सजाय दिइएको पाठमा प्रदान गरिएको छैन।
question_en: Has the punishment for wrongful confinement to extort property, or constrain to an illegal act been provided in the text?
answer_en: No, the punishment for wrongful confinement to extort property, or constrain to an illegal act has not been provided in the given text.

question: अपराध गर्न सहजीकरण गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for facilitating the commission of an offence?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: अपराध गर्न सहजीकरण गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद र अन्य दायित्वको अधिकतम अवधि कति हुन्छ?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि तीन वर्ष हो, र व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and other liability for someone who facilitates the commission of an offence?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is three years, and the person is also liable to a fine.

question: जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती स्वीकार वा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न को लागी गलत बन्दी के हो?
answer: कुनै व्यक्तिले गलत तरिकाले थुनामा परेको व्यक्तिबाट जबर्जस्ती असुल्ने उद्देश्यले कुनै व्यक्तिलाई थुनामा राखेको वा कुनै व्यक्तिमा चासो राख्ने व्यक्तिले कुनै अपराध वा दुराचार पत्ता लगाउने वा कुनै जानकारी गराउने उद्देश्यले वा थुनामा परेको व्यक्तिलाई बाधा पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्यले वा बन्दीमा राखिएको व्यक्तिमा चासो राख्ने व्यक्तिलाई पुनर्स्थापना गर्न वा कुनै सम्पत्तिको पुनःस्थापना गर्न वा पुनस्र्थापना गर्न वा दाबी गर्न वा दाबी गर्न सक्ने व्यक्तिलाई थुन्नु हो। कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति वा बहुमूल्य सुरक्षाको पुनर्स्थापना हुन सक्ने जानकारी दिन।
question_en: What is wrongful confinement to extort confession or compel restoration of property?
answer_en: It is when a person wrongfully confines any person for the purpose of extorting from the person confined or any person interested in the person confined any confession or any information which may lead to the detection of an offence or misconduct, or for the purpose of constraining the person confined or any person interested in the person confined to restore or to cause the restoration of any property or valuable security or to satisfy any claim or demand, or to give information which may lead to the restoration of any property or valuable security.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिलाई जबरजस्ती कबुली, अपराध पत्ता लगाउने जानकारी, सम्पत्ति वा बहुमूल्य सुरक्षाको जबरजस्ती पुनर्स्थापना गर्न वा कुनै दाबी वा माग पूरा गर्ने उद्देश्यले गलत तरिकाले थुनामा पर्दा यसको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यसलाई जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती स्वीकार गर्न वा सम्पत्ति पुन: प्राप्ति गर्नको लागि गलत बन्दी भनिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when a person is confined wrongfully for the purpose of extorting a confession, information leading to the detection of an offence, compelling restoration of property or valuable security, or to satisfy any claim or demand?
answer_en: This is referred to as wrongful confinement to extort confession or compel restoration of property.

question: जबरजस्ती जबरजस्ती स्वीकार गर्न वा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्नको लागि गलत थुनामा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for wrongful confinement to extort confession or to compel restoration of property?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कसैलाई कैद र सम्भावित अतिरिक्त दण्डको अधिकतम अवधि के हो जसले गलत रूपमा अर्को व्यक्तिलाई जबरजस्ती स्वीकार गर्न वा सम्पत्ति फिर्ता गर्न बाध्य पार्छ?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि तीन वर्ष हो, र व्यक्तिले जरिवाना तिर्न पनि सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and potential additional penalties for someone who wrongfully confines another person to extort a confession or force the return of property?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment is three years, and the person may also be liable to pay a fine.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिमाथि बल प्रयोग गर्नुको अर्थ के हो?
answer: कुनै व्यक्तिले अर्को व्यक्तिलाई गति, गति परिवर्तन वा गति बन्द गराएमा, वा उसले कुनै वस्तुलाई त्यस्तो गति, गति परिवर्तन, वा गति बन्द गरेमा त्यस पदार्थलाई अर्कोको शरीरको कुनै अंगसँग सम्पर्कमा ल्याएमा वा अरूले लगाएको वा बोक्ने वा अन्यको भावनालाई असर गर्ने कुनै पनि चीजसँग बल प्रयोग गर्नु भनिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean to use force on another person?
answer_en: A person is said to use force to another if he causes motion, change of motion, or cessation of motion to that other, or if he causes to any substance such motion, or change of motion, or cessation of motion as brings that substance into contact with any part of that other's body, or with anything which that other is wearing or carrying, or with anything so situated that such contact affects that other's sense of feeling.

question: गति र शारीरिक सम्पर्कको सन्दर्भमा एक व्यक्तिमा बल कसरी लागू हुन्छ?
answer: कुनै व्यक्तिले अर्को व्यक्तिलाई गति, गति परिवर्तन वा गति बन्द गराएमा, वा उसले कुनै वस्तुलाई त्यस्तो गति, गति परिवर्तन, वा गति बन्द गरेमा त्यस पदार्थलाई अर्कोको शरीरको कुनै अंगसँग सम्पर्कमा ल्याएमा वा अरूले लगाएको वा बोक्ने वा अन्यको भावनालाई असर गर्ने कुनै पनि चीजसँग बल प्रयोग गर्नु भनिन्छ।
question_en: How is force applied to a person, in terms of motion and physical contact?
answer_en: A person is said to use force to another if he causes motion, change of motion, or cessation of motion to that other, or if he causes to any substance such motion, or change of motion, or cessation of motion as brings that substance into contact with any part of that other's body, or with anything which that other is wearing or carrying, or with anything so situated that such contact affects that other's sense of feeling.

question: कुन तीन तरिकामा बल प्रयोग गर्न सकिन्छ?
answer: पहिलो, आफ्नो शारीरिक शक्ति द्वारा। दोस्रो, आफ्नो तर्फबाट वा अन्य कुनै व्यक्तिको तर्फबाट कुनै पनि कारबाही नगरी गति वा परिवर्तन वा गतिको अन्त्य हुने गरी कुनै पनि पदार्थको डिस्पोज गरेर। तेस्रो, कुनै पनि जनावरलाई सार्न प्रेरित गरेर, यसको गति परिवर्तन गर्न, वा सार्न बन्द गर्न।
question_en: In what three ways can force be applied?
answer_en: Firstly, by his own bodily power. Secondly, by disposing any substance in such a manner that the motion or change or cessation of motion takes place without any further act on his part, or on the part of any other person. Thirdly, by inducing any animal to move, to change its motion, or to cease to move.

question: आफ्नो तर्फबाट वा अन्य कुनै व्यक्तिको तर्फबाट कुनै पनि कार्य नगरी गति वा परिवर्तन वा गतिको अन्त्य हुने गरी कुनै पनि वस्तुलाई आफ्नो शारीरिक शक्तिद्वारा बल प्रयोग गर्दा, र कुनै पनि जनावरलाई चल्न, गति परिवर्तन गर्न वा चल्न बन्द गर्न उत्प्रेरित गर्दा यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यी तीन तरिकाले बल प्रयोग गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when force is applied by his own bodily power, by disposing any substance in such a manner that the motion or change or cessation of motion takes place without any further act on his part, or on the part of any other person, and by inducing any animal to move, to change its motion, or to cease to move?
answer_en: These are the three ways force can be applied.

question: Z मा आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गर्ने उदाहरण के हो?
answer: A ले ढुङ्गालाई Z, वा Z को लुगा वा Z द्वारा बोकेको कुनै चीजसँग सम्पर्कमा ल्याउने वा Z को लुगा वा Z द्वारा बोकेको कुनै चीजमा पानीलाई प्रहार गर्ने र पानीलाई फ्याँक्ने सम्भावना छ भनी जान्ने उद्देश्यले ढुङ्गा हान्छ।
question_en: What is an example of using criminal force to Z?
answer_en: A throws a stone, intending or knowing it to be likely that the stone will be thus brought into contact with Z, or with Z's clothes, or with something carried by Z, or that it will strike water and dash up the water against Z's clothes or something carried by Z.

question: A ले ढुङ्गा हानेर ढुङ्गा हानेर ढुङ्गा Z, Z को लुगा वा Z ले बोकेको कुनै चीजको सम्पर्कमा आउने वा Z को लुगा वा Z ले बोकेको कुनै चीजमा पानी हानेर फ्याँक्ने सम्भावना हुन्छ भनी थाहा पाउँदा के हुन्छ?
answer: यो Z मा आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गर्ने एउटा उदाहरण हो।
question_en: What does it mean when A throws a stone, intending or knowing it to be likely that the stone will be thus brought into contact with Z, or with Z's clothes, or with something carried by Z, or that it will strike water and dash up the water against Z's clothes or something carried by Z?
answer_en: This is an example of using criminal force to Z.

question: एक महिलालाई आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गर्न A ले के गर्छ?
answer: एक महिलाले जानाजानी उसको सहमति बिना महिलाको पर्दा तान्दछ, उसले उसलाई चोट पुर्‍याउन, डराउन वा रिस उठाउन सक्छ भन्ने सम्भावित इरादा वा जान्ने।
question_en: What does A do to use criminal force to a woman?
answer_en: A intentionally pulls up a woman's veil without her consent, intending or knowing it to be likely that he may thereby injure, frighten or annoy her.

question: A ले जानाजानी कुनै महिलाको पर्दा उसको सहमति बिना तान्दा, उसलाई चोट पुर्याउन, डराउन वा रिस उठाउन सक्ने सम्भाव्यताको इरादा वा थाहा नपाई के हुन्छ?
answer: यसको मतलब ए ले महिलालाई आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गरिरहेको छ।
question_en: What does it mean when A intentionally pulls up a woman's veil without her consent, intending or knowing it to be likely that he may thereby injure, frighten or annoy her?
answer_en: It means that A is using criminal force to a woman.

question: Z नुहाउने क्रममा A ले Z लाई आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गरेको उदाहरण के हो?
answer: A ले नुहाउने पानीमा खन्याउछ जुन उसले उमालेको हो भनेर जान्दछन्, इरादा वा जान्दछ कि यसले Z लाई चोट, डर वा रिस उठाउन सक्छ।
question_en: What is an example of A using criminal force to Z while Z is bathing?
answer_en: A pours into the bath water which he knows to be boiling, intending or knowing it to be likely that he may thereby cause injury, fear or annoyance to Z.

question: A ले Z नुहाउने ठाउँमा उमालेको पानी खन्याएमा, उसले Z लाई चोट, डर वा रिस उठाउन सक्छ भन्ने कुराको इरादा वा थाहा पाएर त्यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यसको मतलब A ले Z लाई आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गरिरहेको छ जब Z नुहाइरहेछ।
question_en: What would it mean if A pours boiling water into a bath where Z is bathing, intending or knowing it to be likely that he may cause injury, fear or annoyance to Z?
answer_en: It would mean that A is using criminal force to Z while Z is bathing.

question: A ले कसरी कुकुरसँग Z मा आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गर्छ?
answer: A ले Z लाई चोट, डर वा रिस उठाउने उद्देश्यले Z को सहमति बिना कुकुरलाई Z मा बस्न उक्साउँछ।
question_en: How does A use criminal force to Z with a dog?
answer_en: A incites a dog to spring upon Z, without Z's consent, intending to cause injury, fear or annoyance to Z.

question: A ले Z को सहमति बिना, Z लाई चोट, डर वा रिस उठाउने उद्देश्यले कुकुरलाई Z मा बस्न उक्साउँदा यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यसको मतलब A ले कुकुरसँग Z मा आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गरिरहेको छ।
question_en: What does it mean when A incites a dog to spring upon Z, without Z's consent, intending to cause injury, fear or annoyance to Z?
answer_en: It means that A is using criminal force to Z with a dog.

question: आक्रमणको परिभाषा के हो?
answer: आक्रमण भन्नाले कुनै व्यक्तिले कुनै इशारा वा तयारी गर्ने उद्देश्यले वा थाहा पाएर त्यस्तो इशारा वा तयारीले उपस्थित कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई त्यो इशारा वा तयारी गर्ने व्यक्तिले त्यस व्यक्तिलाई आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गर्न लागेको हो भनी बुझाउन लगाउने सम्भावना हुन्छ।
question_en: What is the definition of assault?
answer_en: Assault is when a person makes any gesture, or any preparation intending or knowing it to be likely that such gesture or preparation will cause any person present to apprehend that he who makes that gesture or preparation is about to use criminal force to that person.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले त्यस्तो इशारा वा तयारी गर्ने उद्देश्यले कुनै इशारा वा तयारी गर्दा वा थाहा पाएर त्यस्तो इशारा वा तयारी गर्ने व्यक्तिले त्यो व्यक्तिलाई आपराधिक बल प्रयोग गर्न लागेको हो भनी त्यहाँ उपस्थित कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई आशंका गर्न लगाउने भन्ने कुराको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यो आक्रमणको परिभाषा हो।
question_en: What does it mean when a person makes any gesture or preparation intending or knowing it to be likely that such gesture or preparation will cause any person present to apprehend that he who makes that gesture or preparation is about to use criminal force to that person?
answer_en: This is the definition of assault.

question: के केवल शब्दहरू आक्रमणको मात्रा हो?
answer: होइन, केवल शब्दहरूले आक्रमणको मात्रा गर्दैन। तर एक व्यक्तिले प्रयोग गर्ने शब्दहरूले उसको इशारा वा तयारीलाई त्यस्तो अर्थ दिन सक्छ जुन ती इशाराहरू वा तयारीहरूलाई आक्रमणको रूपमा लिन सकिन्छ।
question_en: Do mere words amount to an assault?
answer_en: No, mere words do not amount to an assault. But the words which a person uses may give to his gestures or preparation such a meaning as may make those gestures or preparations amount to an assault.

question: के एक व्यक्तिले प्रयोग गर्ने शब्दहरूले उनीहरूको इशारा वा तयारीलाई अर्थ दिन सक्छ जुन आक्रमणको रूपमा हुन सक्छ?
answer: हो, एक व्यक्तिले प्रयोग गर्ने शब्दहरूले तिनीहरूको इशारा वा तयारीहरूलाई त्यस्तो अर्थ दिन सक्छ जुन ती इशाराहरू वा तयारीहरूलाई आक्रमणमा परिणत गर्न सक्छ।
question_en: Can the words a person uses give meaning to their gestures or preparations that may amount to an assault?
answer_en: Yes, the words a person uses can give to their gestures or preparations such a meaning as may make those gestures or preparations amount to an assault.

question: आक्रमणलाई के मानिन्छ?
answer: कसैको कार्यले अर्कोलाई आफूलाई हानि पुऱ्याउने छ भनी विश्वास गराउने उद्देश्यले वा थाहा पाएर आक्रमण गर्न सकिन्छ। यसले शारीरिक इशाराहरू वा कार्यहरू समावेश गर्न सक्छ जस्तै क्रूर कुकुरलाई छुटाउने वा धम्कीपूर्ण शब्दहरूसहित लट्ठी लिने।
question_en: What is considered an assault?
answer_en: An assault can be committed by intending or knowing it to be likely that one's actions may cause another to believe that they are about to be harmed. This can include physical gestures or actions such as unloosing a ferocious dog or taking up a stick with threatening words.
