question_en: Which section describes the crime of counterfeiting a device or mark used for authenticating documents described in section 467, or possessing counterfeit marked material?
answer_en: Section 475 describes this crime.

question: धारा 475 मा वर्णन गरिएको अपराधको सजाय के हो?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास, वा सात वर्षसम्म लम्ब्याउन सक्ने अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि वर्णनको कैद हो, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for the crime described in section 475?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कानुनको कुन दफाले आजीवन कारावास वा सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कैद सजाय र जरिवाना समेत समावेश गरेको अपराधको वर्णन गरेको छ?
answer: धारा 475 ले यस्तो अपराधको वर्णन गर्दछ।
question_en: Which section of the law describes a crime punishable by imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and also includes a fine?
answer_en: Section 475 describes such a crime.

question: धारा 476 मा वर्णित अपराध के हो?
answer: अपराध भनेको धारा 467 मा वर्णन गरिएका कागजातहरू बाहेक प्रमाणीकरण गर्न प्रयोग गरिएको उपकरण वा चिन्ह नक्कली बनाउनु वा नक्कली चिन्ह लगाइएको सामग्री राख्नु हो।
question_en: What is the crime described in section 476?
answer_en: The crime is counterfeiting a device or mark used for authenticating documents other than those described in section 467, or possessing counterfeit marked material.

question: धारा 467 मा वर्णन गरिएका कागजातहरू बाहेक प्रमाणीकरण गर्न प्रयोग गरिने उपकरण वा चिन्ह नक्कली बनाउन वा नक्कली चिन्ह लगाइएको सामग्री राख्नुसँग के अपराध सम्बन्धित छ?
answer: अपराध धारा 476 मा वर्णन गरिएको छ।
question_en: What crime is associated with counterfeiting a device or mark used for authenticating documents other than those described in section 467, or possessing counterfeit marked material?
answer_en: The crime is described in section 476.

question: धारा 476 मा वर्णन गरिएको अपराधको सजाय के हो?
answer: सजाय भनेको कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो जुन सात वर्षसम्म पुग्न सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for the crime described in section 476?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कानूनको कुन दफाले सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि समावेश हुन सक्ने कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुने अपराधलाई वर्णन गरेको छ?
answer: कानूनको धारा 476 ले यस्तो अपराधलाई वर्णन गरेको छ।
question_en: Which section of the law describes a crime punishable by imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and may also include a fine?
answer_en: Section 476 of the law describes such a crime.

question: धारा 477 मा वर्णित अपराध के हो?
answer: अपराध जालसाजी रद्द, विनाश, इत्यादि, इच्छा, ग्रहण गर्ने अधिकार, वा मूल्यवान सुरक्षा हो।
question_en: What is the crime described in section 477?
answer_en: The crime is fraudulent cancellation, destruction, etc., of will, authority to adopt, or valuable security.

question: कुन खण्डले जालसाजी रद्द, विनाश, इत्यादि, इच्छा, अपनाउने अधिकार, वा मूल्यवान सुरक्षाको अपराधको वर्णन गर्दछ?
answer: धारा 477 ले यस अपराधको वर्णन गर्दछ।
question_en: Which section describes the crime of fraudulent cancellation, destruction, etc., of will, authority to adopt, or valuable security?
answer_en: Section 477 describes this crime.

question: जानाजानी जनता वा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई हानि पुर्‍याउने, वा इच्छापत्र वा बहुमूल्य सुरक्षा जस्ता कागजातहरू नष्ट गर्ने वा बिगार्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय हुन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who intentionally causes damage or injury to the public or to any person, or destroys or defaces any document such as a will, or a valuable security?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: यदि कुनै व्यक्तिले जानाजानी सार्वजनिक वा कुनै व्यक्तिलाई हानि पुर्‍याउँछ वा क्षति पुर्‍याउँछ वा इच्छापत्र वा बहुमूल्य सुरक्षा जस्ता कागजातहरू नष्ट वा बिगार्छ भने के सजाय भोग्न सक्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई आजीवन कारावास वा सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कुनै पनि विवरणको जेल सजाय हुन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What penalty can a person face if they intentionally cause damage or injury to the public or any person, or destroy or deface a document like a will, or a valuable security?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कुनै किताब, इलेक्ट्रोनिक अभिलेख, कागज, लेखन, बहुमूल्य जमानत वा लेखा ठगी गर्ने, नष्ट गर्ने, फेरबदल गर्ने, विकृत गर्ने वा नक्कली गर्ने लिपिक, अधिकृत वा नोकरलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a clerk, officer or servant who with intent to defraud, destroys, alters, mutilates or falsifies any book, electronic record, paper, writing, valuable security or account?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.

question: जानीजानी कुनै किताब, इलेक्ट्रोनिक अभिलेख, कागज, लेखन, बहुमूल्य सुरक्षा वा खाता ठगी गर्ने नियतले नष्ट, फेरबदल, विकृत वा नक्कली गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद वा अन्य सजाय के हो?
answer: अधिकतम सात वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term or other penalties for someone who intentionally destroys, alters, mutilates or falsifies any book, electronic record, paper, writing, valuable security or account with the intent to defraud?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term can extend up to seven years, or there could be a fine, or both.

question: 'जीवनको लागि यातायात' शब्दलाई 'आजीवन कारावास' द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित कहिले गरियो?
answer: यो 1955 को अधिनियम 26 द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। 117 र Sch., 1-1-1956 मा।
question_en: When was the term 'transportation for life' substituted by 'imprisonment for life'?
answer_en: It was substituted by Act 26 of 1955, s. 117 and the Sch., on 1-1-1956.

question: कुन ऐनले 'आजीवन कारावास' शब्दलाई 'आजीवन कारावास' द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गर्यो र यो कहिलेदेखि लागू भयो?
answer: 'जीवनको लागि यातायात' शब्दलाई 1955 को ऐन 26 द्वारा 'आजीवन कारावास' द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। 117 र Sch., 1-1-1956 मा।
question_en: What act substituted the term 'transportation for life' by 'imprisonment for life' and when did it come into effect?
answer_en: The term 'transportation for life' was substituted by 'imprisonment for life' by Act 26 of 1955, s. 117 and the Sch., on 1-1-1956.

question: 'पुस्तक, इलेक्ट्रोनिक रेकर्ड, पेपर, लेखन' शब्दले 'कुनै कागजात' शब्दलाई कहिले प्रतिस्थापित गरियो?
answer: यो 2000 को अधिनियम 21 द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। 91 र पहिलो Sch., 17-10-2000 मा।
question_en: When was the term 'any document' substituted by 'book, electronic record, paper, writing'?
answer_en: It was substituted by Act 21 of 2000, s. 91 and the First Sch., on 17-10-2000.

question: कुन ऐन र खण्डले 'कुनै कागजात' शब्दलाई 'पुस्तक, इलेक्ट्रोनिक रेकर्ड, कागज, लेखन' शब्दले प्रतिस्थापन गर्यो र यो कहिले भयो?
answer: यो 2000 को अधिनियम 21 द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित गरिएको थियो। 91 र पहिलो Sch., 17-10-2000 मा।
question_en: What act and section substituted the term 'any document' with 'book, electronic record, paper, writing' and when did this occur?
answer_en: It was substituted by Act 21 of 2000, s. 91 and the First Sch., on 17-10-2000.

question: के यो खण्ड अन्तर्गत कुनै पनि आरोपमा ठगी गर्न अभिप्रेरित व्यक्तिको नाम वा विशेष रकम निर्दिष्ट गर्न आवश्यक छ?
answer: होइन, ठगी गर्नको लागि कुनै विशेष व्यक्तिको नाम नलिइकन वा ठगीको विषय बन्नको लागि कुनै विशेष रकम निर्दिष्ट नगरी ठगी गर्ने सामान्य अभिप्रायको आरोप लगाउन पर्याप्त छ।
question_en: Is it necessary to name the particular person intended to be defrauded or specify the particular sum of money intended to be the subject of the fraud in any charge under this section?
answer_en: No, it is sufficient to allege a general intent to defraud without naming any particular person intended to be defrauded or specifying any particular sum of money intended to be the subject of the fraud.

question: के यो खण्ड अन्तर्गत ठगीको आरोपमा कुनै विशेष व्यक्तिको नाम नलिई वा कुनै विशेष रकम निर्दिष्ट नगरी ठगी गर्ने सामान्य अभिप्रायको आरोप लगाउन पर्याप्त छ?
answer: हो, यो ठगी गर्न अभिप्रेरित कुनै विशेष व्यक्तिको नाम नलिई वा ठगीको विषय बन्नको लागि कुनै विशेष रकम निर्दिष्ट नगरी ठगी गर्ने सामान्य अभिप्रायको आरोप लगाउन पर्याप्त छ।
question_en: Is it enough to allege a general intent to defraud without naming any specific person or specifying any particular sum of money in a fraud charge under this section?
answer_en: Yes, it is sufficient to allege a general intent to defraud without naming any particular person intended to be defrauded or specifying any particular sum of money intended to be the subject of the fraud.

question: सम्पत्ति चिन्ह के हो?
answer: चल सम्पत्ति एक विशेष व्यक्तिको हो भनी बुझाउन प्रयोग गरिने चिन्ह।
question_en: What is a property mark?
answer_en: A mark used for denoting that movable property belongs to a particular person.

question: चल सम्पत्ति एक विशेष व्यक्तिको हो भनी बुझाउन प्रयोग गरिने चिन्हलाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: सम्पत्ति चिन्ह
question_en: What is a mark used for denoting that movable property belongs to a particular person called?
answer_en: A property mark

question: नक्कली गुण चिन्ह प्रयोग गर्नुलाई के भनिन्छ?
answer: कुनै चल सम्पत्ति वा मालसामान वा चल सम्पत्ति वा वस्तु भएको कुनै केस, प्याकेज वा अन्य रिसेप्टेकलमा चिन्ह लगाउने, वा त्यसमा कुनै छाप भएको कुनै केस, प्याकेज वा अन्य रिसेप्टेकल प्रयोग गरी त्यसरी चिन्ह लगाइएको सम्पत्ति वा वस्तु वा त्यस्तो भाडामा रहेको कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति वा वस्तुलाई त्यस्तो व्यक्तिको स्वामित्वमा नभएको व्यक्तिको हो भनी विश्वास गर्न उचित हिसाबले गणना गर्ने।
question_en: What is defined as using a false property mark?
answer_en: Marking any movable property or goods or any case, package or other receptacle containing movable property or goods, or using any case, package or other receptacle having any mark thereon, in a manner reasonably calculated to cause it to be believed that the property or goods so marked, or any property or goods contained in any such receptacle so marked, belong to a person to whom they do not belong.

question: कुनै चल सम्पत्ति वा वस्तुहरू वा चल सम्पत्ति वा वस्तुहरू भएको कुनै केस, प्याकेज वा अन्य रिसेप्टेकल चिन्ह लगाइन्छ, वा त्यसमा कुनै चिन्ह भएको केस, प्याकेज वा अन्य रिसेप्टेकल प्रयोग गरिन्छ, त्यसरी चिन्ह लगाइएको सम्पत्ति वा वस्तुहरू वा त्यस्तो व्यक्तिको स्वामित्वमा रहेको कुनै पनि सम्पत्ति वा वस्तुलाई त्यस्तो चिन्ह लगाइएको छैन भन्ने विश्वास गर्नको लागि उचित हिसाबले प्रयोग गरिन्छ? सम्बन्धित?
answer: यसलाई गलत गुण चिन्ह प्रयोगको रूपमा परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What does it mean when any movable property or goods or any case, package or other receptacle containing movable property or goods is marked, or a case, package or other receptacle having any mark thereon is used, in a manner reasonably calculated to cause it to be believed that the property or goods so marked, or any property or goods contained in any such receptacle so marked, belong to a person to whom they do not belong?
answer_en: This is defined as using a false property mark.

question: नक्कली सम्पत्ति चिन्ह प्रयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: नक्कली सम्पत्ति चिन्ह प्रयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिले ठगी गर्ने नियतविना काम गरेको प्रमाणित नभएमा एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for using a false property mark?
answer_en: Whoever uses any false property mark shall, unless he proves that he acted without intent to defraud, be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: कसैलाई के हुन सक्छ जो प्रमाणित गर्न असमर्थ छ कि उनीहरूले ठगी गर्न नियत बिना नै गलत सम्पत्ति चिन्ह प्रयोग गरे?
answer: उनीहरूलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्नेछ।
question_en: What could happen to someone who is unable to prove that they used a false property mark without intent to defraud?
answer_en: They could be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिले प्रयोग गरेको सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: कुनै व्यक्तिले प्रयोग गरेको सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for counterfeiting a property mark used by another person?
answer_en: Whoever counterfeits any property mark used by any other person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: अर्को व्यक्तिको सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: अर्को व्यक्तिको सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गरेमा सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for someone who counterfeits another person's property mark?
answer_en: The punishment for counterfeiting another person's property mark can extend to imprisonment for up to two years, a fine, or both.

question: निजामती कर्मचारीले प्रयोग गरेको चिन्ह नक्कली गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: निजामती कर्मचारीले प्रयोग गरेको कुनै सम्पत्ति चिन्ह, वा सार्वजनिक सेवकले प्रयोग गरेको कुनै चिन्ह कुनै व्यक्तिले वा विशेष समय वा स्थानमा उत्पादन गरेको वा सम्पत्ति विशेष गुणस्तरको हो वा कुनै विशेष कार्यालयबाट गुज्रिएको वा कुनै छुटको हकदार छ भनी वा कुनै छुटको हकदार छ भनी बुझाउन प्रयोग गरेको कुनै चिन्हको नक्कली गरेमा त्यस्ता चिन्हलाई काउन्टरिक्रिप्शन लगाइनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for counterfeiting a mark used by a public servant?
answer_en: Whoever counterfeits any property mark used by a public servant, or any mark used by a public servant to denote that any property has been manufactured by a particular person or at a particular time or place, or that the property is of a particular quality or has passed through a particular office, or that it is entitled to any exemption, or uses as genuine any such mark knowing the same to be counterfeit, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description.

question: यदि कसैले सार्वजनिक सेवकले प्रयोग गरेको सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गर्छ वा त्यस्तो चिन्ह नक्कली भएको थाहा पाएर प्रयोग गर्छ भने के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What happens if someone counterfeits a property mark used by a public servant or uses such a mark knowing it to be counterfeit?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description.

question: सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गर्ने कुनै औजार बनाएमा वा राख्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई तीन वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्मको कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for making or possessing any instrument for counterfeiting a property mark?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: सम्पत्ति चिन्ह नक्कली गर्ने कुनै औजार बनाएमा वा राख्ने व्यक्तिलाई अधिकतम कैद वा वैकल्पिक सजाय कति हुन्छ?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि तीन वर्षसम्म हुन सक्छ, वा व्यक्तिलाई जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment or alternative punishment for someone who makes or possesses any instrument for counterfeiting a property mark?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment can extend to three years, or the person can be fined, or both.

question: धारा 486 अन्तर्गत के अपराध हो?
answer: नक्कली सम्पत्ति चिन्ह लगाइएको वा छापिएको कुनै पनि वस्तु वा वस्तुलाई बेच्नु, पर्दाफाश गर्नु वा बिक्रीको लागि आफ्नो कब्जामा राख्नु, त्यस्ता सामानहरू समावेश भएको कुनै पनि मामला, प्याकेज वा अन्य रिसेप्टेकलमा छापिएको छ, धारा 486 अन्तर्गत अपराध हो।
question_en: What constitutes an offence under section 486?
answer_en: Selling, exposing, or having in possession for sale, any goods or things with a counterfeit property mark affixed to or impressed upon the same or to or upon any case, package or other receptacle in which such goods are contained, constitutes an offence under section 486.

question: कसैले बेच्ने, पर्दाफास गर्ने वा बिक्रीको लागि आफ्नो कब्जामा राखेको, कुनै वस्तु वा वस्तुमा नक्कली सम्पत्ति चिन्ह लगाइएको वा छापिएको वा त्यसमा वा त्यस्तो वस्तु समावेश भएको कुनै केस, प्याकेज वा अन्य रिसेप्टेकलमा छापिएको भएमा दफा ४८६ बमोजिम के कार्यलाई अपराध मानिन्छ?
answer: यस्तो कार्य धारा 486 अन्तर्गत अपराध हो।
question_en: What act is considered an offence under section 486 if someone is selling, exposing, or having in possession for sale, any goods or things with a counterfeit property mark affixed to or impressed upon the same or to or upon any case, package or other receptacle in which such goods are contained?
answer_en: Such act constitutes an offence under section 486.

question: नक्कली सम्पत्ति चिन्ह लगाएको सामान बेच्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for selling goods marked with a counterfeit property mark?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

question: नक्कली सम्पत्ति चिन्ह लगाएको सामान बेच्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ कैद वा जरिवाना?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई एक वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the possible imprisonment or fine for someone who sells goods marked with a counterfeit property mark?
answer_en: The person can be punished with imprisonment that may extend to one year, or with a fine, or with both.

question: धारा 486 अन्तर्गत एक व्यक्तिलाई दोषी मानिने अवस्थाहरू के हुन्?
answer: यदि कुनै व्यक्तिले अपराध गर्न विरुद्ध सबै उचित सावधानी अपनाएको प्रमाणित गरेमा, कथित अपराधको समयमा चिन्हको वास्तविकतामा शंका गर्ने कुनै कारण नभएको, आफूले त्यस्तो वस्तु वा वस्तुहरू प्राप्त गर्ने व्यक्तिहरूको सम्बन्धमा आफ्नो अधिकारमा सबै जानकारी दिएको वा अन्यथा निर्दोष कार्य गरेको प्रमाणित गरेमा धारा 486 अन्तर्गत दोषी मानिने छैन।
question_en: What are the conditions under which a person is not considered guilty under section 486?
answer_en: A person is not considered guilty under section 486 if they prove that they took all reasonable precautions against committing an offence, had no reason to suspect the genuineness of the mark at the time of the alleged offence, gave all the information in his power with respect to the persons from whom he obtained such goods or things, or otherwise acted innocently.

question: धारा 486 अन्तर्गत दोषी मानिँदैन भनेर एक व्यक्तिलाई के प्रमाणित गर्न आवश्यक छ?
answer: व्यक्तिले अपराध गर्न विरुद्ध सबै उचित सावधानी अपनाएको, कथित अपराधको समयमा चिन्हको वास्तविकतामा शंका गर्ने कुनै कारण नभएको, आफूले त्यस्तो सामान वा चीजहरू प्राप्त गर्ने व्यक्तिहरूको सम्बन्धमा आफ्नो शक्तिमा सबै जानकारी दिएको, वा अन्यथा निर्दोष कार्य गरेको प्रमाणित गर्न आवश्यक छ।
question_en: What does a person need to prove to not be considered guilty under section 486?
answer_en: The person needs to prove that they took all reasonable precautions against committing an offence, had no reason to suspect the genuineness of the mark at the time of the alleged offence, gave all the information in his power with respect to the persons from whom he obtained such goods or things, or otherwise acted innocently.

question: सामान भएको भाँडोमा गलत छाप लगाउनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for making a false mark on a receptacle containing goods?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to three years of imprisonment, a fine, or both.

question: तीन वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्ने अपराधको अधिकतम सजाय के हो?
answer: सामान भएको रिसेप्टेकलमा गलत छाप लगाउनु अपराध हो जसको परिणाम तीन वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum penalty for a crime that can result in up to three years of imprisonment, a fine, or both?
answer_en: Making a false mark on a receptacle containing goods is a crime that can result in up to three years of imprisonment, a fine, or both.

question: प्रतिबन्धित रूपमा गलत चिन्ह प्रयोग गर्न को लागी के सजाय छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई झूटो चिन्ह लगाउन निषेध गर्ने दफा विरुद्धको अपराध गरे जस्तै सजाय दिइन्छ।
question_en: What is the penalty for making use of a false mark as prohibited?
answer_en: The person is punished as if they had committed an offence against the section that prohibits making a false mark.

question: निषेधित रूपमा गलत चिन्ह प्रयोग गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई झूटो चिन्ह लगाउन निषेध गर्ने दफा विरुद्धको अपराध गरे जस्तै सजाय दिइन्छ।
question_en: What happens to a person who is caught making use of a false mark as prohibited?
answer_en: The person is punished as if they had committed an offence against the section that prohibits making a false mark.

question: चोट पुर्याउने उद्देश्यले सम्पत्ति चिन्हसँग छेडछाड गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय एक वर्ष कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for tampering with a property mark with the intent to cause injury?
answer_en: The punishment can extend to one year of imprisonment, a fine, or both.

question: चोट पुर्याउने नियतले सम्पत्ति चिन्हसँग छेडछाड गर्दा के परिणामहरू हुन सक्छन्?
answer: परिणामहरूमा एक वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What can the consequences be for tampering with a property mark with the intention to cause injury?
answer_en: The consequences can include up to one year of imprisonment, a fine, or both.

question: नक्कली नोट वा बैंक नोटको सजाय के हो?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्म कैद हुन सक्छ, र उनीहरूलाई जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for counterfeiting currency-notes or bank-notes?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and they shall also be liable to a fine.

question: नक्कली नोट वा बैंक नोटको सम्भावित परिणामहरू के हुन्?
answer: नतिजाहरू आजीवन कारावास वा दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिको लागि कैद हुन सक्छ, र तिनीहरू पनि जरिवानाको लागि जिम्मेवार हुनेछन्।
question_en: What are the potential consequences for counterfeiting currency-notes or bank-notes?
answer_en: The consequences can be imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and they shall also be liable to a fine.

question: यस पाठ अनुसार 'बैंक नोट' को परिभाषा के हो?
answer: 'बैंक-नोट' भनेको संसारको कुनै पनि भागमा बैंकिङ व्यवसाय गर्ने व्यक्तिद्वारा जारी गरिएको, वा कुनै राज्य वा सार्वभौम शक्तिको अख्तियारद्वारा जारी गरिएको वा कुनै पनि व्यक्तिद्वारा जारी गरिएको मागमा वाहकलाई पैसाको भुक्तानीको लागि एक प्रतिज्ञा नोट वा संलग्नता हो।
question_en: What is the definition of a 'bank-note' according to this text?
answer_en: A 'bank-note' is a promissory note or engagement for the payment of money to bearer on demand issued by any person carrying on the business of banking in any part of the world, or issued by or under the authority of any State or Sovereign Power.

question: यसको परिभाषा अनुसार 'बैंक नोट' कसले जारी गर्न सक्छ?
answer: 'बैंक नोट' विश्वको कुनै पनि भागमा बैंकिङ व्यवसाय गर्ने कुनै पनि व्यक्तिले वा कुनै राज्य वा सार्वभौम शक्तिको अख्तियार वा अधीनमा रही जारी गर्न सक्छ।
question_en: Who can issue a 'bank-note' according to its definition?
answer_en: A 'bank-note' can be issued by any person carrying on the business of banking in any part of the world, or by or under the authority of any State or Sovereign Power.

question: कुनै पनि नक्कली वा नक्कली नोट वा बैंक नोट बेच्ने, किन्ने वा वास्तविक रूपमा प्रयोग गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो जुन दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for selling, buying, or using as genuine any forged or counterfeit currency-note or bank-note?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: कुनै नक्कली वा नक्कली नोट वा बैंक नोट बेच्ने, किन्ने वा वास्तविक रूपमा प्रयोग गरेको पाइएमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: दण्ड सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो जुन दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the penalty for someone who is found guilty of selling, buying, or using as genuine any forged or counterfeit currency-note or bank-note?
answer_en: The penalty is imprisonment for life or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: कुनै पनि नक्कली वा नक्कली नोट वा बैंक नोटलाई सक्कलीको रूपमा प्रयोग गर्ने नियतले राखेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय भनेको सात वर्षसम्मको कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हो।
question_en: What is the punishment for possessing any forged or counterfeit currency-note or bank-note with the intention to use it as genuine?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.

question: नक्कली वा नक्कली नोट वा बैंक नोटलाई सक्कलीको रूपमा प्रयोग गर्ने नियतले राख्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैदको अधिकतम अवधि वा सम्भावित थप जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: कैदको अधिकतम अवधि सात वर्ष हो, र थप जरिवानामा जरिवाना, वा जेल र जरिवाना दुवै समावेश हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum duration of imprisonment or the possible additional penalties for someone who possesses any forged or counterfeit currency-note or bank-note with the intention to use it as genuine?
answer_en: The maximum duration of imprisonment is seven years, and the additional penalties can include a fine, or both imprisonment and a fine.

question: कुनै पनि नोट वा बैंक नोट नक्कली वा नक्कली बनाउने उद्देश्यले कुनै मेसिनरी, उपकरण वा सामग्री बनाउन, किन्ने, बेच्ने, डिस्पोज गर्ने वा राख्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय आजीवन कारावास वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हो जुन दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for making, buying, selling, disposing, or possessing any machinery, instrument or material for the purpose of forging or counterfeiting any currency-note or bank-note?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment for life or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: कुनै पनि नोट वा बैंक नोट नक्कली गर्ने वा नक्कली गर्ने उद्देश्यले कुनै मेसिनरी, उपकरण वा सामग्री बनाउँदै, किन्ने, बेच्ने, डिस्पोज गर्ने वा आफ्नो साथमा राखेको पाइएमा त्यसको परिणाम के हुन सक्छ?
answer: नतिजाहरू आजीवन कारावास वा कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद हुन सक्छ जुन दश वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, र जरिवाना पनि लाग्न सक्छ।
question_en: What can be the consequences if someone is caught making, buying, selling, disposing, or possessing any machinery, instrument or material for the purpose of forging or counterfeiting any currency-note or bank-note?
answer_en: The consequences can be imprisonment for life or imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and also liable to fine.

question: कुनै पनि नोट वा बैंक नोट बन्न, प्रयोग गर्ने वा कुनै पनि हिसाबले मिल्दोजुल्दो कागजात बनाउन, प्रयोग गर्ने वा पुर्‍याउँदा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: एक सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for making, using, or delivering any document purporting to be, or in any way resembling, any currency-note or bank-note?
answer_en: The punishment is fine which may extend to one hundred rupees.

question: कुनै पनि मुद्रा-नोट वा बैंक-नोट हुन वा कुनै पनि हिसाबले मिल्दोजुल्दो कुनै कागजात बनाउन, प्रयोग गर्न वा वितरण गर्दा अधिकतम जरिवाना कति हुन्छ?
answer: अधिकतम जरिवाना एक सय रुपैयाँ छ।
question_en: What is the maximum fine for making, using, or delivering any document purporting to be, or in any way resembling, any currency-note or bank-note?
answer_en: The maximum fine is one hundred rupees.

question: उपदफा (१) बमोजिम अपराध भएको कागजपत्र छाप्ने वा बनाएको व्यक्तिको नाम र ठेगाना खुलाउन नमान्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: उसलाई दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a person who refuses to disclose the name and address of the person who printed or made a document which is an offence under sub-section (1)?
answer_en: He shall be punished with fine which may extend to two hundred rupees.

question: उपदफा (१) बमोजिम अपराध भएको कागजपत्र छाप्ने वा बनाउने व्यक्तिको नाम र ठेगाना खुलाउन अस्वीकार गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के जरिवाना हुन सक्छ?
answer: जरिवाना दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What fine may be imposed on a person who refuses to disclose the name and address of the person who printed or made a document which is an offence under sub-section (1)?
answer_en: The fine may extend to two hundred rupees.

question: उपदफा (१) बमोजिमको अपराधको अभियोग लगाइएको कागजातमा व्यक्तिको नाम देखिएमा के अनुमान गर्न सकिन्छ?
answer: त्यो व्यक्तिले कागजात बनायो भन्ने अनुमान गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What can be presumed if a person's name appears on a document in relation to which an offence under subsection (1) has been charged?
answer_en: It may be presumed that that person caused the document to be made.

question: यदि कुनै व्यक्तिले कागजात बनायो र उपदफा (१) बमोजिमको अपराध गरेको भए के अनुमान लगाउन सकिन्छ?
answer: यदि कुनै व्यक्तिको नाम उक्त कागजातमा देखा पर्यो भने, तिनीहरू अपराधसँग सम्बन्धित छन् भनेर अनुमान गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What can be inferred if a person caused a document to be made and an offence under subsection (1) has been charged?
answer_en: If a person's name appears on that document, it can be presumed they are related to the offence.

question: असहाय व्यक्तिको आवश्यकता पूरा गर्न वा आपूर्ति गर्ने सम्झौताको उल्लंघन गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: त्यस्तो व्यक्तिलाई तीन महिनासम्म कैद वा दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for breaching a contract to attend on or supply the wants of a helpless person?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to two hundred rupees, or with both.

question: असहाय व्यक्तिको आवश्यकता पूरा गर्न वा आपूर्ति गर्ने सम्झौता उल्लंघन गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई कैद र जरिवानाको हिसाबले अधिकतम सजाय के हो?
answer: अधिकतम सजाय तीन महिनासम्म कैद र/वा दुई सय रुपैयाँसम्म जरिवाना हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum punishment, in terms of imprisonment and fine, for someone who breaches a contract to attend on or supply the wants of a helpless person?
answer_en: The maximum punishment is imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, and/or a fine which may extend to two hundred rupees.

question: धारा 493 अन्तर्गत विवाहसँग सम्बन्धित अपराध के हो?
answer: एक व्यक्तिले छलपूर्वक वैध विवाहको विश्वासलाई प्रेरित गर्ने सहवास।
question_en: What is the offence under section 493 related to marriage?
answer_en: Cohabitation caused by a man deceitfully inducing a belief of lawful marriage.

question: जब एक व्यक्तिले कानुनी रूपमा वैध विवाहको विश्वासलाई छलपूर्वक र सहवास गर्दछ, कानुनी सर्तहरूमा यसको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यो विवाह सम्बन्धित धारा 493 अन्तर्गत अपराध हो।
question_en: What does it mean when a man induces a belief of lawful marriage deceitfully and cohabitates, in legal terms?
answer_en: It is an offence under section 493 related to marriage.

question: जानीजानी कानुनी रूपमा विवाह नगरेको तर जालसाजी नियतले समारोहमा जानेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for knowingly not being lawfully married but going through the ceremony with fraudulent intentions?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: कानुनी रूपमा विवाह नगरी जानीजानी विवाह समारोहमा भाग लिने व्यक्तिलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the penalty for a person who knowingly participates in a marriage ceremony without being lawfully married and with fraudulent intentions?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: जिउँदै जीवनसाथी हुँदा फेरि बिहे गर्दा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for marrying again while having a living spouse?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: जिउँदो जीवनसाथी भएको अवस्थामा फेरि विवाह गर्ने व्यक्तिको नतिजा के हुन्छ?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई सात वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the consequence for someone who marries again while having a living spouse?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: पति वा पत्नीको जीवनकालमा पुन: विवाह गर्ने नियममा के अपवाद छ?
answer: यो दफा सक्षम क्षेत्राधिकारको अदालतबाट वैवाहिक सम्बन्ध बदर घोषित गरिएको कुनै व्यक्तिसम्म वा पूर्व पति वा पत्नीको जीवनकालमा विवाह गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई पनि लागू हुने छैन, यदि त्यस्तो पति वा पत्नीले पछिको विवाहको समयमा त्यस्तो व्यक्तिबाट लगातार सात वर्षको अन्तरालमा अनुपस्थित भएको छ, र त्यस्तो व्यक्तिले आफू भएको समयभित्र सुनेको छैन।
question_en: What is the exception to the rule of marrying again during the lifetime of a husband or wife?
answer_en: The section does not extend to any person whose marriage has been declared void by a Court of competent jurisdiction, nor to any person who contracts a marriage during the life of a former husband or wife, if such husband or wife, at the time of the subsequent marriage, shall have been continually absent from such person for the space of seven years, and shall not have been heard of by such person as being alive within that time.

question: पति वा पत्नीको जीवनकालमा पुन: विवाह गर्ने नियम कसलाई लागू हुँदैन?
answer: यो नियम सक्षम क्षेत्राधिकारको अदालतबाट वैवाहिक सम्बन्ध बदर घोषित भएको कुनै पनि व्यक्तिलाई लागू हुने छैन, न त पूर्व पति वा पत्नीको जीवनकालमा विवाह गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई, यदि त्यस्तो पति वा पत्नी, त्यसपछिको विवाहको समयमा, सात वर्षको अन्तरालमा त्यस्तो व्यक्तिबाट लगातार अनुपस्थित भएको छ, र त्यस्तो व्यक्तिले आफू भएको समय भित्र सुनेको छैन।
question_en: To whom does the rule of marrying again during the lifetime of a husband or wife not extend?
answer_en: The rule does not extend to any person whose marriage has been declared void by a Court of competent jurisdiction, nor to any person who contracts a marriage during the life of a former husband or wife, if such husband or wife, at the time of the subsequent marriage, shall have been continually absent from such person for the space of seven years, and shall not have been heard of by such person as being alive within that time.

question: अर्को विवाह गर्ने व्यक्तिसँग पहिलेको विवाह लुकाउने सजाय के हो?
answer: व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्मको अवधिसम्म कुनै पनि विवरणको कैद सजाय हुनेछ र जरिवाना पनि लाग्नेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for concealing a former marriage from the person with whom a subsequent marriage is contracted?
answer_en: The person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

question: आफ्नो नयाँ जीवनसाथीबाट अघिल्लो विवाह लुकाउने व्यक्तिको लागि सम्भावित सजाय के हो?
answer: उक्त व्यक्तिलाई दश वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनसक्छ ।
question_en: What is the potential punishment for someone who hides a previous marriage from their new spouse?
answer_en: The person may be imprisoned for up to ten years and may also be fined.

question: व्यभिचारको अपराधमा के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: व्यभिचारको कसुरको सजाय पाँच वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for the offence of adultery?
answer_en: The punishment for the offence of adultery is imprisonment for a term which may extend to five years, or with fine, or with both.

question: कुन कसुरमा पाँच वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ?
answer: व्यभिचारको कसुरमा पाँच वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What offence can lead to imprisonment for a term which may extend to five years, or with fine, or with both?
answer_en: The offence of adultery can lead to imprisonment for a term which may extend to five years, or with fine, or with both.

question: व्यभिचारको मामलामा कसलाई दण्डनीय रूपमा सजाय हुँदैन?
answer: व्यभिचारको मामिलामा, पत्नीलाई दुव्र्यवहारको रूपमा सजाय हुँदैन।
question_en: Who is not punishable as an abettor in the case of adultery?
answer_en: In the case of adultery, the wife is not punishable as an abettor.

question: व्यभिचारको मामिलामा, कसलाई दुव्र्यवहारको रूपमा सजाय हुँदैन?
answer: पत्नीलाई दुव्र्यवहार गर्नेको रूपमा दण्डनीय छैन।
question_en: In the case of adultery, who is not punishable as an abettor?
answer_en: The wife is not punishable as an abettor.

question: आपराधिक नियतले विवाहित महिलालाई प्रलोभनमा पार्ने वा लैजानेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: आपराधिक नियतले विवाहित महिलालाई प्रलोभनमा पार्ने वा लैजाँदा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुने व्यवस्था छ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for enticing or taking away a married woman with criminal intent?
answer_en: The punishment for enticing or taking away a married woman with criminal intent is imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: आपराधिक नियतले विवाहित महिलालाई प्रलोभनमा पार्ने वा लैजाने अपराधको लागि कैद वा अन्य सम्भावित सजायको अधिकतम अवधि कति छ?
answer: आपराधिक नियतले विवाहित महिलालाई प्रलोभनमा पार्ने वा लैजाँदा अधिकतम दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा कसुर गर्नेलाई जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment or other potential penalties for the crime of enticing or taking away a married woman with criminal intent?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment for enticing or taking away a married woman with criminal intent may extend to two years, or the offender may be fined, or both.

question: पति वा श्रीमानको आफन्तले महिलालाई निर्दयी व्यवहार गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: पति वा पतिको आफन्तले महिलामाथि अत्याचार गर्नेलाई तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for a husband or relative of a husband subjecting a woman to cruelty?
answer_en: The punishment for a husband or relative of a husband subjecting a woman to cruelty is imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years and shall also be liable to fine.

question: एक महिलालाई क्रूरताको अधीनमा राख्ने पति वा नातेदारलाई कैद र अन्य दायित्वको अधिकतम अवधि कति छ?
answer: पति वा आफन्तले महिलालाई निर्दयी व्यवहार गर्नेलाई अधिकतम तीन वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि तिर्न सक्नेछ।
question_en: What is the maximum term of imprisonment and other liabilities for a husband or relative who subjects a woman to cruelty?
answer_en: The maximum term of imprisonment for a husband or relative who subjects a woman to cruelty may extend to three years, and they shall also be liable to fine.

question: यस सन्दर्भमा 'क्रूरता' को परिभाषा के हो?
answer: यस सन्दर्भमा, 'क्रूरता' भन्नाले महिलालाई आत्महत्या गर्न वा गम्भीर चोटपटक वा महिलाको जीवन, अंग वा स्वास्थ्यलाई खतरामा पार्ने खालको कुनै पनि जानाजानी आचरण सम्झनु पर्छ। वा महिलाको उत्पीडन जहाँ उसलाई वा उनीसँग सम्बन्धित कुनै व्यक्तिलाई कुनै सम्पत्ति वा बहुमूल्य सुरक्षाको गैरकानूनी माग पूरा गर्न बाध्य पार्ने उद्देश्यले वा निज वा उनीसँग सम्बन्धित कुनै व्यक्तिले त्यस्तो माग पूरा गर्न असफल भएको कारणले गर्दा त्यस्तो उत्पीडन।
question_en: What is the definition of 'cruelty' in this context?
answer_en: In this context, 'cruelty' means any wilful conduct which is of such a nature as is likely to drive the woman to commit suicide or to cause grave injury or danger to life, limb or health of the woman; or harassment of the woman where such harassment is with a view to coercing her or any person related to her to meet any unlawful demand for any property or valuable security or is on account of failure by her or any person related to her to meet such demand.

question: कुनै महिलाले आत्महत्या गर्न, गम्भीर चोटपटक वा उसको जीवन, अंग वा स्वास्थ्यलाई खतरामा पार्ने वा कुनै सम्पत्ति वा बहुमूल्य सुरक्षाको गैरकानूनी माग पूरा गर्न उनी वा उनीसँग सम्बन्धित कुनै व्यक्तिलाई जबरजस्ती उत्पीडन गर्ने वा त्यस्तो माग पूरा गर्न उनी वा उनीसँग सम्बन्धित कुनै व्यक्तिले असफल भएको कारणले गर्दा ‘क्रूरता’ भन्नाले के बुझिन्छ?
answer: यस सन्दर्भमा, 'क्रूरता' को रूपमा परिभाषित गरिएको छ।
question_en: What does 'cruelty' refer to when it is likely to drive a woman to commit suicide, cause grave injury or danger to her life, limb or health, or when it involves harassment with a view to coercing her or any person related to her to meet any unlawful demand for any property or valuable security, or is due to failure by her or any person related to her to meet such demand?
answer_en: In this context, 'cruelty' is defined as such.

question: अध्याय XXI अनुसार मानहानि भनेको के हो?
answer: मानहानि भन्नाले कुनै व्यक्तिले बोलेको वा पढ्नको लागि अभिप्रेरित शब्दहरूद्वारा, वा संकेत वा दृश्य प्रस्तुतीकरणद्वारा, कुनै व्यक्तिलाई हानि पुऱ्याउन वा त्यस्तो अभियोगले त्यस्तो व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा हानि पुर्‍याउने कारण थाहा पाएर वा विश्वास गर्ने कारणले कुनै अभियोग लगाउने वा प्रकाशित गर्नु हो।
question_en: What is defamation according to Chapter XXI?
answer_en: Defamation is when a person, by words either spoken or intended to be read, or by signs or visible representations, makes or publishes any imputation concerning any person intending to harm, or knowing or having reason to believe that such imputation will harm, the reputation of such person.

question: अध्याय XXI बमोजिम त्यस्तो व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठालाई हानि पु¥याउन वा त्यस्तो अभियोगले हानि पु¥याउने कारण थाहा पाएर वा विश्वास गर्ने कारण भएकोमा कुनै व्यक्तिले बोलेको वा पढ्नको उद्देश्यले वा संकेत वा देखिने प्रतिवेदनद्वारा कुनै व्यक्तिको सम्बन्धमा कुनै अभियोग लगाउने वा प्रकाशित गर्दा यसको अर्थ के हो ?
answer: यसलाई मानहानि भनिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when a person, by words either spoken or intended to be read, or by signs or visible representations, makes or publishes any imputation concerning any person intending to harm, or knowing or having reason to believe that such imputation will harm, the reputation of such person according to Chapter XXI?
answer_en: This is referred to as defamation.

question: के मृतक व्यक्तिहरूलाई मानहानि लागू हुन्छ?
answer: हो, मृतक व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि कुराको अभियोग लगाउनु मानहानि हुन सक्छ, यदि आरोपले जीवित व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा हानि पुर्‍याउँछ, र निजको परिवार वा अन्य नजिकका आफन्तहरूको भावनामा चोट पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्यले हो।
question_en: Can defamation apply to deceased individuals?
answer_en: Yes, it may amount to defamation to impute anything to a deceased person, if the imputation would harm the reputation of that person if living, and is intended to be hurtful to the feelings of his family or other near relatives.

question: के मृतक व्यक्तिको परिवार वा नजिकका आफन्तहरूको भावनामा चोट पुर्याउने नियतले कुनै हानिकारक कुराको आरोप लगाउनु मानहानि हो?
answer: हो, मृतक व्यक्तिलाई कुनै पनि कुराको अभियोग लगाउनु मानहानि हुन सक्छ, यदि आरोपले जीवित व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा हानि पुर्‍याउँछ, र निजको परिवार वा अन्य नजिकका आफन्तहरूको भावनामा चोट पुर्‍याउने उद्देश्यले हो।
question_en: Does imputing something harmful to a deceased person, with the intention to hurt his family or near relatives' feelings, amount to defamation?
answer_en: Yes, it may amount to defamation to impute anything to a deceased person, if the imputation would harm the reputation of that person if living, and is intended to be hurtful to the feelings of his family or other near relatives.

question: कम्पनी वा संघहरूलाई बदनाम गर्न सकिन्छ?
answer: हो, यो कुनै कम्पनी वा संघ वा व्यक्तिहरूको सङ्कलन सम्बन्धी आरोप लगाउनु मानहानि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: Can companies or associations be defamed?
answer_en: Yes, it may amount to defamation to make an imputation concerning a company or an association or collection of persons as such.

question: के कम्पनी वा संस्था वा व्यक्तिहरूको सङ्कलन सम्बन्धी आरोप लगाउनु मानहानि हो?
answer: हो, यो मानहानि हुन सक्छ।
question_en: Does making an imputation concerning a company or an association or collection of persons amount to defamation?
answer_en: Yes, it may amount to defamation.

question: एक व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठालाई हानि पुर्‍याउन अभियोगले के गर्न आवश्यक छ?
answer: प्रत्यारोपणले प्रत्यक्ष वा अप्रत्यक्ष रूपमा अरुको मुल्यांकनमा सो व्यक्तिको नैतिक वा बौद्धिक चरित्रमा ह्रास ल्याउने वा निजको जात वा आह्वानका आधारमा त्यस व्यक्तिको चरित्रलाई घटाउने वा सो व्यक्तिको श्रेय घटाउने वा सो व्यक्तिको शरीर सामान्य रूपमा निरुत्साहित अवस्थामा छ भनी विश्वास गराइदिएमा त्यसले व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा हानि पु¥याउँछ भनिन्छ ।
question_en: What does an imputation need to do to harm a person's reputation?
answer_en: An imputation is said to harm a person's reputation, if that imputation directly or indirectly, in the estimation of others, lowers the moral or intellectual character of that person, or lowers the character of that person in respect of his caste or of his calling, or lowers the credit of that person, or causes it to be believed that the body of that person is in a loathsome state, or in a state generally considered as disgraceful.

question: एक व्यक्तिको बारेमा के विशेषताहरू वा विश्वासहरू उनीहरूको प्रतिष्ठालाई हानि पुर्‍याउने आरोपबाट प्रभावित हुन सक्छ?
answer: एक व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठालाई हानि पुर्‍याउने आरोपले तिनीहरूको नैतिक वा बौद्धिक चरित्र, तिनीहरूको जात वा तिनीहरूको आह्वान, तिनीहरूको क्रेडिटको सम्बन्धमा चरित्रलाई असर गर्न सक्छ र अरूलाई विश्वास गर्न सक्छ कि तिनीहरूको शरीर घिनलाग्दो वा अपमानजनक अवस्थामा छ।
question_en: What characteristics or beliefs about a person can be affected by an imputation that harms their reputation?
answer_en: An imputation that harms a person's reputation can affect their moral or intellectual character, the character in respect of their caste or their calling, their credit, and can cause others to believe their body is in a loathsome or disgraceful state.

question: मानहानिका केही उदाहरणहरू के हुन्?
answer: मानहानिका केही उदाहरणहरू समावेश छन्: एउटा भनाइ 'Z एक इमानदार मानिस हो; उसले B को घडी कहिल्यै चोरेन', Z ले B को घडी चोरेको हो भन्ने विश्वास गराउने उद्देश्यले। अर्को उदाहरण हो जब A लाई B को घडी कसले चोर्यो भनेर सोधियो, र A ले Z लाई औंल्याए, Z ले B को घडी चोर्यो भन्ने विश्वास गराउने उद्देश्यले। तेस्रो उदाहरण हो जब A ले B को घडी लिएर भागेको Z को तस्बिर खिच्दछ, Z को B को घडी चोरेको विश्वास गर्ने उद्देश्यले।
question_en: What are some examples of defamation?
answer_en: Some examples of defamation include: A saying 'Z is an honest man; he never stole B's watch', with the intention to cause it to be believed that Z did steal B's watch. Another example is when A is asked who stole B's watch, and A points to Z, intending to cause it to be believed that Z stole B's watch. A third example is when A draws a picture of Z running away with B's watch, intending it to be believed that Z stole B's watch.

question: कसैको घडी चोरेको आरोप लाग्दा मानहानि कस्तो देखिन्छ?
answer: यस सन्दर्भमा मानहानिलाई विभिन्न तरिकाले प्रतिनिधित्व गर्न सकिन्छ। उदाहरणका लागि, यदि कसैले 'Z एक इमानदार मानिस हो भने; उसले B को घडी कहिल्यै चोरेको छैन', Z ले B को घडी चोरेको हो भन्ने विश्वास गराउने नियतले यो मानहानि हो। B को घडी कसले चोर्यो भनेर सोध्दा अर्को उदाहरण हो, र Z ले B को घडी चोरेको हो भनी विश्वास गराउने उद्देश्यले Z लाई औंल्याउँछ। तेस्रो उदाहरण हो जब कसैले B को घडी लिएर भागेको Z को तस्बिर खिचेको छ, Z को B को घडी चोरेको विश्वास गर्ने उद्देश्यले।
question_en: What does defamation look like when it involves allegations of stealing someone's watch?
answer_en: Defamation in this context can be represented in different ways. For instance, if someone says 'Z is an honest man; he never stole B's watch', with the intention to cause it to be believed that Z did steal B's watch, this is defamation. Another example is when asked who stole B's watch, and someone points to Z, intending to cause it to be believed that Z stole B's watch. A third example is when someone draws a picture of Z running away with B's watch, intending it to be believed that Z stole B's watch.

question: कुनै पनि व्यक्तिसँग सरोकार राख्दा मानहानि नगर्ने कुरा के हो?
answer: सार्वजनिक हितको लागि हो भने कुनै पनि व्यक्तिको सम्बन्धमा सत्य हो भनी आरोप लगाउनु वा प्रकाशित गर्नु पर्छ।
question_en: What is not considered defamation when it concerns any person?
answer_en: Imputing anything which is true concerning any person, if it is for the public good that the imputation should be made or published.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिको बारेमा सत्य आरोप लगाउनुलाई मानहानि मानिने अवस्था के हो?
answer: जनहितको लागि अभियोग लगाउनु वा प्रकाशित गर्नु पर्ने हो भने यसलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन।
question_en: What is the condition under which imputing something true about a person is not considered defamation?
answer_en: It is not considered defamation if it is for the public good that the imputation should be made or published.

question: मानहानिको सन्दर्भमा, सार्वजनिक सेवकहरूको अपवादको सार्वजनिक आचरणले के समावेश गर्दछ?
answer: सार्वजनिक कार्य सम्पादन गर्दा निजको आचरण वा चरित्रको सम्मान गर्ने सम्बन्धमा असल विश्वासका साथ कुनै विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि होईन, र त्यसपछि होइन।
question_en: In the context of defamation, what does the public conduct of public servants exception entail?
answer_en: It is not defamation to express in good faith any opinion respecting the conduct of a public servant in the discharge of his public functions, or respecting his character, so far as his character appears in that conduct, and no further.

question: सार्वजनिक कार्य सम्पादन गर्दा निजको आचरणको सम्मान गर्ने वा निजको चरित्रलाई त्यो आचरणमा देखिएसम्म उसको चरित्रलाई सम्मान गर्ने गरी असल नियतले कुनै विचार व्यक्त गर्नुको अर्थ के हो?
answer: यसले मानहानिको सन्दर्भमा सार्वजनिक सेवकहरूको अपवादको सार्वजनिक आचरणलाई जनाउँछ, जसको अर्थ यस्तो विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि होइन।
question_en: What does it mean to express in good faith any opinion respecting the conduct of a public servant in the discharge of his public functions, or respecting his character, so far as his character appears in that conduct, and no further?
answer_en: This refers to the public conduct of public servants exception in the context of defamation, which means it is not defamation to express such opinions.

question: मानहानिसँग सम्बन्धित तेस्रो अपवाद के हो?
answer: मानहानिको तेस्रो अपवाद कुनै पनि सार्वजनिक प्रश्नलाई छुने व्यक्तिको आचरणसँग सम्बन्धित छ। कुनै पनि सार्वजनिक प्रश्नलाई छोएको व्यक्तिको आचरणको सम्मान गर्ने र त्यस आचरणमा निजको चरित्र देखिएसम्म उसको चरित्रलाई सम्मान गर्ने गरी असल विश्वासका साथ कुनै पनि विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि होइन, र त्यसपछि होइन।
question_en: What is the third exception to defamation related to?
answer_en: The third exception to defamation is related to the conduct of any person touching any public question. It is not defamation to express in good faith any opinion whatever respecting the conduct of any person touching any public question, and respecting his character, so far as his character appears in that conduct, and no further.

question: मानहानिको तेस्रो अपवाद कुनै पनि सार्वजनिक प्रश्नलाई छोएको व्यक्तिको आचरणसँग सम्बन्धित छ, र कुनै पनि सार्वजनिक प्रश्नलाई छुने कुनै व्यक्तिको आचरणको सम्मान गर्ने र उसको चरित्रको सम्मान गर्ने, जहाँसम्म उसको आचरणमा देखा पर्दछ, र पछिसम्म कुनै पनि विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि होइन?
answer: यसको अर्थ मानहानिको तेस्रो अपवाद सार्वजनिक मुद्दाको सन्दर्भमा व्यक्तिको व्यवहार वा कार्यसँग सम्बन्धित छ। कसैले इमानदारीपूर्वक ती व्यक्तिको कार्य र ती कार्यहरूमा देखिने चरित्रको बारेमा आफ्नो विचार व्यक्त गरेमा यसलाई मानहानि होइन मानिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when the third exception to defamation is related to the conduct of any person touching any public question, and it is not defamation to express in good faith any opinion whatever respecting the conduct of any person touching any public question, and respecting his character, so far as his character appears in that conduct, and no further?
answer_en: It means the third exception to defamation is related to the behavior or actions of a person in the context of a public issue. It considers it not defamation if someone honestly expresses their opinion about that person's actions and their character as it appears in those actions.

question: के न्यायलयको कारबाहीको वास्तविक प्रतिवेदन प्रकाशित गर्नु मानहानि हो?
answer: होइन, न्याय अदालतको कारबाही वा त्यस्ता कुनै कारबाहीको नतिजाको पर्याप्त सत्य प्रतिवेदन प्रकाशित गर्नु मानहानि होइन।
question_en: Is it defamation to publish a true report of the proceedings of a Court of Justice?
answer_en: No, it is not defamation to publish substantially true report of the proceedings of a Court of Justice, or of the result of any such proceedings.

question: के यो न्याय अदालतको कार्यवाही, वा त्यस्ता कुनै कार्यवाहीको नतिजाको पर्याप्त सत्य प्रतिवेदन प्रकाशित गर्न मानहानि मानिन्छ?
answer: होइन, यसलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन।
question_en: Is it considered defamation to publish a substantially true report of the proceedings of a Court of Justice, or of the result of any such proceedings?
answer_en: No, it is not considered defamation.

question: के अदालतमा फैसला भएको मुद्दाको योग्यतामा विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि हो?
answer: होइन, न्यायिक अदालतले निर्णय गरेको कुनै पनि मुद्दा, दिवाणी वा फौजदारीको योग्यतालाई सम्मान गर्दै असल विश्वासका साथ कुनै विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि होइन।
question_en: Is it defamation to express an opinion on the merits of a case decided in Court?
answer_en: No, it is not defamation to express in good faith any opinion whatever respecting the merits of any case, civil or criminal, which has been decided by a Court of Justice.

question: मानहानि नगरी न्यायिक अदालतले फैसला गरेको कुनै पनि मुद्दा, दिवाणी वा फौजदारीको योग्यतालाई सम्मान गर्दै के कसैले राम्रो विश्वासका साथ कुनै राय व्यक्त गर्न सक्छ?
answer: हो, यस्तो धारणा व्यक्त गर्नु अपमान होइन।
question_en: Can one express in good faith any opinion whatever respecting the merits of any case, civil or criminal, which has been decided by a Court of Justice without it being defamation?
answer_en: Yes, it is not defamation to express such an opinion.

question: मानहानि राज्यको छैटौं अपवाद के हुन्छ?
answer: मानहानिको छैटौं अपवादमा भनिएको छ कि यसको लेखकले जनताको न्यायमा पेश गरेको कुनै पनि कार्यसम्पादनको योग्यताको सम्मान गर्दै वा लेखकको चरित्रलाई त्यस्तो कार्यमा देखा परेसम्म उनको चरित्रलाई सम्मान गर्दै असल विश्वासका साथ कुनै विचार व्यक्त गर्नु मानहानि होइन, र अर्को होइन।
question_en: What does the sixth exception of defamation state?
answer_en: The sixth exception of defamation states that it is not defamation to express in good faith any opinion respecting the merits of any performance which its author has submitted to the judgment of the public, or respecting the character of the author so far as his character appears in such performance, and no further.

question: यसको लेखकले जनताको निर्णयमा पेश गरेको कुनै पनि कार्यसम्पादनको योग्यतालाई सम्मान गर्दै असल विश्वासका साथ कुनै राय व्यक्त गर्नु वा लेखकको चरित्रलाई त्यस्तो प्रदर्शनमा देखाएसम्म उहाँको चरित्रलाई सम्मान गर्नुको अर्थ के हो, र अर्को होइन?
answer: यो मानहानिको छैटौं अपवाद हो।
question_en: What does it mean to express in good faith any opinion respecting the merits of any performance which its author has submitted to the judgment of the public, or respecting the character of the author so far as his character appears in such performance, and no further?
answer_en: This is the sixth exception of defamation.

question: मानहानिको छैटौं अपवादको व्याख्याले के सुझाव दिन्छ?
answer: स्पष्टीकरणले सुझाव दिन्छ कि कार्यसम्पादनलाई जनताको निर्णयमा स्पष्ट रूपमा वा लेखकको तर्फबाट कार्यहरू पेश गर्न सकिन्छ जसले जनताको निर्णयमा यस्तो प्रस्तुतीकरणलाई संकेत गर्दछ।
question_en: What does the explanation of the sixth exception of defamation suggest?
answer_en: The explanation suggests that a performance may be submitted to the judgment of the public either expressly or by acts on the part of the author which imply such submission to the judgment of the public.

question: सार्वजनिक न्यायमा पेश गरिएको कार्यसम्पादन, या त स्पष्ट रूपमा वा निहित रूपमा, मानहानि अपवादहरू अनुसार के सुझाव दिन्छ?
answer: यसले मानहानिको छैटौं अपवादको व्याख्या सुझाव दिन्छ।
question_en: What does a performance being submitted to the judgment of the public, either expressly or by implication, suggest according to the defamation exceptions?
answer_en: This suggests the explanation of the sixth exception of defamation.

question: एक व्यक्तिले आफ्नो काम जनताको न्यायमा पेश गरेको उदाहरण के हो?
answer: यसको उदाहरण एक व्यक्ति हो जसले पुस्तक प्रकाशित गर्दछ, किनकि उनीहरूले त्यो पुस्तकलाई जनताको न्यायमा पेश गरिरहेका छन्।
question_en: What is an example of a person submitting their work to the judgment of the public?
answer_en: An example of this is a person who publishes a book, as they are submitting that book to the judgment of the public.

question: पुस्तक प्रकाशन गर्ने कार्यलाई उदाहरणका रूपमा के भनिन्छ ?
answer: पुस्तक प्रकाशन गर्नु भनेको एक व्यक्तिले आफ्नो काम जनताको न्यायमा पेश गर्ने उदाहरण हो।
question_en: What is the act of publishing a book an example of?
answer_en: Publishing a book is an example of a person submitting their work to the judgment of the public.

question: छैटौं अपवादको सन्दर्भमा अपमानजनक विचार के मानिन्छ?
answer: यस सन्दर्भमा एक अपमानजनक राय हुनेछ यदि कसैले भन्यो "मलाई अचम्म लाग्दैन कि Z को पुस्तक मूर्ख र अशोभनीय छ, किनकि उहाँ एक कमजोर मानिस र स्वतन्त्र हुनुहुन्छ।" यो अपवाद भित्र छैन किनकि यो काममा मात्र आधारित छैन तर व्यक्तिगत चरित्रमा पनि आधारित छ।
question_en: What is considered a defamatory opinion in the context of the sixth exception?
answer_en: A defamatory opinion in this context would be if someone says “I am not surprised that Z's book is foolish and indecent, for he is a weak man and a libertine.” This is not within the exception as it is not solely based on the work but also on personal character.

question: छैटौं अपवाद अनुसार व्यक्तिको कामको कुन विचारलाई मानहानि मानिन्छ?
answer: "Z को किताब मुर्ख हो; Z कमजोर मान्छे हुनुपर्छ, Z को किताब अशोभनीय छ; Z अशुद्ध दिमागको मान्छे हुनुपर्छ" जस्तो भनाइ असल विश्वासका साथ भन्यो भने मानहानि मानिने छैन। यो किनभने यसले Z को क्यारेक्टरलाई मात्र सम्मान गर्दछ जहाँसम्म यो Z को पुस्तकमा देखा पर्दछ, र अरू छैन।
question_en: What opinion of a person's work is not considered defamation according to the sixth exception?
answer_en: An opinion like “Z’s book is foolish; Z must be a weak man. Z's book is indecent; Z must be a man of impure mind” is not considered defamation if said in good faith. This is because it respects Z's character only so far as it appears in Z's book, and no further.

question: Z को पुस्तकको बारेमा कस्तो प्रकारको विचार राम्रो विश्वासमा व्यक्त गर्न सकिन्छ यसलाई मानहानिको रूपमा विचार नगरी?
answer: "Z को किताब मुर्ख हो; Z कमजोर मान्छे हुनुपर्छ, Z को किताब अशोभनीय छ; Z अपवित्र दिमागको मान्छे हुनुपर्छ" जस्ता विचारलाई मानहानि मानिँदैन। यो किनभने यो Z को क्यारेक्टरलाई सम्मान गर्दछ जहाँसम्म यो Z को पुस्तकमा देखा पर्दछ, र अरू छैन।
question_en: What kind of opinion about Z's book can be expressed in good faith without it being considered defamation?
answer_en: An opinion like “Z’s book is foolish; Z must be a weak man. Z's book is indecent; Z must be a man of impure mind” is not considered defamation. It is because it respects Z's character only so far as it appears in Z's book, and no further.

question: मानहानिको सातौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: मानहानिको सातौं अपवाद अर्को माथि कानुनी अधिकार भएको व्यक्तिले असल विश्वासमा पारित गरेको निन्दा हो। यसमा साक्षीको आचरणको निन्दा गर्ने न्यायाधीश, विभाग प्रमुखले अधीनस्थहरूलाई निन्दा गर्ने, आमाबाबुले आफ्ना भाइबहिनीहरूको अगाडि बच्चालाई निन्दा गर्ने, स्कूलमास्टरले विद्यार्थीको निन्दा गर्ने, खराब प्रदर्शनको लागि नोकरलाई निन्दा गर्ने मालिक, वा बैंकरले उनीहरूको आचरणको लागि क्यासियरलाई निन्दा गर्ने समावेश गर्न सक्छ।
question_en: What is the seventh exception of defamation?
answer_en: The seventh exception of defamation is the censure passed in good faith by a person having lawful authority over another. This can include a judge censuring the conduct of a witness, a department head censuring subordinates, a parent censuring a child in front of their siblings, a schoolmaster censuring a pupil, a master censuring a servant for poor performance, or a banker censuring a cashier for their conduct.

question: मानहानिको सातौं अपवादमा के समावेश छ र कसले यसलाई प्रयोग गर्न सक्छ?
answer: मानहानिको सातौं अपवादले अर्कोमाथि कानुनी अधिकार भएको व्यक्तिले असल विश्वासमा पारित गरेको निन्दा समावेश गर्दछ। साक्षीको आचरणको निन्दा गर्ने न्यायाधीश, विभाग प्रमुखले मातहतका कर्मचारीहरूलाई निन्दा गर्ने, आमाबाबुले आफ्ना भाइबहिनीहरूको अगाडि बच्चालाई निन्दा गर्ने, स्कूलमास्टरले विद्यार्थीको निन्दा गर्ने, खराब प्रदर्शनको लागि सेवकलाई निन्दा गर्ने मालिकले वा बैंकरले उनीहरूको आचरणको लागि क्यासियरको निन्दा गर्ने प्रयोग गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What does the seventh exception of defamation include and who can exercise it?
answer_en: The seventh exception of defamation includes the censure passed in good faith by a person having lawful authority over another. It can be exercised by a judge censuring the conduct of a witness, a department head censuring subordinates, a parent censuring a child in front of their siblings, a schoolmaster censuring a pupil, a master censuring a servant for poor performance, or a banker censuring a cashier for their conduct.

question: मानहानिको आठौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: मानहानिको आठौं अपवाद एक आधिकारिक व्यक्तिलाई राम्रो विश्वासमा प्राथमिकता दिइएको आरोप हो। यसको मतलब यो हो कि आरोपको विषयवस्तुको सम्बन्धमा त्यो व्यक्तिमाथि कानुनी अधिकार भएकाहरू मध्ये कुनै पनि व्यक्ति विरुद्ध राम्रो विश्वासका साथ आरोप लगाउनु मानहानि होइन।
question_en: What is the eighth exception of defamation?
answer_en: The eighth exception of defamation is the accusation preferred in good faith to an authorised person. This means that it is not defamation to prefer in good faith an accusation against any person to any of those who have lawful authority over that person with respect to the subject-matter of accusation.

question: मानहानि कानून अन्तर्गत अधिकृत व्यक्तिलाई राम्रो विश्वासका साथ आरोप लगाइन्छ भने यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यसको मतलब यो मानहानिको आठौं अपवाद हो। विशेष गरी, आरोपको विषयवस्तुको सम्बन्धमा त्यो व्यक्तिमाथि कानुनी अधिकार भएका व्यक्तिहरूमध्ये कुनै पनि व्यक्ति विरुद्ध राम्रो विश्वासका साथ आरोप लगाउनुलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन।
question_en: What does it mean if an accusation is preferred in good faith to an authorised person under defamation law?
answer_en: It means that it is the eighth exception of defamation. Specifically, it is not considered defamation to prefer in good faith an accusation against any person to any of those who have lawful authority over that person with respect to the subject-matter of accusation.

question: मानहानिको नवौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: मानहानिको नवौं अपवाद भनेको कुनै व्यक्तिले आफ्नो वा अरूको हितको रक्षाको लागि असल विश्वासमा गरेको आरोप हो। यसको मतलब अर्काको चरित्रमा आरोप लगाउनु मानहानि होइन, तर यो आरोप लगाउने व्यक्ति वा अन्य व्यक्तिको हितको रक्षाको लागि वा सार्वजनिक हितको लागि असल नियतले गरिएको हो।
question_en: What is the ninth exception of defamation?
answer_en: The ninth exception of defamation is the imputation made in good faith by a person for the protection of his or other's interests. This means that it is not defamation to make an imputation on the character of another provided that the imputation be made in good faith for the protection of the interests of the person making it, or of any other person, or for the public good.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले आफ्नो वा अरुको हितको रक्षाको लागि असल नियतले गरेको आरोपलाई मानहानिको अपवाद मानिन्छ भने के बुझिन्छ?
answer: यसको मतलब यो मानहानिको नवौं अपवाद हो। यस अपवादले अर्काको चरित्रमा आरोप लगाउनु मानहानि होइन भन्ने बुझाउँछ भने यो आरोप लगाउने व्यक्ति वा अन्य व्यक्तिको वा सार्वजनिक हितको लागि असल विश्वासका साथ लगाइएको हो।
question_en: What does it mean when the imputation made in good faith by a person for the protection of his or other's interests is considered as an exception of defamation?
answer_en: It means that it is the ninth exception of defamation. This exception implies that it is not defamation to make an imputation on the character of another provided that the imputation be made in good faith for the protection of the interests of the person making it, or of any other person, or for the public good.

question: के आमाबाबुले असल विश्वासमा बच्चालाई निन्दा गर्नेलाई मानहानि मान्न सकिन्छ?
answer: होइन, सातौं अपवाद अनुसार असल विश्वासका साथ बच्चाको निन्दा गर्ने अभिभावकलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन।
question_en: Can a parent censuring a child in good faith be considered defamation?
answer_en: No, a parent censuring a child in good faith is not considered defamation as per the seventh exception.

question: बच्चाको निन्दा गर्ने अभिभावकको सम्बन्धमा मानहानि सम्बन्धी सातौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: मानहानिको सातौं अपवादले राम्रो विश्वासका साथ बच्चालाई निन्दा गर्ने अभिभावकलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन भनी बताउँछ।
question_en: What is the seventh exception regarding defamation in relation to a parent censuring a child?
answer_en: The seventh exception to defamation states that a parent censuring a child in good faith is not considered defamation.

question: के एक अधिकृत व्यक्तिलाई राम्रो विश्वासमा लगाइएको आरोपलाई मानहानि मान्न सकिन्छ?
answer: होइन, आठौं अपवाद अनुसार आधिकारिक व्यक्तिलाई असल विश्वासमा लगाइएको आरोपलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन।
question_en: Can an accusation made in good faith to an authorised person be considered defamation?
answer_en: No, an accusation made in good faith to an authorised person is not considered defamation as per the eighth exception.

question: आरोप र मानहानिको सन्दर्भमा आठौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: आठौं अपवादले आधिकारिक व्यक्तिलाई असल विश्वासमा लगाइएको आरोपलाई मानहानि मानिने छैन भनी उल्लेख छ।
question_en: What is the eighth exception regarding accusations and defamation?
answer_en: The eighth exception states that an accusation made in good faith to an authorised person is not considered defamation.

question: के हित संरक्षणको लागि असल विश्वासमा गरिएको आरोपलाई मानहानि मान्न सकिन्छ?
answer: होइन, बनाउने व्यक्ति वा अन्य व्यक्तिको वा सार्वजनिक हितको हितको रक्षाको लागि असल नियतले गरिएको आरोपलाई नवौं अपवाद अनुसार मानहानि मानिने छैन।
question_en: Can an imputation made in good faith for the protection of interests be considered defamation?
answer_en: No, an imputation made in good faith for the protection of the interests of the person making it, or of any other person, or for the public good is not considered defamation as per the ninth exception.

question: मानहानिको नवौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: मानहानिको नवौं अपवाद भनेको यो बनाउने व्यक्ति वा अन्य कुनै व्यक्तिको वा सार्वजनिक हितको लागि असल विश्वासमा गरिएको आरोप हो।
question_en: What is the ninth exception to defamation?
answer_en: The ninth exception to defamation is an imputation made in good faith for the protection of the interests of the person making it, or of any other person, or for the public good.

question: मानहानिको दशौं अपवाद के हो?
answer: एक व्यक्तिलाई अर्को व्यक्तिको विरुद्धमा, राम्रो विश्वासका साथ, सावधानी पुर्‍याउनु मानहानि होइन, बशर्ते त्यस्तो सावधानी जुन व्यक्तिलाई पठाइएको हो, वा त्यो व्यक्तिको चासो वा जनहितको लागि कुनै व्यक्तिको भलाइको लागि हो।
question_en: What is the tenth exception to defamation?
answer_en: It is not defamation to convey a caution, in good faith, to one person against another, provided that such caution be intended for the good of the person to whom it is conveyed, or of some person in whom that person is interested, or for the public good.

question: आफ्नो हित वा सार्वजनिक हितको लागि एक व्यक्तिको विरुद्धमा असल विश्वासका साथ दिएका सावधानीलाई मानहानि मान्दैन भने यसको के अर्थ हुन्छ?
answer: यसको मतलब यो मानहानिको दशौं अपवाद हो।
question_en: What does it mean if a caution, conveyed in good faith to one person against another for their own good or the public good, is not considered defamation?
answer_en: It means it is the tenth exception to defamation.

question: मानहानि गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: अर्काको मानहानि गर्नेलाई दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ ।
question_en: What is the punishment for defamation?
answer_en: Whoever defames another shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: अर्काको मानहानि गर्नेलाई अधिकतम सजाय कति हुन सक्छ?
answer: मानहानिको लागि सम्भावित अधिकतम सजाय दुई वर्ष साधारण कैद, वा जरिवाना, वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the possible maximum sentence for someone who defames another?
answer_en: The possible maximum sentence for defamation can extend to two years of simple imprisonment, or a fine, or both.

question: मानहानिको रूपमा चिनिने कुरा छाप्ने वा नक्काशी गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: कुनै व्यक्तिको मानहानि हुने कुरा जानी वा विश्वास गर्ने उचित कारण भएमा कसैले छाप्ने वा कुँदिएमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for printing or engraving matter known to be defamatory?
answer_en: Whoever prints or engraves any matter, knowing or having good reason to believe that such matter is defamatory of any person, shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: जानीजानी कुनै पनि व्यक्तिको बारेमा मानहानिपूर्ण कुरा छाप्ने वा कुँद्ने व्यक्तिलाई के हुन सक्छ?
answer: जानीजानी कुनै पनि व्यक्तिको बारेमा मानहानिपूर्ण कुरा छाप्ने वा कुँद्नेलाई सम्भावित सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential penalty for someone who knowingly prints or engraves defamatory matter about any person?
answer_en: The potential penalty for someone who knowingly prints or engraves defamatory matter about any person can be simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or a fine, or both.

question: मानहानिपूर्ण कुरा भएको छापिएको वा कुँदिएको वस्तु बिक्री गर्दा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: कसैले त्यस्तो कुरा रहेको थाहा पाएर मानहानि गर्ने कुनै छापिएको वा कुँदिएको वस्तु बिक्री वा बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गरेमा दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुनेछ।
question_en: What is the punishment for selling printed or engraved substance containing defamatory matter?
answer_en: Whoever sells or offers for sale any printed or engraved substance containing defamatory matter, knowing that it contains such matter, shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: जानीजानी कुनै पनि मुद्रित वा कुँदिएको मानहानिपूर्ण कुरा भएको वस्तु बेच्ने वा बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गर्ने व्यक्तिलाई के सम्भावित सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: कसैले जानीजानी कुनै पनि मुद्रित वा कुँदिएको वस्तुलाई मानहानिपूर्ण कुरा समावेश गरी बेच्ने वा बिक्रीको लागि प्रस्ताव गर्ने सम्भावित सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the potential punishment for someone who knowingly sells or offers for sale any printed or engraved substance containing defamatory matter?
answer_en: The potential punishment for someone who knowingly sells or offers for sale any printed or engraved substance containing defamatory matter is simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with a fine, or with both.

question: आपराधिक धम्की भनेको के हो?
answer: आपराधिक धम्की भन्नाले कसैलाई आफ्नो व्यक्ति, प्रतिष्ठा वा सम्पत्ति, वा कुनै व्यक्ति वा व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा कुनै चोट पुर्‍याउने धम्की दिएर, त्यो व्यक्तिलाई खतरा गराउने उद्देश्यले, वा त्यो व्यक्तिलाई कानुनी रूपमा गर्न बाध्य नभएको कुनै काम गर्न लगाउने, वा त्यस्तो व्यक्तिलाई कानुनी रूपमा धम्की दिनबाट जोगिनको लागि त्यस्तो कार्य गर्न छोड्ने उद्देश्यले।
question_en: What is criminal intimidation?
answer_en: Criminal intimidation is when someone threatens another with any injury to his person, reputation or property, or to the person or reputation of anyone in whom that person is interested, with intent to cause alarm to that person, or to cause that person to do any act which he is not legally bound to do, or to omit to do any act which that person is legally entitled to do, as the means of avoiding the execution of such threat.

question: कुनै व्यक्तिले आफ्नो व्यक्ति, प्रतिष्ठा वा सम्पत्तिमा हानि पुऱ्याउने उद्देश्यले अन्य व्यक्तिलाई खतरा उत्पन्न गराउने वा उनीहरूलाई कानुनी रूपमा बाध्य वा गर्न बाध्य नभएको काम गर्न वा नगर्न बाध्य पार्ने धम्की दिँदा के बुझिन्छ?
answer: यसलाई आपराधिक धम्की भनिन्छ।
question_en: What does it mean when someone threatens another with injury to his person, reputation, or property with intent to cause alarm or to force them to do or not do something they are legally bound or not bound to do respectively?
answer_en: This is known as criminal intimidation.

question: आपराधिक धम्की भनेको के हो?
answer: कुनै पनि मृतक व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा चोट पुर्‍याउने धम्की जसमा धम्की दिने व्यक्तिले चासो राख्छ, वा दिवाणी मुद्दा चलाउनबाट प्रतिरोध गर्न उत्प्रेरित गर्न कसैको घर जलाउने धम्की।
question_en: What constitutes criminal intimidation?
answer_en: A threat to injure the reputation of any deceased person in whom the person threatened is interested, or a threat to burn someone's house to induce them to resist from prosecuting a civil suit.

question: धम्की दिने व्यक्तिले चासो राखेको कुनै पनि मृतक व्यक्तिको प्रतिष्ठामा ठेस पुग्ने धम्की वा दिवानी मुद्दा चलाउनबाट प्रतिरोध गर्न उत्प्रेरित गर्न कसैको घर जलाउने धम्कीलाई के मान्न सकिन्छ?
answer: यी कार्यहरूलाई आपराधिक धम्कीको रूपमा गठन गर्न सकिन्छ।
question_en: What could be considered as a threat to injure the reputation of any deceased person in whom the person threatened is interested, or a threat to burn someone's house to induce them to resist from prosecuting a civil suit?
answer_en: These actions can be constituted as criminal intimidation.

question: शान्ति भंग गर्ने नियतले जानाजानी अपमान गर्नेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ?
answer: सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for intentional insult with intent to provoke a breach of peace?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.

question: अपराधको लागि अधिकतम कैद अवधि के हो जसमा जरिवाना पनि समावेश हुन सक्छ?
answer: यस्तो अपराधमा अधिकतम जेल सजाय दुई वर्षसम्म हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term for a crime that also may include a fine?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term for such a crime can extend to two years.

question: सार्वजनिक दुर्व्यवहारको लागि कथन के गठन गर्दछ?
answer: भारतको सेना, नौसेना वा वायुसेनाका कुनै अधिकारी, सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनालाई विद्रोह गर्न वा आफ्नो कर्तव्यमा असफल गराउने उद्देश्यले वा गराउने कथन, वा जनतामा डर वा डर पैदा गर्न खोज्ने कथन, वा कुनै पनि वर्ग वा समुदायलाई अन्य कुनै वर्ग वा समुदायको विरुद्धमा कुनै अपराध गर्न उक्साउने कथन।
question_en: What constitutes a statement conducing to public mischief?
answer_en: A statement that intends to cause or is likely to cause any officer, soldier, sailor or airman in the Army, Navy or Air Force of India to mutiny or fail in his duty, or a statement that intends to cause fear or alarm to the public, or a statement that intends to incite any class or community of persons to commit any offence against any other class or community.

question: यदि कुनै कथनले सार्वजनिक दुव्र्यवहार गर्ने हो भने यसले के गर्न चाहन्छ?
answer: सार्वजनिक दुर्व्यवहार गर्ने कथनले भारतीय सेना, नौसेना वा वायुसेनाका कुनै अधिकारी, सिपाही, नाविक वा वायुसेनालाई विद्रोह गर्न वा आफ्नो कर्तव्यमा असफल गराउने वा जनतामा डर वा डर पैदा गर्न वा कुनै वर्ग वा समुदायलाई अन्य कुनै वर्ग वा समुदाय विरुद्ध कुनै अपराध गर्न उक्साउने उद्देश्य राख्दछ।
question_en: What does a statement intend to cause if it is conducing to public mischief?
answer_en: A statement conducing to public mischief intends to cause or is likely to cause any officer, soldier, sailor or airman in the Army, Navy or Air Force of India to mutiny or fail in his duty, or intends to cause fear or alarm to the public, or intends to incite any class or community of persons to commit any offence against any other class or community.

question: जनतामा खलल पुर्‍याउने अभिव्यक्ति दिनेलाई के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for making statements conducing to public mischief?
answer_en: The punishment can be imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: अपराधको नतिजा के हुन सक्छ, जसले तीन वर्षसम्म कैद, जरिवाना, वा दुवै हुन सक्छ?
answer: सार्वजनिक दुव्र्यवहार गराउने कथनहरूले त्यस्ता परिणामहरू निम्त्याउन सक्छ।
question_en: What can be the consequences for a crime, that could lead to imprisonment for up to three years, a fine, or both?
answer_en: Making statements conducing to public mischief can lead to such consequences.

question: वर्गहरू बीच शत्रुता, घृणा वा दुर्भावना सिर्जना गर्ने वा प्रवर्द्धन गर्ने कथन के हो?
answer: धर्म, जाति, जन्म स्थान, बसोबास, भाषा, जात वा समुदाय वा अन्य कुनै पनि आधारमा विभिन्न धर्म, जाति, जन्मस्थल, बसोबास, भाषा, भाषिक समुदायबीच शत्रुता, घृणा वा अनाहकको भावना पैदा गर्ने वा प्रवर्द्धन गर्ने उद्देश्यले अफवाह वा डरलाग्दो समाचार समावेश भएको बयान वा रिपोर्ट।
question_en: What constitutes a statement creating or promoting enmity, hatred or ill-will between classes?
answer_en: A statement or report containing rumour or alarming news with intent to create or promote, or which is likely to create or promote, on grounds of religion, race, place of birth, residence, language, caste or community or any other ground whatsoever, feelings of enmity, hatred or ill-will between different religious, races, places of birth, residences, languages, castes or communities.

question: धर्म, वर्ण, जन्मस्थल, बसोबास, भाषा, जात वा समुदाय वा अन्य जुनसुकै आधारमा विभिन्न धर्म, जाति, जन्मस्थल, भाषा, समुदायका बीचमा शत्रुता, घृणा वा अविश्वासको भावना पैदा गर्ने वा प्रवर्द्धन गर्ने उद्देश्यले अफवाह वा डरलाग्दो समाचार समावेश भएको कथन वा प्रतिवेदनले के बुझाउँछ?
answer: यस्तो कथनले वर्गहरू बीचको शत्रुता, घृणा वा दुर्भावना सिर्जना गर्ने वा बढावा दिने कथन हो।
question_en: What does a statement or report containing rumour or alarming news with intent to create or promote, or which is likely to create or promote, on grounds of religion, race, place of birth, residence, language, caste or community or any other ground whatsoever, feelings of enmity, hatred or ill-will between different religious, races, places of birth, residences, languages, castes or communities constitute?
answer_en: Such a statement constitutes a statement creating or promoting enmity, hatred or ill-will between classes.

question: जातीय, भाषिक वा क्षेत्रीय समूह वा जात वा समुदाय विरुद्धको अपराध गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय तीन वर्षसम्म कैद वा जरिवाना वा दुवै हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for committing an offence against racial, language or regional groups or castes or communities?
answer_en: The punishment is imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.

question: जातीय, भाषिक वा क्षेत्रीय समूह वा जात वा समुदाय विरुद्धको अपराध गरेमा अधिकतम कैद वा वैकल्पिक सजाय के हो?
answer: अधिकतम कैद अवधि तीन वर्षसम्म लम्बिन सक्छ, वा दोषी पक्षलाई जरिवाना वा दुवै सजाय हुन सक्छ।
question_en: What is the maximum imprisonment term, or the alternative penalties, for committing an offence against racial, language or regional groups or castes or communities?
answer_en: The maximum imprisonment term can extend to three years, or the guilty party may be fined, or both penalties may be applied.

question: उपदफा (२) बमोजिम पूजास्थल वा धार्मिक पूजा वा समारोहमा संलग्न सभामा कसुर गरेमा के सजाय हुन्छ ?
answer: सजाय पाँच वर्षसम्म कैद र जरिवाना पनि लाग्ने छ।
question_en: What is the punishment for committing an offence under sub-section (2) in a place of worship or in an assembly engaged in religious worship or ceremonies?
